body:
The double standard of costumes.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MjSnGSU_Xc2A2POHX-SzFczB3dG5ijyHmkcmo70hvWs6hbzkICHwMgWPa8l8JACJaQZH4NmPdJqL2u9NVmJrldsiTe9mm-y750QRvjEmgtPdvmjv6zRmA_yEA6gZ2SNKRja98XxH718kmwKiRX9YHw==&c=x8rbhy-rkVZK_zf53yCaIB0krTYsJdOA_IA30MLA9fdv_Wp3BGJ2TQ==&ch=hbPkyN1AB2kmne9qMgVyFYSL_TZyACDXxVg8IMapB5jJ__is2rqD1A==)
---
| The Double Standard of Costumes
---
|
---
|
---
June is PRIDE Month. In celebration, [406 PRIDE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MjSnGSU_Xc2A2POHX-SzFczB3dG5ijyHmkcmo70hvWs6hbzkICHwMpugh9B0mqkmi0gvNOQaX21P2NZ-STSYo4eVZvspfIn1QW5EnQzMBQ_SOj2BB4XO10ggUO4p6RTBV_QDFeEFosvCpwAJhKUomg==&c=x8rbhy-rkVZK_zf53yCaIB0krTYsJdOA_IA30MLA9fdv_Wp3BGJ2TQ==&ch=hbPkyN1AB2kmne9qMgVyFYSL_TZyACDXxVg8IMapB5jJ__is2rqD1A==), a non-profit organization in Billings, MT, is hosting a private event at [ZooMontana](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MjSnGSU_Xc2A2POHX-SzFczB3dG5ijyHmkcmo70hvWs6hbzkICHwMpugh9B0mqkmv2VtUx4yald7TENYnlZWJG5ETzKkHLlokiU2hKIOJk9vUVqhrekGmh1Qfyy2PSuUOPOAr1DzA3d1b5ksqa1gdQ==&c=x8rbhy-rkVZK_zf53yCaIB0krTYsJdOA_IA30MLA9fdv_Wp3BGJ2TQ==&ch=hbPkyN1AB2kmne9qMgVyFYSL_TZyACDXxVg8IMapB5jJ__is2rqD1A==). The event is a Drag Story Hour and tickets are being sold for the event.
ZooMontana has now come under fire by Matt Rosendale.
Pictured alongside Matt Rosendale's tweet are images from some of the top grossing children's films. In some of these films, the love interests are not with humans and the hyper-sexualized characters are minors. Many of these movies can be checked out at local public libraries, are in the homes of many Americans, and millions of children know songs from the films by heart.
And, many of these films have been screened throughout the country during summer Movies in the Park programs.
I've been to a Drag Storytelling presentation and what I witnessed were caring folks in costumes reading children's stories to kids. I've witnessed the same at other presentations in public libraries, parks, schools, churches, theaters, and museums -- folks in costumes reading children's stories to kids. I've also seen it at world class amusement parks.
PRIDE events provide opportunity for the LGBTQ+ community to feel safe and accepted among people who love and celebrate their absolute worthiness of both. They also provide opportunity for people to learn about and from the LGBTQ+ community.
I support 406 Pride and ZooMontana. Both organizations provide wonderful, wonderful support for the citizens of Billings, tourism, visitors, the economy, and so much more.
Both organizations are outstanding.
In a world full of division, I hope we all take and MAKE opportunities to build bridges of understanding with those different from us.
******
Here is a sample of how Matt Rosendale has voted when it comes to laws related to the protection of vulnerable populations, including children:
VOCA (Victims Of Crime Act) Fix to Sustain the Crime Victims Fund Act of 2021 - No Protecting Our Kids Act - No Infant Formula Supplemental Appropriations Act, 2022 - No Community Services Block Grant Modernization Act of 2022 - No Making emergency supplemental appropriations for assistance for the situation in Ukraine for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2022, and for other purposes. - No Ensuring Lasting Smiles Act - No Creating a Respectful and Open World for Natural Hair Act (CROWN Act of 2021) - No Ending Forced Arbitration of Sexual Assault and Sexual Harassment Act of 2021 - No America COMPETES Act of 2022 - No Protecting Our Democracy Act - No National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2022 - No Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act - No PUMP for Nursing Mothers Act - No Women's Health Protection Act of 2021 - No John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 - No Departments of Labor, Health and Human Services, and Education, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2022 - No PFAS Action Act of 2021 - No Consumer Protection and Recovery Act - No INVEST in America Act - No Global Health Security Act of 2021 - No LGBTQ Business Equal Credit Enforcement and Investment Act - No Equal Access to Contraception for Veterans Act - No Protecting Older Workers Against Discrimination Act of 2021 - No Juneteenth National Independence Day Act - No Workplace Violence Prevention for Health Care and Social Service Workers Act - No Paycheck Fairness Act - No Farm Workforce Modernization Act of 2021 - No Removing the deadline for the ratification of the equal rights amendment - No Violence Against Women Reauthorization Act of 2021 - Did Not Vote Enhanced Background Checks Act of 2021 - No Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2021 - No Requires Certain Political Groups to Disclose Expenditures - No Appropriates Funds for the Teachers' Retirement System - No Expands Medicaid Eligibility- -No Appropriates Funds for State Employee Pay Raises - No Prohibits Same-Day Voter Registration - Yes Authorizes Concealed Carry of Firearms Without a Concealed-Carry Permit - Yes Increases Public Education Funding - No Amends Sexual Conduct Laws - No Oil and Natural Gas Revenue for Schools - No
Also:
Matt Rosendale was one of only seven Montana state senators to vote against strengthening Montana's Human Trafficking laws by allowing victims an affirmative defense and requiring perpetrators to register as sex offenders.
He was one of nine Montana state senators to vote against legislation to establish a special prosecution unit within the Montana Attorney General's office to handle sexual assault cases.
In the Montana State Legislature, he voted against expanding the availability of unemployment insurance to victims of domestic violence, sexual assault, and stalking.
And, in the Montana State Legislature, he voted against $50,000 in funding to restore notifying victims of sex crimes when their attacker was released from prison.

Fellow American - The truth has been revealed.

A new report from _The Washington Post_ reveals the true motivations behind the efforts by Raphael Warnock and Stacey Abrams to have the federal government cancel student loan debt:

| _"Georgia Democratic gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams and Sen. Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.) are pushing the Biden administration to cancel millions of dollars in federal student loan debt to boost their electoral prospects this fall, a Washington Post columnist alleged this week."_
---

**Our opponent and the would-be governor of Georgia are apparently the two biggest supporters of student debt cancellation. They think that if President Biden and Democrats in Washington cancel the debt of enough young voters, they'll turn out to support Democrats in November's midterms.**

**It's a crass political calculation at the expense of American taxpayers, and it's shameful. **

**This is a prime example of politicians working to empower themselves rather than doing what's in the best interest of the people they're elected to represent. **

**[I'm asking for you to take a stand with me today. clean_body: Our opponent will do anything to win this election – especially if taxpayers are footing the bill. | Fellow American - The truth has been revealed. A new report from The Washington Post reveals the true motivations behind the efforts by Raphael Warnock and Stacey Abrams to have the federal government cancel student loan debt: | "Georgia Democratic gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams and Sen. Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.) are pushing the Biden administration to cancel millions of dollars in federal student loan debt to boost their electoral prospects this fall, a Washington Post columnist alleged this week." Our opponent and the would-be governor of Georgia are apparently the two biggest supporters of student debt cancellation. They think that if President Biden and Democrats in Washington cancel the debt of enough young voters, they'll turn out to support Democrats in November's midterms. It's a crass political calculation at the expense of American taxpayers, and it's shameful. This is a prime example of politicians working to empower themselves rather than doing what's in the best interest of the people they're elected to represent. I'm running for the Senate because our opponent isn't doing enough to get the country back on track. If the allegations are true that Raphael Warnock is attempting to convince the president to take this action on student loan debt so he can beat me in November, then he should be totally ashamed. Our campaign isn't using taxpayer money to buy votes. While our opponent is busy whispering in the president's ear, I'm barnstorming the state of Georgia to find every vote I can to earn votes - the hard way. This is going to be the most expensive Senate race in Georgia history, so we really need your help. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Clinton Did It!
body:
Shocking Ashli Babbitt Documents

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Reveals DOJ Memo Declining Prosecution of Babbitt’s
Shooter

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27470&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1Ed3hnNUJhQVBjRSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

Judicial Watch uncovered more shocking evidence about the shooting
death of Ashli Babbitt even as the Pelosi rump 1/6 operation makes a
mockery of the system of government with its kangaroo court
“hearings.”

We uncovered 102 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27463&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvcHJvZDJhbmRqdW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
of
records from the Department of Justice related to the shooting of
January 6 protestor Ashli Babbitt that include a memo recommending
“that the United States Attorney’s Office for the District of
Columbia declined for criminal prosecution the fatal shooting of Ashli
McEntee [Babbitt],” also noting that the shooter, U.S. Capitol
Police Lt. Michael Byrd, “did not create a police report or
documents” related to the shooting of Babbitt.

The documents also reveal that in the press release announcing the
decision not to prosecute Byrd for the killing of Babbitt the DOJ

The records contain the prosecution declination memorandum
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27465&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWFzaGxpLWJhYmJpdHQtcHJvZC0yLTAyNDYyLXBncy0xOS0zMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
justifying the decision not to prosecute Byrd.

The “Overview and Recommendation” section reads as follows:

This memorandum recommends that the United States Attorney’s Office
for the District of Columbia decline for criminal prosecution the
fatal shooting of Ashli McEntee.

***

This declination is based on a review of law enforcement and civilian
eyewitness accounts, physical evidence, recorded radio communications,
cell phone footage, MPD reports, forensic reports, and the autopsy
report for Ms. McEntee. After a thorough review of the facts and
circumstances in this case, there is insufficient evidence to prove
beyond a reasonable doubt that Lieutenant Byrd violated Ms.
McEntee’s civil rights by willfully using more force than was
reasonably necessary, or was not acting in self-defense or the defense
of others.
The memo details:

Once the demonstrators broke the glass, Lieutenant Byrd took up a
tactical position to the immediate right of the barricaded entry
doors, [Capitol Police Officer Reggie Tyson] took up a tactical
position behind Lieutenant Byrd on the right side behind the third
pillar and Sergeant McKenna took up a tactical position behind Officer
Tyson and behind the fourth pillar on the right side of the Speakers
Lobby.

***

All three officers had their service pistols drawn, pointed them in
the direction of the barricaded entry doors, and repeatedly instructed
the ‘mob’ to get back. The ‘mob’ of demonstrators ignored the
officers’ commands and continued to break the glass on the doors in
their attempt to breach the Speakers Lobby. Suddenly, Ashli McEntee
began to crawl through one of the doors where the glass was already
broken out. As Ms. McEntee was climbing through the door, Lieutenant
Byrd stepped forward from his tactical position towards Ms. McEntee
and fired one round from his service pistol striking Ms. McEntee in
her left shoulder, just below her clavicle. Ms. McEntee then fell back
from the doorway and onto the floor.
Regarding possible closed-circuit television footage, the memo
notes: “There are several USCP operated Closed-Circuit Television
Video (CCTV) cameras inside of the United States Capitol Building.
However, there were no CCTV cameras observed or located in the
Speaker's Lobby area.”

In a section of the memo titled “USCP Lieutenant Michael Byrd,”
the memo notes: “He [Byrd] did not create any police reports or
documents relating to the incident, and did not provide an official
statement regarding use of force” though he did provide a voluntary
“debrief” and walk-through of the scene with his lawyer. A
footnote details that: “During the debrief of Lieutenant Byrd, he
did recall writing a few sentences on an evidence bag the evening of
January 6, 2021, at the request of a crime scene officer. To date, the
bag has not been located by USCP or MPD.”

The memo reports:

Lieutenant Byrd heard glass breaking and saw some of the items used to
barricade the doors being pushed down. Lieutenant Byrd continued to
tell the rioters to "get back, get back!" Lieutenant Byrd then saw a
rioter with a backpack on start to climb through one of the broken
glass doors. Lieutenant Byrd saw the rioter "as a threat," so he
stepped forward from his tactical position and fired one round at the
rioter. The rioter fell back out of the opening and Lieutenant Byrd
eventually stepped back into the seated area of the Speaker's Lobby
before confirming to other USCP officers that arrived on the scene
that he was the one that fired his service weapon.
The memo notes that security staffing on January 6 was less than
half the usual amount due to COVID-19:

Lieutenant Byrd did agree to participate with his counsel, Mark
Schamel, in a voluntary debrief and walk-through of the scene on
January 29, 2021 ... Due to COVID-19 and other issues, the normal
staffing for a joint session was less than half of what Lieutenant
Byrd usually has assigned to the House Chamber. Once he arrived that
morning, he was informed that USCP operations had made the decision
that the uniform officers needed to pick up riot gear.
In a section titled, “Use of Force History,” it is noted that,
“Lieutenant Byrd had one prior use of force matter, that was
originally sustained by USCP, but after Lt. Byrd appealed, he was
found not guilty by the Disciplinary Review Board.”

In a section titled “Recommendation,” the memo details:

This matter does not constitute a prosecutable violation of the
federal criminal civil rights statutes or the District of Columbia
homicide statutes. To show a violation of 18 U.S.C. § 242, the
applicable federal criminal civil rights statute, the Government must
prove beyond a reasonable doubt that an officer willfully used more
force than was reasonably necessary under the circumstances. ‘The
“reasonableness” of a particular use of force must be judged from
the perspective of a reasonable officer on the scene, rather than with
the 20/20 vision of hindsight.’ Graham v Connor, 490 U.S. 386, 396
(1989).

***

Because Ms. McEntee was an active participant in a ‘mob’ that had
just illegally entered the Capitol building, and then broke out the
glass doors and removed barricades to forcefully gain entry into the
Speaker’s Lobby, there is insufficient evidence to refute Lieutenant
Byrd’s fear for his life or the life of others at the time he
discharged his weapon. Therefore, there is insufficient evidence to
prove beyond a reasonable doubt that he willfully deprived Ms. McEntee
of a right protected by the Constitution or laws of the United States
of America. Accordingly I recommend declination of this matter.

JUDICIAL WATCH EXPOSES BIDEN HOMELAND SECURITY’S QUESTIONABLE
TERRORISM BULLETIN

We don’t trust the Biden bureaucracy to apolitically define
“domestic terrorism,” and we’re launching an investigation into
its latest attempt to label those who oppose its policies as
“terrorists.” Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog shows we are on the
case
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27471&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGVycm9yaXNtLWJ1bGxldGluLWRvbWVzdGljLWV4dHJlbWlzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=].

A new Department of Homeland Security (DHS) bulletin
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27472&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL250YXMvYWxlcnRzLzIyXzA2MDdfUzFfTlRBUy1CdWxsZXRpbl81MDgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
warning of a “heightened threat environment” claims domestic
violent extremists have expressed grievances related to their
perception that the U.S. government is unwilling or unable to secure
the U.S.-Mexico border. Therefore, the dispatch says, the domestic
extremists “have called for violence to stem the flow of
undocumented migrants to the United States.” Issued by the
agency’s National Terrorism Advisory System, the notice goes on to
say that there “is increased risk of domestic violent extremists
using changes in border security-related policies and/or enforcement
mechanisms to justify violence against individuals, such as minorities
and law enforcement officials involved in the enforcement of border
security.”

The document lists other threats as well but fails to reveal where the
information, or intelligence, comes from. Judicial Watch has launched
an investigation to uncover records that formed the foundation for the
decision to issue the warning as well as the records that substantiate
the warning. Within hours of the bulletin’s release, Judicial Watch
filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with DHS for the
files that could provide some answers. Not surprisingly, the new
terrorism advisory promotes the agency’s controversial
misinformation campaign, which was technically suspended after major
backlash over government overreach. A DHS panel known as the
Disinformation Governance Board was supposed to combat disinformation
and, though it was officially dismantled and its director resigned,
the message remains. “The continued proliferation of false or
misleading narratives regarding current events could reinforce
existing personal grievances or ideologies, and in combination with
other factors, could inspire individuals to mobilize to violence,”
this week’s terrorism advisory states.

The three-page bulletin also warns about abortion and election-related
violence. It says that those in favor of and opposed to abortion
rights have encouraged violence against government, religious and
reproductive healthcare personnel and facilities as well as those with
opposing ideologies. “As the United States enters mid-term election
season this year, we assess that calls for violence by domestic
violent extremists directed at democratic institutions, political
candidates, party offices, election events, and election workers will
likely increase,” DHS states, adding that it expects the “threat
environment to become more dynamic as several high-profile events
could be exploited to justify acts of violence against a range of
possible targets.” The targets could include public gatherings,
faith-based institutions, schools racial and religious minorities,
government facilities and personnel, U.S critical infrastructure, the
media, and perceived ideological opponents.

“Threat actors have recently mobilized to violence due to factors
such as personal grievances, reactions to current events, and
adherence to violent extremist ideologies, including racially or
ethnically motivated or anti-government/antiauthority violent
extremism,” according to the DHS terrorism bulletin. “Foreign
adversaries—including terrorist organizations and nation state
adversaries—also remain intent on exploiting the threat environment
to promote or inspire violence, sow discord, or undermine U.S.
democratic institutions.” DHS discloses that the primary threat of
mass casualty violence in the U.S. stems from lone offenders and small
groups motivated by a range of ideological beliefs and/or personal
grievances.

The agency created after 9/11 to safeguard America, writes that it is
responding to the threats by collaborating with partners across every
level of government, the private sector and in local communities. Some
of the so-called partnerships—such as information sharing with the
Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)—make sense but others appear
questionable. For instance, DHS lists a Nonprofit Security Grant
Program that provided over $250 million in funding to support
“target hardening and other physical security enhancements to
non-profit organizations at high risk of terrorist attack.” The
agency also spent at least $77 million on preventing, preparing for,
protecting against, and responding to threats via a special Homeland
Security Grant Program. DHS’s Center for Prevention Programs and
Partnerships awarded about $20 million to train and educate
“stakeholders” on how to identify indicators of radicalization to
violence, where to seek help and the resources that are available to
prevent targeted violence and terrorism. Judicial Watch is
investigating what exactly these programs do with our taxpayer dollars
and how the partnerships function.

John Durham, the special counsel appointed to investigate the Russia
mess, lost his case
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27453&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvcnVzc2lhLXVrcmFpbmUtaGlsbGFyeS1jbGludG9uLWpvaG4tZHVyaGFtLXByZXNpZGVudGlhbC1lbGVjdGlvbnMtNTkxNThmODNiZDZhOTE1OWI0MjBmMmIwNDg0OGI3N2Y/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in a DC courtroom. The jury acquitted Washington attorney Michael
Sussmann, a DC insider with deep connections to the Democratic Party
and the intelligence community, on the only charge Durham managed to
bring: a single false-statements count alleging that Sussmann lied to
the FBI when he brought it allegations of a link between Trump and
Moscow’s Putin-connected Alfa Bank.

Why did the DC jury acquit Sussmann? As Judicial Watch President Tom
Fitton tweeted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27454&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9Ub21GaXR0b24vc3RhdHVzLzE1MzE2Nzc1NjYzNzI4MjcxMzY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
last
week—politics in the heavily Democratic district aside—the
“simplest answer is the evidence— which suggested the Obama FBI
leadership knew full well the Clinton gang was behind the Alfa
Bank-Russia smears of Trump. Durham tried to pretend Obama FBI was a
victim. It was a co-conspirator.”

Sussmann’s defense relied on the preposterous claim that the
attorney—a former Justice Department cybersecurity prosecutor,
lawyer for the Democratic National Committee, and adviser to the
Clinton presidential campaign—was merely acting as a “good
citizen” when he sought an urgent meeting with FBI General Counsel
James Baker to pass along the Alfa Bank tip. Sussmann came to the
meeting highly prepared. His indictment
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27455&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFyZ2V0aW5nLXRydW1wLWR1cmhhbS11bmNvdmVycy1uZXctY2xpbnRvbi1mYmktY29ubmVjdGlvbnMtaW4tcnVzc2lhLXByb2JlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
notes that he offered Baker “three ‘white papers’ along with
data files allegedly containing evidence supporting the existence of
this purported secret communications channel” between Trump and Alfa
Bank.

Baker knew Sussmann well. It emerged at trial that Sussmann did not
even need a pass to get into the highly secured FBI headquarters for
his meeting with Baker—he already had one. Evidence also showed that
Baker, tasking FBI subordinates with investigating the Sussmann tip,
withheld Sussmann’s name—a suggestion that maybe not everyone at
FBI HQ would view an allegation from a DNC insider on the eve of a
presidential election with such credulity. In trial testimony and
earlier interviews, Baker suffered convenient memory lapses and
uncertainty about what Sussman actually said, opening a path of
reasonable doubt for the jurors.

There’s no doubt, however, that one of Sussmann’s clients was the
Clinton presidential campaign, and Durham established that it was
deeply involved in the Alfa Bank smear. Durham showed that the Alfa
Bank allegations were cooked up by Clinton campaign allies and
operatives, including the investigative firm Fusion-GPS—the key
force behind another sensational Clinton smear, the Steele Dossier.
Prosecutors introduced evidence
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27456&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvbWF5LzE4L2V2aWRlbmNlLXN1c3NtYW5uLXRyaWFsLXBvaW50cy1jbGludG9uLWNhbXBhaWducy1sLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
showing Sussmann billed many hours to his law firm for meetings with
Clinton campaign officials on Alfa Bank.

In bombshell testimony
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27457&F=T&],
former Clinton campaign manager Robbie Mook said Mrs. Clinton herself
authorized giving the Alfa smear information to the media. Under oath,
Mook described a conversation with Clinton about the Alfa Bank
material, telling her, “hey, we have this and want to share it with
a reporter.”

Mook added, “she agreed to that.”

Not only did Clinton agree, she enthusiastically supported the story
when it was published
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=18270&F=T&]
on the left-wing website, Slate. She tweeted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9oaWxsYXJ5Y2xpbnRvbi9zdGF0dXMvNzkzMjM0MTY5NTc2OTQ3NzEyP2xhbmc9ZW4mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
a link to the piece with the comment, “it’s time for Trump to
answer serious questions about his ties to Russia.”

Campaign adviser Jake Sullivan—now President Biden’s national
security adviser—chimed in, issuing a statement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=59105&L=27459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJlc2lkZW5jeS51Y3NiLmVkdS9kb2N1bWVudHMvc3RhdGVtZW50LWZyb20tamFrZS1zdWxsaXZhbi1uZXctcmVwb3J0LWV4cG9zaW5nLXRydW1wcy1zZWNyZXQtbGluZS1jb21tdW5pY2F0aW9uLXJ1c3NpYT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
declaring, “This could be the most direct link yet between Donald
Trump and Moscow. Computer scientists have uncovered a covert server
linking the Trump Organization to a Russian-based bank.”

Calling it a “secret hotline,” Sullivan prodded the FBI, saying he
could “only assume federal authorities will now explore this direct
connection between Trump and Russia as part of their existing probe
into Russia’s meddling in our elections.”

The bogus story appeared just nine days before the election. October
Surprise: mission accomplished.

Later this year, Durham will take a closer look at that other infamous
smear, the Steele Dossier. Durham indicted an alleged key source of
the dossier, Ivan Danchenko, on five counts of lying to the FBI.
Danchenko has pleaded not guilty. It seems likely Mrs. Clinton, her
associates, and the FBI will play a central role in that prosecution,
too.
Until next week...

clean_body: Shocking Ashli Babbitt Documents [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Reveals DOJ Memo Declining Prosecution of Babbitt’s Shooter [==] Judicial Watch uncovered more shocking evidence about the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt even as the Pelosi rump 1/6 operation makes a mockery of the system of government with its kangaroo court “hearings.” We uncovered 102 pages [==] of records from the Department of Justice related to the shooting of January 6 protestor Ashli Babbitt that include a memo recommending “that the United States Attorney’s Office for the District of Columbia declined for criminal prosecution the fatal shooting of Ashli McEntee [Babbitt],” also noting that the shooter, U.S. Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd, “did not create a police report or documents” related to the shooting of Babbitt. The documents also reveal that in the press release announcing the decision not to prosecute Byrd for the killing of Babbitt the DOJ replaced the words “group” and “crowd” with the word “mob” several times. The unarmed Babbitt was shot and killed [] as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United States Capitol. She was a 14-year Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by Congress, the Justice Department, and DC police for eight months until Byrd went public [=] to try to defend his killing of Babbitt. We filed the lawsuit [=] in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Executive Office for United States Attorneys, the Civil Rights Division, and the Federal Bureau of Investigation (all components of the Justice Department) failed to provide the records responsive to our April 14, 2021, and May 20, 2021, FOIA requests for records related to Babbitt’s death (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02462)). The records contain the prosecution declination memorandum [=] justifying the decision not to prosecute Byrd. The “Overview and Recommendation” section reads as follows: This memorandum recommends that the United States Attorney’s Office for the District of Columbia decline for criminal prosecution the fatal shooting of Ashli McEntee. * This declination is based on a review of law enforcement and civilian eyewitness accounts, physical evidence, recorded radio communications, cell phone footage, MPD reports, forensic reports, and the autopsy report for Ms. McEntee. After a thorough review of the facts and circumstances in this case, there is insufficient evidence to prove beyond a reasonable doubt that Lieutenant Byrd violated Ms. McEntee’s civil rights by willfully using more force than was reasonably necessary, or was not acting in self-defense or the defense of others. The memo details: Once the demonstrators broke the glass, Lieutenant Byrd took up a tactical position to the immediate right of the barricaded entry doors, [Capitol Police Officer Reggie Tyson] took up a tactical position behind Lieutenant Byrd on the right side behind the third pillar and Sergeant McKenna took up a tactical position behind Officer Tyson and behind the fourth pillar on the right side of the Speakers Lobby. All three officers had their service pistols drawn, pointed them in the direction of the barricaded entry doors, and repeatedly instructed the ‘mob’ to get back. The ‘mob’ of demonstrators ignored the officers’ commands and continued to break the glass on the doors in their attempt to breach the Speakers Lobby. Suddenly, Ashli McEntee began to crawl through one of the doors where the glass was already broken out. As Ms. McEntee was climbing through the door, Lieutenant Byrd stepped forward from his tactical position towards Ms. McEntee and fired one round from his service pistol striking Ms. McEntee in her left shoulder, just below her clavicle. Ms. McEntee then fell back from the doorway and onto the floor. Regarding possible closed-circuit television footage, the memo notes: “There are several USCP operated Closed-Circuit Television Video (CCTV) cameras inside of the United States Capitol Building. However, there were no CCTV cameras observed or located in the Speaker's Lobby area.” In a section of the memo titled “USCP Lieutenant Michael Byrd,” the memo notes: “He [Byrd] did not create any police reports or documents relating to the incident, and did not provide an official statement regarding use of force” though he did provide a voluntary “debrief” and walk-through of the scene with his lawyer. A footnote details that: “During the debrief of Lieutenant Byrd, he did recall writing a few sentences on an evidence bag the evening of January 6, 2021, at the request of a crime scene officer. To date, the bag has not been located by USCP or MPD.” The memo reports: Lieutenant Byrd heard glass breaking and saw some of the items used to barricade the doors being pushed down. Lieutenant Byrd continued to tell the rioters to "get back, get back!" Lieutenant Byrd then saw a rioter with a backpack on start to climb through one of the broken glass doors. Lieutenant Byrd saw the rioter "as a threat," so he stepped forward from his tactical position and fired one round at the rioter. The rioter fell back out of the opening and Lieutenant Byrd eventually stepped back into the seated area of the Speaker's Lobby before confirming to other USCP officers that arrived on the scene that he was the one that fired his service weapon. The memo notes that security staffing on January 6 was less than half the usual amount due to COVID-19: Lieutenant Byrd did agree to participate with his counsel, Mark Schamel, in a voluntary debrief and walk-through of the scene on January 29, 2021 ... Due to COVID-19 and other issues, the normal staffing for a joint session was less than half of what Lieutenant Byrd usually has assigned to the House Chamber. Once he arrived that morning, he was informed that USCP operations had made the decision that the uniform officers needed to pick up riot gear. In a section titled, “Use of Force History,” it is noted that, “Lieutenant Byrd had one prior use of force matter, that was originally sustained by USCP, but after Lt. Byrd appealed, he was found not guilty by the Disciplinary Review Board.” In a section titled “Recommendation,” the memo details: This matter does not constitute a prosecutable violation of the federal criminal civil rights statutes or the District of Columbia homicide statutes. To show a violation of 18 U.S.C. § 242, the applicable federal criminal civil rights statute, the Government must prove beyond a reasonable doubt that an officer willfully used more force than was reasonably necessary under the circumstances. ‘The “reasonableness” of a particular use of force must be judged from the perspective of a reasonable officer on the scene, rather than with the 20/20 vision of hindsight.’ Graham v Connor, 490 U.S. 386, 396 (1989). Because Ms. McEntee was an active participant in a ‘mob’ that had just illegally entered the Capitol building, and then broke out the glass doors and removed barricades to forcefully gain entry into the Speaker’s Lobby, there is insufficient evidence to refute Lieutenant Byrd’s fear for his life or the life of others at the time he discharged his weapon. Therefore, there is insufficient evidence to prove beyond a reasonable doubt that he willfully deprived Ms. McEntee of a right protected by the Constitution or laws of the United States of America. Accordingly I recommend declination of this matter. The records include a draft version of the April 14, 2021, Justice Department press release [=] announcing their decision not to prosecute Byrd for the killing of Babbitt, the authors replaced the word “crowd” with the word “mob” five times in describing the January 6 protestors. The documents also include charts [==] of January 6 investigations and targets. For one of the investigations, it is noted that a New York Times reporter is a “CW” [confidential witness]. Another notation tied to “pipe bombs” notes that a “geo fence” request was made to Google. Previously, we uncovered records from the DC Metropolitan Police showing that multiple officers claimed they didn’t see a weapon [=] in Babbitt’s hand before Byrd shot her, and that Byrd was visibly distraught afterward. One officer attested that he didn’t recall hearing any verbal commands before Byrd shot Babbitt. The records include internal communications about Byrd’s case and a crime scene examination report. Investigators who wrote the January 6, 2021, Metro PD Death Report [] for Babbitt (identified as Ashli Elizabeth McEntee-Babbitt Pamatian) note that the possible Manner of Death was “Homicide (Police Involved Shooting).” These records show that Lt. Byrd was given special treatment by the Biden DOJ and that there was a miscarriage of justice in the half-baked shooting death investigation of Ashli Babbitt. Lt. Byrd, who works for Congress, shot an unarmed woman for no good reason. I suspect that this unjustified shooting isn’t of much interest to the Pelosi rump January 6 committee. These revelations are the latest in our comprehensive, independent investigation into the January 6 disturbance: February 2022: We filed an opposition [=] to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down our federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues [] that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release. November 2021: We released [] multiple audio [==], visual [] and photo records [] from the DC Metropolitan Police Department about Babbitt's death. The records include a cell phone video [==] of the shooting and an audio of a brief police interview of Byrd. Also in November 2021: we – in its FOIA lawsuit asking for records of communication between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transaction records of people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021 – told a federal court that the FBI may have violated law [] in its January 6 probes. Frankly, given all our historic works and finds, perhaps Judicial Watch should be conducting January 6 hearings! JUDICIAL WATCH EXPOSES BIDEN HOMELAND SECURITY’S QUESTIONABLE TERRORISM BULLETIN We don’t trust the Biden bureaucracy to apolitically define “domestic terrorism,” and we’re launching an investigation into its latest attempt to label those who oppose its policies as “terrorists.” Our Corruption Chronicles blog shows we are on the case [=]. A new Department of Homeland Security (DHS) bulletin [] warning of a “heightened threat environment” claims domestic violent extremists have expressed grievances related to their perception that the U.S. government is unwilling or unable to secure the U.S.-Mexico border. Therefore, the dispatch says, the domestic extremists “have called for violence to stem the flow of undocumented migrants to the United States.” Issued by the agency’s National Terrorism Advisory System, the notice goes on to say that there “is increased risk of domestic violent extremists using changes in border security-related policies and/or enforcement mechanisms to justify violence against individuals, such as minorities and law enforcement officials involved in the enforcement of border security.” The document lists other threats as well but fails to reveal where the information, or intelligence, comes from. Judicial Watch has launched an investigation to uncover records that formed the foundation for the decision to issue the warning as well as the records that substantiate the warning. Within hours of the bulletin’s release, Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with DHS for the files that could provide some answers. Not surprisingly, the new terrorism advisory promotes the agency’s controversial misinformation campaign, which was technically suspended after major backlash over government overreach. A DHS panel known as the Disinformation Governance Board was supposed to combat disinformation and, though it was officially dismantled and its director resigned, the message remains. “The continued proliferation of false or misleading narratives regarding current events could reinforce existing personal grievances or ideologies, and in combination with other factors, could inspire individuals to mobilize to violence,” this week’s terrorism advisory states. The three-page bulletin also warns about abortion and election-related violence. It says that those in favor of and opposed to abortion rights have encouraged violence against government, religious and reproductive healthcare personnel and facilities as well as those with opposing ideologies. “As the United States enters mid-term election season this year, we assess that calls for violence by domestic violent extremists directed at democratic institutions, political candidates, party offices, election events, and election workers will likely increase,” DHS states, adding that it expects the “threat environment to become more dynamic as several high-profile events could be exploited to justify acts of violence against a range of possible targets.” The targets could include public gatherings, faith-based institutions, schools racial and religious minorities, government facilities and personnel, U.S critical infrastructure, the media, and perceived ideological opponents. “Threat actors have recently mobilized to violence due to factors such as personal grievances, reactions to current events, and adherence to violent extremist ideologies, including racially or ethnically motivated or anti-government/antiauthority violent extremism,” according to the DHS terrorism bulletin. “Foreign adversaries—including terrorist organizations and nation state adversaries—also remain intent on exploiting the threat environment to promote or inspire violence, sow discord, or undermine U.S. democratic institutions.” DHS discloses that the primary threat of mass casualty violence in the U.S. stems from lone offenders and small groups motivated by a range of ideological beliefs and/or personal grievances. The agency created after 9/11 to safeguard America, writes that it is responding to the threats by collaborating with partners across every level of government, the private sector and in local communities. Some of the so-called partnerships—such as information sharing with the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)—make sense but others appear questionable. For instance, DHS lists a Nonprofit Security Grant Program that provided over $250 million in funding to support “target hardening and other physical security enhancements to non-profit organizations at high risk of terrorist attack.” The agency also spent at least $77 million on preventing, preparing for, protecting against, and responding to threats via a special Homeland Security Grant Program. DHS’s Center for Prevention Programs and Partnerships awarded about $20 million to train and educate “stakeholders” on how to identify indicators of radicalization to violence, where to seek help and the resources that are available to prevent targeted violence and terrorism. Judicial Watch is investigating what exactly these programs do with our taxpayer dollars and how the partnerships function. SUSSMANN TRIAL EXPOSES CLINTON, FBI ABUSE OF TRUMP John Durham surely wishes he could have had a better venue than the District of Columbia when he put Hillary Clinton’s campaign lawyer on trial for lying to the FBI. The acquittal nevertheless further exposed Hillary and her FBI partners as corrupt. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, reports [==] on the latest in Judicial Watch’s Investigative Bulletin. Hillary did it. And the FBI helped. That’s the Occam’s Razor conclusion behind court action in Washington last week that added new details to a growing mountain of evidence about the true forces behind the sensational “Russia collusion” allegations that nearly brought down the Trump presidency. John Durham, the special counsel appointed to investigate the Russia mess, lost his case [=] in a DC courtroom. The jury acquitted Washington attorney Michael Sussmann, a DC insider with deep connections to the Democratic Party and the intelligence community, on the only charge Durham managed to bring: a single false-statements count alleging that Sussmann lied to the FBI when he brought it allegations of a link between Trump and Moscow’s Putin-connected Alfa Bank. Why did the DC jury acquit Sussmann? As Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton tweeted [=] last week—politics in the heavily Democratic district aside—the “simplest answer is the evidence— which suggested the Obama FBI leadership knew full well the Clinton gang was behind the Alfa Bank-Russia smears of Trump. Durham tried to pretend Obama FBI was a victim. It was a co-conspirator.” Sussmann’s defense relied on the preposterous claim that the attorney—a former Justice Department cybersecurity prosecutor, lawyer for the Democratic National Committee, and adviser to the Clinton presidential campaign—was merely acting as a “good citizen” when he sought an urgent meeting with FBI General Counsel James Baker to pass along the Alfa Bank tip. Sussmann came to the meeting highly prepared. His indictment [==] notes that he offered Baker “three ‘white papers’ along with data files allegedly containing evidence supporting the existence of this purported secret communications channel” between Trump and Alfa Bank. Baker knew Sussmann well. It emerged at trial that Sussmann did not even need a pass to get into the highly secured FBI headquarters for his meeting with Baker—he already had one. Evidence also showed that Baker, tasking FBI subordinates with investigating the Sussmann tip, withheld Sussmann’s name—a suggestion that maybe not everyone at FBI HQ would view an allegation from a DNC insider on the eve of a presidential election with such credulity. In trial testimony and earlier interviews, Baker suffered convenient memory lapses and uncertainty about what Sussman actually said, opening a path of reasonable doubt for the jurors. There’s no doubt, however, that one of Sussmann’s clients was the Clinton presidential campaign, and Durham established that it was deeply involved in the Alfa Bank smear. Durham showed that the Alfa Bank allegations were cooked up by Clinton campaign allies and operatives, including the investigative firm Fusion-GPS—the key force behind another sensational Clinton smear, the Steele Dossier. Prosecutors introduced evidence [==] showing Sussmann billed many hours to his law firm for meetings with Clinton campaign officials on Alfa Bank. In bombshell testimony [], former Clinton campaign manager Robbie Mook said Mrs. Clinton herself authorized giving the Alfa smear information to the media. Under oath, Mook described a conversation with Clinton about the Alfa Bank material, telling her, “hey, we have this and want to share it with a reporter.” Mook added, “she agreed to that.” Not only did Clinton agree, she enthusiastically supported the story when it was published [==] on the left-wing website, Slate. She tweeted [=] a link to the piece with the comment, “it’s time for Trump to answer serious questions about his ties to Russia.” Campaign adviser Jake Sullivan—now President Biden’s national security adviser—chimed in, issuing a statement [==] declaring, “This could be the most direct link yet between Donald Trump and Moscow. Computer scientists have uncovered a covert server linking the Trump Organization to a Russian-based bank.” Calling it a “secret hotline,” Sullivan prodded the FBI, saying he could “only assume federal authorities will now explore this direct connection between Trump and Russia as part of their existing probe into Russia’s meddling in our elections.” The bogus story appeared just nine days before the election. October Surprise: mission accomplished. Later this year, Durham will take a closer look at that other infamous smear, the Steele Dossier. Durham indicted an alleged key source of the dossier, Ivan Danchenko, on five counts of lying to the FBI. Danchenko has pleaded not guilty. It seems likely Mrs. Clinton, her associates, and the FBI will play a central role in that prosecution, too. Until next week... " I have just been informed by CDC Attorneys in this case Chenge v CDC No. 1:22-cv-165 that the CDC has rescinded its Covid Testing Order for International Travel. On February 23rd, 2022 I sued Joe Biden, CDC, US Department of Transportation, others, over the illegal Mask Mandates on Airlines, at Airports, Covid Testing for Travel, Violating liberties...in the U.S. District Court, Western District of Michigan. Following a decision by a Federal Judge in Florida voiding the US Govt mask mandates on planes, I reached an agreement with the US Government to dismiss my claims seeking to void illegal Mask Mandates on Airlines, at Airports, public transportation and to pursue claims to asking the court to dismiss the Covid Testing Order for International Travel as unconstitutional. The CDC Attorneys have just informed me that the CDC has rescinded this requirement. Americans returning back home will no longer be subjected to this unconstitutional requirement. This should never have happened. Austin Chenge, US Veteran and Former Republican Governor Candidate for Michigan.

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: You’re fired, Liz
body:
This will be the most important race in the entire country... |
Peter,

Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to "bring it."

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign to FIRE Liz Cheney.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise millions for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a 60 Minutes interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney.

[**Will you help me stand up with an urgently needed donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party... and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was duped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today? I'll be honest, her LIBERAL big money backers are putting millions of dollars into her campaign right. Without your help, I don't stand a chance.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the _American_ people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need: yours.**

[**Will you make an donation today to show President Trump that you're still a part of his MAGA-America First Movement?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing for good.**

[**So please, won't you ensure that Liz Cheney bury me, a true conservative, with money from her swampy elite friends?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60562991:6DYwrFoNB:m:1:3317145305:EF1726A101135BF28054606182AB5E4B:r)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

P.S. It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Faceboo
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z37s5numqhlar333rtd3c682a9be1is3425o4q1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65splcthj1cb3c9o72orgm5rj4obledgnepjlc8on3chmehom8tr1cgprfcbme8rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phimsqr1ptie5j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Friend. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsu6dsab3bndqqqcuratusq2ghm7k6ke05p78mp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3r15luhmg4i9g90ngogbdjoqd023oqmglhp1a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs "Fight for Freedom")
---

P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help.

---

---

---
| _A personal note from Ron Johnson:_

Thank you for standing strong with me, Friend. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it’s just one more step towards destroying Trump’s Legacy.

So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. **[Please click here to donate now](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm1bkrubdd7qqpjinri103r9sv4mqq5aoot6ttm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs "Please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for being a patriot,

Ron Johnson

Fellow Conservative, We’re nearly halfway through 2022 and it’s safe to say this year has already put President Biden in the history books...and not in a good way. Since Day 1 of his administration, Biden’s policies have been an undeniable disaster. Our economy is suffering, gas prices are reaching record highs, and he’s signed into law every big-spending bill that Congress has put on his desk. And Biden and his allies in Congress will do ANYTHING--except govern responsibly--to remain in power. They have tried multiple times to rig election laws in their favor:
* Biden tried to eliminate voter ID.
* Biden tried to mandate ballot trafficking.
* Biden tried to fund political campaigns with taxpayer dollars.

_That’s why Heritage Action has worked ALL year --this year, and last year-- to save our election laws. We stopped Biden's takeover of our elections. And we also helped governors improve election integrity in their states._ _But we’re not done yet! _ **_Now, our hard work is paying off. Our supporters are excited for what’s in store for the second half of this year ...That’s why I’m writing to you today with some exciting news!_** **A generous donor, inspired by our work, has given $100,000 to ensure election laws are enforced by training poll watchers and poll workers. And they are challenging you to double your reach and match their gift. With $200,000 raised, you’ll have 2X the impact. This is a great way to start off the second half of 2022!** Heritage Action is training thousands upon thousands of election workers. They’ll know their rights and duties as election workers so they can effectively serve. Because every American deserves to know that their vote counts! We always knew that improving state election laws was only one half the battle. To really make a difference, we need to stay involved and ensure election laws are properly enforced. And this can only be done with a trained army of grassroots volunteers. But we need YOUR help to make sure we can get that first $100k. Can you chip in now?
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zes26jsillfkb5f3h08fculr09gtc0489q70oalo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8tjhehhm6dj16kp62pti6dqe8o3n6ep73d36mjjr9db4moqe8t726hp30s3km3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddksup32phh6ipm0ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfpm6hbjkt2gc10bnge301fi7fugnj2abqs6ogg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0eh6hhq56gh8e7rt6bu3ee7m4p87kf2uo81rapg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc7vfa8tilpu194bsjrpmkautlteip33f98gsm3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: My daughter is not going to compete against a transgender boy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullin for America
body:
I’m doing this for her and all female athletes.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z70gnn50iiqlpatpdlegpb5odmovud3gtp3mtn7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpm4db1c5g77d32c1gmdd34mirr7d3kcmoj6o70emr66clmekqb4t36ccpjbcrn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj35dplm3jr4sb661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgm9ob4cdi6coh5u)

|
---
| | | This is Markwayne Mullin. And this is my daughter Larra.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkcgep2qcl0ocpq3kctv392ie2sesfal8bha07tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4cph2bs)
---
Larra is a state champion wrestler. And right now, she is able to be so successful because she plays on an equal playing field.

_**She doesn 't have to compete against transgender boys. **_

Fellow Conservative, as a dad of girls who play contact sports, the nonsense that's going on right now is sickening. Seeing girls stripped of medals and opportunities to be in competitions because a biological male took their place is beyond disturbing to me.

I'm not going to sit back and worry if my daughter has to compete against a transgender boy. I'm taking action now. **[Are you with me?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbnfa0mih65hfpbt14ad83lqbo4ti51d34lh8858_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4cph2bs)**

---
| | [STAND FOR GIRLS IN SPORTS](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs4cp1qih635svam03hcan9qjavkdr6afllmtsfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4cph2bs)
---

If we work together to stop this madness, we can protect the integrity of girls' sports and ensure an equal playing field for all athletes. I need everyone who gets this email to stand with us - and for our girls.

The Radical Left doesn't want us to win. They're set on eradicating all fairness in sports because it fits with their "woke" mission. And they certainly don't want someone like me fighting for girls' sports... because I never back down from a fight.

**Please Fellow Conservative, join me today.**

---

God bless America,
Larra's proud dad
Markwayne Mullin

name: Tim Scott
subject: I know how much $5 is.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5abaf5v2rurofvtbrfghbdpsf7h6bsb2rjk7d9g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1d72edq3ed9mctjrat1nm9h6bc5i6mrr6tbjmljr4oljc9p76pjl69i78c35curt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8q6ccln6moefcjhcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdim2p71chhm8p324no)

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 is a lot.

It was a lot for me growing up. I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

**I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $5 to make sure we beat our goal.

---
| | | [Chip in $5](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvsu4on4nvv6v2uv12h3nqrpqg6ujhabs98sno0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4chh2bs)
---

Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you.

-Tim
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7f65hm5kf051lm1et8745sqcqk6lsmhhvsj91go_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4chh2bs)
---
| Friend, although $5 doesn't sound like much, it goes further than you may think. Your gift would mean so much to me in our push to take back the Senate Majority.

_**I know we have been asking a lot lately, but[$5 would go a long way to make sure we keep our momentum heading into November.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkovbm4kdiee7ckfsb73un7tua66lc533acfnug_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4chh2bs) **_
---
| | | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z48ub4ma65g7g8qegu6j27nb7c2ebnd4geo84358_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4chh2bs)
---
_I understand the value of a dollar, that is why I am humbly asking for your support:_**[Can you chip in to help us take back the SINGLE seat we need?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbvh8m4h5j68h3fudcakjfd85u2rd6qd7cbkms1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm8or4chh2bs) **

_Thank you for standing with us._
---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

clean_body: I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 | | | | Friend, I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 is a lot. It was a lot for me growing up. I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $5 to make sure we beat our goal. | | | Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you. -Tim | | | | Friend, although $5 doesn't sound like much, it goes further than you may think. Your gift would mean so much to me in our push to take back the Senate Majority. I know we have been asking a lot lately, but | | | I understand the value of a dollar, that is why I am humbly asking for your support: ** Thank you for standing with us. | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg7f9ag43m27q86krlf8k37m71tk4l5f9dohruro_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgmeo32c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqeco9jmepb7cphmmrj8p34muqb6tr1e8pb5dlksjg74phgc5om9d9lmkqj8c9gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj35dplmkrrcoj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq6eu9smf4i8d9os61j1ngfsevgicfjm1grec2f0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgmeo32c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2s6hbfgui5lo95a69s40t2oijltdofdq3qrfq80_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgmeo32c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z235jup7egsamjoehp8g3t55nulinh4i520ec590_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgmeo32c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Katie Arrington
subject: Help me FIRE The Liz Cheney of the South!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE FOR CONGRESS
body:
President Trump: “Nancy Mace is a Nasty RINO”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkunhc3e0veeiolt9lfclkh2apo1af2l5amr45q0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6ob3m1rb4djj6kqmapj5eaq38c3heqpraspk61p69d9m6dq61ptmmsrrddhimsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddksup30pjmc2pm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim2p71c3ge4p724no)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z455vl3u4l6tnsadpghco60f48dnd2b1f2u1c268_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
| | |

Fellow Patriot,
My name is Katie Arrington, and I’m a Trump-endorsed, America First warrior who’s fighting to Drain the Swamp by:
**FIRING “The Liz Cheney of the South” – “Nasty” Nancy Mace!** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zppqtusnf4q1pbk60ep70b64s5uu5fm72c2spl5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) But with only a couple days to go before Tuesday’s primary showdown, I’m neck-and-neck in the polls with my opponent – **the back-stabbing RINO turncoat who voted to impeach President Trump.**
I’m reaching out to you, as a fellow, freedom-loving patriot, to urge you to [make a generous gift to support my campaign which will help push me past the finish line next week](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1vikeffr4n3psk9ahsvfbeo5jn7juomk8p35hu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs).
Friend, next Tuesday, June 14th isn’t just the date of my primary election...it’s also the birthday of our great 45th President, Donald J. Trump!
**[So, I urge you to join me in giving President Trump the perfect present by helping me FIRE RINO Swamp Creature – “Nasty” Nancy Mace.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl7oeeth8v8klud8rtc6o12ghphuvp97o1o9e7d8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)**
_[Your gift will help cover the cost of my powerful ads](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hepn09fmsfhqd7kele73kkl8v2i186jhmrru4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) that are crucial to allowing me to reach voters with my conservative message before Tuesday’s primary!_ | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo8gjb30vbmtj40lk3h5e7ic28iivf1amejvacsg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
| | [Fire “Nasty” Nancy Mace!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd9larjg8s399nq4oj1adam970o2r7p9ks25ud78_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
I know you agree that the American people deserve a true conservative fighter in Congress, **NOT a Trump-bashing “turncoat” like “Nasty” Nancy.**

That’s why, as an America First warrior, I promise you that I’ll fight to clean house in the DC Swamp, starting with:
* **Firing Fauci** ,

* **Abolishing the CRT-infested Department of Education** , AND

* **Opening Hunter Biden’s laptop!**

“Nasty” Nancy holds a three-to-one fundraising advantage over me thanks to her wealthy DC Establishment pals.

But the bad news for her is that I punch well above my weight!

I don’t need to match Nancy dollar-for-dollar, but [I do need help closing the gap](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcevdn3qedusebebqgt7jvgfps2iu5kf2ve0rong_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs).

**[So, I hope you’ll join President Trump in supporting my campaign to FIRE “Nasty” Nancy Mace on Tuesday by making your best gift right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze28rhu4fcguhqmps1pl5koh07u4jugtflbnjht0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)**
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlk1gr32rnspsrdnq3l623acpp7f4h71kjdin8sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
| | [Fire “Nasty” Nancy Mace!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmu2e84nbcopfi7310vgpqmgac8qm6h3tjmo1l40_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
_[Remember, your gift will be help cover the cost of my hard-hitting ads](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc15lp6jporvbba07r29j4bk6f9lt6jc255r6j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) that are critical to spreading my conservative message before Tuesday’s primary!_

Thank you in advance for your generous support!

May God bless you, and God bless the United States of America,

Katie Arrington
Candidate for Congress

| | [Help Me Fire Trump-Hating RINO
“Nasty” Nancy Mace!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4l5hh820uf953hqabuug64amu9l7870ln714n78_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---

PAID FOR BY KATIE FOR CONGRESS

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
