name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlot8lpb9pu5rkkt1an2qpv2hkdsmplu9fjg83h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onm6mrb6tbnm6qr0o5m6koj8d1ge5ie1o5nclr3ecrlmpgb8cth66q3cs70euob1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74d366arjbd37mth6cclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpjqs0t6htvnjqobdr0gllcvtje3rohqcq9nt5ng_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z62mlvhs45tgkt0h5cin8nct3fhffahbi5s3mu10_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zka4cip3g57ak2g4po43oreh91dq7gtc1epv6rig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za4gjkfnt56qnhg1nv0dtmc9d52m4hdck0cl8fp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country -- along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots -- believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkqa7u5ksfmq8or7tafmiplsa2gg0m4a7vng42rg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone -- bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas -- paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we’ll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z867rt8huc7tals2vjsaksa3hh7k9l6540jttaf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znl45jghul62aj0qippcca3r7j85uu4agf5mdp48_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3ggeokgieu7a1d25qd2o00aj5e66df2sqfcq968_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America! For America, Mark Meckler President Convention of States Action
---
Paid for by Convention of States Action
---
5850 San Felipe
Suite 580A
Houston, TX 77057
---

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7pbt5gvgij7ar560k6vaprkeanh664kh75oilp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjgm1o72cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Friend, I know we send you a lot of emails, but I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why.

Running a statewide campaign to defeat a guy like Ron DeSantis isn’t easy, and it certainly isn’t cheap.

We’ve got to compete with him for TV air-time, but he’s got billionaires funding his campaign, so it costs a lot to make sure our message stays on the air.

Not to mention, we need to fund a statewide voter mobilization effort, and we need to make sure we reach voters in every single corner of Florida to make sure everyone knows the stakes in this election.

That’s why we email you so much — without your support, we’ll have to cut back on some of these critical voter outreach efforts. **_And in a race that’s sure to be as close as this one, we simply can’t afford to hold anything back._**

**_[Please, donate whatever you can right now to power this campaign all the way to a November victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46388898/350054607/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220611_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjkxMWMxMS04NWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPPRxdTw50M_69SDwp0Q6QPe8SlOSg4crznYMHoW9SE=)_**

clean_body: | | | | = Friend, I know we send you a lot of emails, but I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why. Running a statewide campaign to defeat a guy like Ron DeSantis isn’t easy, and it certainly isn’t cheap. We’ve got to compete with him for TV air-time, but he’s got billionaires funding his campaign, so it costs a lot to make sure our message stays on the air. Not to mention, we need to fund a statewide voter mobilization effort, and we need to make sure we reach voters in every single corner of Florida to make sure everyone knows the stakes in this election. That’s why we email you so much — without your support, we’ll have to cut back on some of these critical voter outreach efforts. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: taking Chuck Grassley to a gun range
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46389123/350056324/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzNiYjQ3Ni04NmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUEslOm4IouYqWBo6HYLINb_ENth4xzU1GQa40EMmFg=&emci=71728ec3-fbe8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=273bb476-86e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46389124/350056326/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzNiYjQ3Ni04NmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUEslOm4IouYqWBo6HYLINb_ENth4xzU1GQa40EMmFg=&emci=71728ec3-fbe8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=273bb476-86e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Last week, my opponent Chuck Grassley told voters at a town hall that he doesn’t “know much about guns.” He said he hasn’t shot one in twenty, forty, or even fifty years. But he won’t support any new federal gun laws.
As a three-star admiral who served 36 years in the U.S. Navy, I __do__ know quite a bit about guns... and I can tell you unequivocally that firearms like the AR-15 are weapons of war.
Senator Grassley, you've taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from the gun lobby. Just a few weeks ago, they named you Legislator of the Year. Because days after 4 more kids were murdered in Oxford, Michigan, you stood up in the Senate and you blocked a bill requiring universal background checks.
You have no idea what an assault rifle is capable of. How powerful it is. How deadly accurate it is. What it does to a body. Yet you think any 18 year old should be able to walk into a gun show and buy one from a private seller, no questions asked.
**Here’s my challenge to Senator Chuck Grassley: Come to a gun range with me.**
Pull the trigger of an AR-15. Feel the power. Watch what it does to a hard cantaloupe. See how fast you can shoot 30 rounds and reload another 30-round magazine with just a bit of practice.
See how it shoots through doors, most body armor, even plaster walls. How that little itsy bullet flies along without a conscience for over a mile... and if your sight isn’t faulty, will kill a person accurately from 800 yards away.
**_Then_ tell me you don't agree with 90% of Americans that Congress needs to pass responsible gun ownership laws so we can finally stop these mass killings.**
I know these guns. I know why they don't belong in our communities. And before Chuck Grassley once again blocks a bill requiring even just a background check to buy one, he needs to see for himself what they’re capable of.
No cameras. No press. Just name the time and place.
Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Here's what you should know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
This has been a busy week for my reelection team, Peter.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46389712/350058474/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmJkZDEyMy04N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQCWPhell4vK-4aeBXTmuvNGZuuEfeMSX0ZfS8VR7zA=)
---
This has been a busy week for my reelection team, Peter. As one of my top supporters, there are three things you NEED to know:
1\. The GOP is fighting tooth and nail to flip every state red this November, including New Mexico.

2\. The GOP just picked my opponent, and he's an anti-choice radical with no experience in public service – just like Donald Trump.

**3. ****I'm falling 23% short of my fundraising goal today, and I need your help to make up the difference.**
| | [Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46389713/350058475/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmJkZDEyMy04N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQCWPhell4vK-4aeBXTmuvNGZuuEfeMSX0ZfS8VR7zA=)

| | | | | **The New York League of Conservation Voters Endorses Letitia James!**
---

Peter, did you see the news? **The New York League of Conservation Voters (NYLCV) officially endorsed my re-election campaign for attorney general!**

I’m honored to receive an endorsement from such an important organization. For decades, New Yorkers have seen big corporations and polluters use our communities as their dumping grounds – but enough is enough.

**Peter, the pollution that our communities face _is_ __ a public health crisis – and that’s why I’ve gone to bat against polluters time and time again.****** From suing New York City bus companies for their reckless pollution to holding corporations accountable for leaking toxins into New York’s water systems, I vow to never stop fighting for a cleaner and healthier state and planet.

Friend,

The Fake News media machine is inspiring violent criminals to make assassination attempts against Justice Brett Kavanaugh.

And now CNN is trying to cover it up.

[_**Help the Media Research Center (MRC) FIGHT BACK against the Fake News media, expose the truth about CNN, and spread the truth by donating any amount here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfk453umq0t8jj8jhsc0885lmti3omigg4trrpo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjim4ob1cjh2bs)

This is an unspeakable act of treason against the Supreme Court, our Constitution, and the United States. **Here 's the full story: **

> **FIRST** : When President Trump nominated Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, the Fake News media and leftwing establishment did everything in their power to stop his confirmation. They lied and accused him of sexual misconduct and even rape.
>
> Ultimately, the Media Research Center exposed the liars in the Fake News media, the truth prevailed, and Justice Kavanaugh now sits on the Supreme Court.
>
> However, the media stirred up anger from the radical left like we've never seen before. Justice Kavanaugh received death threats and the SICK liars in the media are directly responsible for putting Kavanaugh and his family's life in danger.
>
> **NEXT** : As MRC predicted, the media created so much hatred against Brett Kavanaugh that it inspired a man to conduct a failed assasination attempt against the Supreme Court Justice.
>
> The would-be assassin arrived near Justice Kavanaugh's house at 1:00 am. U.S. Marshalls detained him and found a handgun, knife, duct tape, zip ties, pepper spray, and other tools in his suitcase... It's possible this deranged man had plans to potentially kidnap and even torture Justice Kavanaugh.
>
> 🚨**NOW** : CNN's Whitney Wild is claiming the man "didn't have a firearm" and that "right-wing extremists" are to blame... 🚨
>
CNN is outright lying to the American people about what's happening. Justice Kavanaugh was targeted by a left-wing extremist who, according to the criminal complaint, wanted to prevent the Justice from casting a deciding vote in a Second Amendment case.

MRC is mobilizing our team to hold the media accountable for this assassination attempt and ensure the American people know the TRUTH! Not CNN's lies.

Please help us expose CNN's lies and spread the truth by making a donation to the Media Research Center today: The Media Research Center is the only conservative organization dedicated to holding the left-wing media accountable for their actions. Here 's the ugly truth: The Fake News empire employs liars, propagandists, cheaters, and socialists... But they are smart. I never like to compliment the Fake News industry. But you and I should never underestimate the enemies of freedom. Imagine if a left-wing Justice had been targeted? This would be front and center on all media outlets, and the left would be having a total meltdown. CNN is willing to lie about anything to drive their narrative, elect their preferred candidates, and erode our liberties and culture. Fortunately, the Media Research Center has become a MASTER of destroying the careers of Fake News liars at CNN. We successfully mounted a pressure campaign to FIRE Chris Cuomo from CNN for covering up his brother's, NY Gov. Andrew Cuomo, sex scandal. And we WON! You and I can do it again. Help me expose the Fake News media's responsibility for this horrific assassination attempt AND show the world how CNN is trying to cover up the assassination attempt by calling it "right-wing." As you can see, the Fake News media is dangerous. Their lies are inspiring rioters and now assassins. You and I cannot allow these radicals to win the culture war and dominate the news. Let's fight back. You have an opportunity to STRIKE and expose the truth about CNN to the world. Justice Brett Kavanaugh is a great man who did not deserve the media hack job on his life, career, and family. Now, he's forced to live in fear for his life and the lives of his family members because the Fake News media has radicalized hoards of left-wing activists and Antifa members. Help me put an end to this madness. The Media Research Center is fighting back, and it would be an honor to earn your support and have you join our team. name: Great America Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6030%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=rJ5GzZQGyOmJHGyZVHu2wQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62463%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W5VY7NdCSUvkDGYvhmv4mw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62464%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oe9rUQPofZAPThI6gwjzLg&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62475%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r7jXgki%2bbKup0z46tGAOhg&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62464%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oe9rUQPofZAPThI6gwjzLg&sysid=1)**
---

name: Kat Cammack
subject: I hope you take a second to read this.
body:
We have a major fight on our hands this year.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y5cP87-i39iElBWOXY1mLF-jwbyj5QcdfN7DfBlGZv2Qor9D9c8qSJsXTSZQWJ05kM4LbJp6rkTyUSyCRnXWZzozuouwQA03S4Z-KUYR9dEPZdGu8-_G5DhtVLq_4zKPRgXWbYte2vv28Cuc9Ft-Cl3gAs9beIZ4UmKuQI2zld-X8cBDrF9EEaTqRFV0Momf68PK_bumatmI2p8N9fhe9Gq8KSj5Q-uqryGzVo3i96s=&c=irMTqqIVr_m54LyzDDfNJl1CkbucUul_AUrRdntwDQPpIjVpCetA-A==&ch=UDEBabg9Bq49oixcQA9ZLrrxylqcanB6St1TQct7qk0VV7vEJZtGyw==)
---
| Friend
We have a major fight on our hands this year. The Radical Left thinks we are beaten down and giving up. They believe they can have even more power and control over your life, and continue to push for socialist policies that strip YOU of your freedom.
But I am not giving up the fight. Along with many proud conservative fighters, I am ready to go on offense and take back the majority for the Republicans. It's not enough that we're beating back the leftist policies coming out of the Biden White House, we need a proud, America-First majority in Congress that will protect and defend our freedom.
The Democrats might have the D.C. elites, and they might have dark-money Super-PACs. But what they don't have is grit.
I know what it's like to work hard and operate a family farm. Our district is full of people who do backbreaking work on a daily basis that the elites take for granted. They will never understand what it takes to live the American dream here in Central Florida, yet they want even MORE control of your life than ever before. And with the price of gas and other basic goods skyrocketing, with no sign of slowing up, they've put us on a path toward a recession that will be tough to overcome for many Americans.
We have a real opportunity to get America back on track. It's going to take real fighters with grit to take on the Radical Left - and I want to be that fighter. We're facing an uphill battle, but I'm confident that with you on my team, we can accomplish anything.
So please, I'm humbly asking you to [donate to my campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y5cP87-i39iElBWOXY1mLF-jwbyj5QcdfN7DfBlGZv2Qor9D9c8qSJsXTSZQWJ05kM4LbJp6rkTyUSyCRnXWZzozuouwQA03S4Z-KUYR9dEPZdGu8-_G5DhtVLq_4zKPRgXWbYte2vv28Cuc9Ft-Cl3gAs9beIZ4UmKuQI2zld-X8cBDrF9EEaTqRFV0Momf68PK_bumatmI2p8N9fhe9Gq8KSj5Q-uqryGzVo3i96s=&c=irMTqqIVr_m54LyzDDfNJl1CkbucUul_AUrRdntwDQPpIjVpCetA-A==&ch=UDEBabg9Bq49oixcQA9ZLrrxylqcanB6St1TQct7qk0VV7vEJZtGyw==) so that we can have the resources needed to take back a Republican majority and go on offense with an America-First agenda next year.
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Liz Cheney needs to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter:

It's never been more critical that the America First movement fire Liz Cheney.

Liz Cheney didn't just impeach Donald Trump.

**Liz Cheney played a starring role in Nancy Pelosi's January 6 Committee's Soviet-style show trial.**

With the help of one of the fake news media's top hatchet men, Cheney, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the Trump haters, TV staged managed a primetime Hollywood show full of deceptively edited, out-of-context, and misleading video.

_And Liz Cheney and the rest of the Democrats made it clear their goal is not just to block Donald Trump from running for re-election in 2024_...

... Their goal is to smear you and the other 74,000,000 Trump voters as domestic terrorists and lock up anyone that questions the 2020 election or opposes the Biden regime.

**Liz Cheney is facing a primary on August 16.**

I need your help to rally the America First movement to fire Liz Cheney from Congress and kick her out of the GOP.

**[Will you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 to help me defeat Liz Cheney](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60310709:sXnxo6hNb:m:1:2365227053:1C0B5827FF57474A51A0E135A75601E6:r)?** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60310709:sXnxo6hNb:m:1:2365227053:1C0B5827FF57474A51A0E135A75601E6:r) **The stakes are simple.**

If Liz Cheney remains in Congress, the witch hunt against Donald Trump will drag on.

And if there is one thing Liz Cheney excels at, it is waging an endless war.

Liz Cheney even wants to run for president in 2024.

**Liz Cheney proved that by helping run the January 6 witch hunt, her loyalty is to the D.C. swamp and Nancy Pelosi.**

That's why I'm asking for your help to rally the America First movement to fire Liz Cheney and end the witch hunt against President Trump and his supporters.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60310709:sXnxo6hNb:m:1:2365227053:1C0B5827FF57474A51A0E135A75601E6:r).**
[_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIRE LIZ CHENEY
CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60310709:sXnxo6hNb:m:1:2365227053:1C0B5827FF57474A51A0E135A75601E6:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

subject: Love is love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://secure
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46395356/350082686/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQzY2U0My04ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pe_1ybHy9Tr9F09eVTXTI3O0wI4Mnx7xWARxBIgQBr0=&emci=69d924c7-f0e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=7fd3ce43-8fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, Pride month is an important time for me. Before I became involved in politics as a candidate, I discovered my passion for advocacy and progressive values as a leader in my church. It was there I saw the institutional barriers members of the LGBTQ+ community face to be full-fledged members of their faith communities, and became determined to make sure that my church was a beacon of inclusivity, tolerance, and love. For years I led a ministry, which eventually grew into a statewide initiative, focused on how to engage congregations in conversations about LGBTQ+ equality and understanding. In 2019, I found myself the only lay-person at a table with our bishop and a group of progressive pastors, envisioning the future of my denomination. It is not an exaggeration to say: _I would not be here today without the friends I made advocating for LGBTQ+ rights nearly eight years ago._ **I am proud to call myself an ally.** I believe that love is love, and that all of us—in our places of worship and elsewhere—must strive to put our values into practice, not just words. Now more than ever, we must stand shoulder to shoulder and speak from the heart to defeat bigotry in our country. Whether in my church, in my community, or on the steps of the Capitol, I will never stop fighting for equality and the freedom to be and express who each of us was made to be. With your help, we can kick Wagner out and fight for the solutions we know are needed to protect our children. Sincerely, **P.S. **_**[Rep. Ann Wagner is staunchly opposed to marriage equality and LGBTQ+ rights, as evidenced by her positive rating from anti-equality hate groups like the Family Research Council. clean_body: Peter, Pride month is an important time for me. Before I became involved in politics as a candidate, I discovered my passion for advocacy and progressive values as a leader in my church. It was there I saw the institutional barriers members of the LGBTQ+ community face to be full-fledged members of their faith communities, and became determined to make sure that my church was a beacon of inclusivity, tolerance, and love. For years I led a ministry, which eventually grew into a statewide initiative, focused on how to engage congregations in conversations about LGBTQ+ equality and understanding. In 2019, I found myself the only lay-person at a table with our bishop and a group of progressive pastors, envisioning the future of my denomination. It is not an exaggeration to say: I would not be here today without the friends I made advocating for LGBTQ+ rights nearly eight years ago. I am proud to call myself an ally. I believe that love is love, and that all of us—in our places of worship and elsewhere—must strive to put our values into practice, not just words. Now more than ever, we must stand shoulder to shoulder and speak from the heart to defeat bigotry in our country. Whether in my church, in my community, or on the steps of the Capitol, I will never stop fighting for equality and the freedom to be and express who each of us was made to be. With your help, we can kick Wagner out and fight for the solutions we know are needed to protect our children. Sincerely, P.S. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
subject: I didn’t know you were a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have bad news. You’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2 year support streak.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsffvfend9mthvolttkspqgm2qvngblpqknbcg7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn6d32morb2c3ge5on5cjkmkrmedr5e4orec5heerr5dlimaqe0o73mdp67d1gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj35d5lmdjrcor666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgm9pb3c1j6aoh5u)

| |
---
| | |
Fellow Conservative,

**I have bad news. You 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have broken a 2-year support streak.**

I am so disappointed. You seemed like such a great Republican supporter. And now that Republicans are on the verge of winning back the House Majority, we need you more than ever.

**[Will you renew for 2022 and become a Sustaining Member of our Republican team one more time? | | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/32ab95e395ee31d9/5587e6b17b8218dbc3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
Peter, _**Biden's border crisis is the worst in history.**_ Human trafficking, fentanyl, and violent gangs are flooding our southern border. _But no border visit from Biden. No primetime hearing from Democrats._ _**As your Congresswoman, I will fight to reinstitute the tough and effective Trump-era policies to stop the flow of drugs and crime into our community.**_
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/32ab95e395ee31d9/a5ad029970200c53c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
**You deserve a leader who will never compromise our Republican values and _put America First_. ** **✅ Complete Trump's Border Wall** **✅ Oppose Amnesty for Illegal Immigrants** **✅ Fully Fund Ice and Border Patrol Agents** **✅ Re-Enact the Remain In Mexico Program** **✅ End Biden's Catch-And-Release Scheme** **I need your help, support, and vote.** Early voting is open every day except Sundays through June 18th, and Primary Election Day is Tuesday, June 21st. [Early voting details are listed on my website here.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/32ab95e395ee31d9/fc38cf5db9f3d02ac3d6b838967d376c/40203)[](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/32ab95e395ee31d9/8d9bf87a28f01f82c3d6b838967d376c/40203) Please share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors. Together, we can bring America First values back to Washington, DC, and take back our country. God bless,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress

clean_body: Human trafficking, fentanyl, and violent gangs are flooding our southern border. | | | Peter, Biden's border crisis is the worst in history. Human trafficking, fentanyl, and violent gangs are flooding our southern border. But no border visit from Biden. No primetime hearing from Democrats. As your Congresswoman, I will fight to reinstitute the tough and effective Trump-era policies to stop the flow of drugs and crime into our community. You deserve a leader who will never compromise our Republican values and put America First. ✅ Complete Trump's Border Wall ✅ Oppose Amnesty for Illegal Immigrants ✅ Fully Fund Ice and Border Patrol Agents ✅ Re-Enact the Remain In Mexico Program ✅ End Biden's Catch-And-Release Scheme I need your help, support, and vote. Early voting is open every day except Sundays through June 18th, and Primary Election Day is Tuesday, June 21st. Please share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors. Together, we can bring America First values back to Washington, DC, and take back our country. God bless, | | | | | Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress | | | ---|---|--- | |

name: Ryan Kelley for Governor
subject: They sent the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563976:65iv2FoNj:m:1:3253819041:C539B0CCD1B8B7EDBE52C9D4C3461396:r)
---
| | Peter, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. That's ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I_ _need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563976:65iv2FoNj:m:1:3253819041:C539B0CCD1B8B7EDBE52C9D4C3461396:r) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563976:65iv2FoNj:m:1:3253819041:C539B0CCD1B8B7EDBE52C9D4C3461396:r)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563976:65iv2FoNj:m:1:3253819041:C539B0CCD1B8B7EDBE52C9D4C3461396:r)
---
Ryan D. Kelley,
Political prisoner and candidate for Governor.

Team, Bernie tore into the GOP and sent out a rallying call for all Democrats:

BERNIE SANDERS: THE REPUBLICAN PARTY TODAY IS AN ANTI-DEMOCRACY PARTY. WE CANNOT ALLOW THEM TO SUCCEED

The new American right will stop at nothing to regain power, from gutting voting rights to chipping away at democracy itself. And Trump is leading the charge.

We still have time to stop them. But only if every single Democrat reading this pitches in to protect democracy and stop violent extremists from taking over our elections! That’s why we need a strong grassroots movement to help advance our Democratic agenda. We need you in our ranks!

You can stop this plot to undermine democracy. Every dollar donated towards our mid-month deadline will help elect pro-democracy Secretaries.

Will you take a stand to protect elections? Rush $5 or more right now to help hit our Mid-Month $15,000 goal and elect pro-voter Secretaries of State! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june22?refcode=EM_FR_061122_B1_Bernie-DASS_30AC_RS&amount=5]

name: Eric (personal)
subject: FWD: 41 mass shootings since Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
We can no longer afford to wait for Republicans to have a change of heart.
I wanted to make sure you saw this. Since sending this email,**the number of mass shootings since the tragedy in Uvalde has risen to 41.** Despite this, 202 of my Republican colleagues in the House voted no on the Protecting Our Kids Act, which could prevent this violence in the future.
I’m on my way to the Walnut Creek March for Our Lives to stand with youth activists, parents, and community leaders, so I will keep this quick: [**_We need your help to hold Republicans accountable for their inaction._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46398266/350093029/463182889?refcode=E16157-20220611-FWDsinceuvalde-SL-GunViolence-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUzOTA0NC05M2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6j9sLDcAqsXnRvl4sm83t7PHE29-voD_RxZHhRKTRU=)
**We’re short of our $10,000 goal and need 276 more folks to chip in to make this happen. Can you join us, team?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-June2022-FR-June](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46398267/350093030/463182889?refcode=E16157-20220611-FWDsinceuvalde-SL-GunViolence-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUzOTA0NC05M2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6j9sLDcAqsXnRvl4sm83t7PHE29-voD_RxZHhRKTRU=)
— Eric

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Eric (personal)** <[info@email.ericswalwell.com](mailto:info@email.ericswalwell.com)>
Date: Sat, Jun 11, 2022 at 10:31 AM
Subject: (HTML VERSION): FWD: 38 mass shootings since Uvalde
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,
I’m writing you with a heartbreaking new statistic: almost every day since the tragedy in Uvalde, Texas, there has been a mass shooting in the United States. That’s 38 shootings in just over 2 weeks.
I’ve been working with my colleagues in the House to move Republican blockades against the gun reform we so desperately need. Still, their inaction speaks louder than their trite apologies and empty promises.
**We can no longer afford to wait for Republicans to have a change of heart. Every day, innocent lives are taken in preventable tragedies. We must act.**
Extremists in Congress who refuse popular, common-sense solutions — like an assault weapons ban, red flag laws, and increasing the legal age to buy a gun — are more vulnerable than they realize. _This November will be a referendum on Republican inaction on gun reform._
We’ve set a goal of raising an additional $10,000 in online, grassroots donations so we can continue this fight and we’re going to need your help. _We’re asking our gun-sense supporters to chip in $15, $25, or whatever they can afford so we can finally get this done.[**Can you rush a donation to help us fight these Republicans on the front lines in battleground states?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46398268/350093031/463182889?refcode=E16157-20220611-FWDsinceuvalde-SL-GunViolence-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUzOTA0NC05M2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6j9sLDcAqsXnRvl4sm83t7PHE29-voD_RxZHhRKTRU=)_
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-June2022-FR-June](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46398270/350093032/463182889?refcode=E16157-20220611-FWDsinceuvalde-SL-GunViolence-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGUzOTA0NC05M2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6j9sLDcAqsXnRvl4sm83t7PHE29-voD_RxZHhRKTRU=)

Eric

name: Courts Watch (via NDRC)
subject: A.G. Holder: Ron DeSantis was “actively trying to break” the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
His maps would be some of the most gerrymandered in the country.
|
---

---
Team,

First, a Florida judge BLOCKED the DeSantis gerrymandered congressional maps from going into effect, _and_ he ruled that plaintiffs were likely to succeed in their claim that the map diminishes Black voters’ power at the polls.

**But then, that decision was stayed, putting back into effect the DeSantis map for now – so the fight in Florida and around the country continues.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398184/350092715/1701009216?amount=20&refcode=20220524.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYjAyYjA1LTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7bQ1bNw6LfbH0DLKFrFV3_yTnmjMt4QiWFZ6lSH-nrY=)
---
The DeSantis Map is one of the most gerrymandered in the country. A.G. Holder put it best:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398187/350092718/1701009216?amount=20&refcode=20220524.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiYjAyYjA1LTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7bQ1bNw6LfbH0DLKFrFV3_yTnmjMt4QiWFZ6lSH-nrY=)

But then, that decision was stayed, putting back into effect the DeSantis map for now – so the fight in Florida and around the country continues. | = The DeSantis Map is one of the most gerrymandered in the country. A.G. Holder put it best: = This fight isn’t over, team. The NDRC and our affiliates are continuing to do everything we can to fight for fair maps across the country, but we’re counting on your support to keep it up. Will you pitch in anything you can right now to fuel our fight to end GOP gerrymandering nationwide? name: Matthew Van Name
subject: Saturday strategy
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
Earlier this week, we heard the news that Senator Annette Taddeo was dropping out of the race for Governor.
That means that this is now a two-person race. So, we want to share our strategy moving into the final, most critical months of the primary.
The last time we polled this race as a head to head between Nikki and Charlie Crist, Nikki jumped 7 points. When undecideds start breaking, we believe it’s closer to a 10-15 net gain.
That’s enough to break 50% and get to our win number.
Why? Because Democratic voters are largely decided on their opinion of Charlie Crist. They know him as a Republican governor and a three-time failed Republican, Independent, and Democratic statewide candidate.
We know that among Democrats, Nikki is seen as the more favorable candidate. We’re also seeing that play out on the ground. Nikki is the only candidate to win endorsements from Democratic Party caucuses, and these wins show undeniable grassroots momentum for our campaign.
However, we still need to get our message out — and that’s where you come in. We need to continue building our momentum and building our network of grassroots support. Will you chip in $20 today to help us out? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=611update]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=611update] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=611update] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=611update] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=611update] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=611update] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=611update]
Democrats want a winner, Peter, and we believe that as long as voters know there is a proven, qualified, new option to take on DeSantis — someone who has flipped a red seat by a million votes – they will flock to Nikki.
We still have a lot of work to do, but we know that Floridians can’t afford four more years of Ron DeSantis. And we know that Nikki is the ONLY person in this race who has what it takes to bring something new to Florida.
The dynamic of this race has changed, but our goals and our strategy are the same — to get out there, talk to Florida voters, and tell them the truth: that Nikki is the right candidate to meet this moment. If you’re with us, click here to chip in $20 and help us keep up our momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jun-2022?refcode=611update]
Thank you for being on our team.
Matthew Van Name

Here’s our strategy for the GOP primary:
1. Increase our local advertising and media budget to cut through the noise
2. Boost awareness and participation at our local events with flyers, signs, and digital ads
3. Expand our trusted network of Democrats online and offline

body:
Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399832/350100775/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)
Can I explain something, team? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399833/350100776/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=) In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399834/350100777/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=) And it’s true, I had never run for office before. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399835/350100778/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)
_Source: The New York Times_ But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399836/350100779/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)
_Source: The Denver Post_ So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399837/350100780/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=) I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399838/350100781/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399839/350100782/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=) But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear they have their sights set on Colorado. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399840/350100783/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=) To make matters worse, my team tells me we're $14,673 short of where we should be just 17 days before the Colorado GOP picks my general election opponent. **We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10, so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat?** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399841/350100784/335196137?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46399842/350100785/335196137?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQyNTAzYS05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O38JcvZqYLEujrAYBGHI3ITJe01IMMmKvHY04ImhJcU=)****

clean_body: Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” | = Can I explain something, team? = In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. = And it’s true, I had never run for office before. = Source: The New York Times But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. = Source: The Denver Post So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. = I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.= But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear they have their sights set on Colorado. = To make matters worse, my team tells me we're $14,673 short of where we should be just 17 days before the Colorado GOP picks my general election opponent. We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10, so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat? you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’m refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC or lobbyist money, so I mean it when I say I’m counting on your grassroots donation (and videos with Hick and his banjo) to fuel our campaign. = Thanks, Michael = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsmRfV6hfN

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history,
encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today,
only around one percent
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osmRfV6hfN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

World War
II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing
global fighting in unprecedented ways.

But
today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans
who fought in the war are still alive.

As we
lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the
living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons
learned from this world war.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The
Second World Wars." And right now, you can receive your very own
DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on
behalf of liberty.

This
limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military
historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and
strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the
Allies' victory.

This is
one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there
are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to
secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one
shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World
Wars" on DVD today:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars

Thank you
for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans
through education with Hillsdale College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

Last night’s hearing was a powerful opening statement that rivals those delivered by the nation’s best prosecutors. The January 6th Committee laid out what they will show over the coming weeks: that, as Liz Cheney summarized, _Trump “summoned the mob, assembled the mob, and lit the flame of this attack.”_

What led up to January 6th was a massive effort by Trump and his allies to convince the US population that the 2020 election was rigged, even though they knew it wasn’t.

While other officials resigned, **Elise Stefanik helped spread the Big Lie that led to a deadly attack on our Capitol and the law enforcement officers who bravely defended it.** As Officer Edwards testified last night: “It was carnage. It was chaos.”

Knowing her own involvement is perhaps why she is trying to discredit this bipartisan committee and distract the American people. As one of the Republicans’ main spokespeople, she can try to spin the facts and gaslight us, but **we know the truth.**

[_**Stefanik is a continued threat to our democracy and we must remove her from office by voting her out in November. I know we can do it together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46400178/350101628/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220611-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdmMTI4OC05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NfEXxE14HzGSoSUk9KY0aCG5J9AR9A4MhhZY2WCCZXc=)

Team,
Ever since Mondaire announced that he’s running in New York’s 10th Congressional District, the amount of grassroots support pouring in from New Yorkers has been incredible.
A new poll shows we are leading in the race for NY-10 by just ONE point over the very well-known former Mayor Bill de Blasio.
**[We can’t get complacent now, team. We have a lot of new ground to cover before the August 23 primary. Can we count on you to support our campaign with a donation of $3 or more? Your donation will help us confidently plan our next steps to grow our momentum, reach out to new potential voters, and keep Mondaire in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46400613/350104220/1401769761?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDBhZjMxMC05OGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oglSvXePlet9miJIrE1O9jVyGz73OZ3bYVJoaHKM8Uo=)**
We know Mondaire is the right leader for the people of New York’s 10th District. He’s a passionate fighter and a serious legislator with an actual record of delivering results.
But we’re going to need your help to compete with what’s to come.
**Over the next few weeks, we need to double down _fast_ on our voter outreach.** Our plans to introduce Mondaire to people who don't know him yet are going to cost a lot of money. And if we do it right, we can put Mondaire in the best position to win his upcoming re-election campaign. But we have to start right now.
**We can't afford to lose out on a single day of voter outreach if we want to ensure our momentum is strong enough to win in NY-10.**

name: Sen. Maggie Hassan (D - NH)
subject: I say "we"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
When I talk about 2016, and the first year I ran for Senate, I say "we." Here's why:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46400727/350104488/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk1090-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgwMzFlYi05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeEjyOYLEGeDEJqBEP0WDd_Ol9syYXmbb-lh91LNvdc=)
---
Hello,
When I talk about 2016, the first year I ran for Senate, I say "we." Here's why:

I say “we” flipped because no one wins by 1,017 votes on their own. My staff, volunteers, and family will tell you that after we won, I thanked them for the part they played in winning one of the closest Senate races in history. We truly wouldn’t have succeeded without them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46400728/350104489/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk1090-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgwMzFlYi05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeEjyOYLEGeDEJqBEP0WDd_Ol9syYXmbb-lh91LNvdc=)
If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, I would have lost.
Unbelievably, the stakes are higher now than they were six years ago. The most recent public poll shows me down by 2 points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ , are saying I have a difficult reelection fight ahead of me.

Knowing what the margins in my last race were, I can’t win – and protect Democrats’ Senate majority – without you. Yes, you, and our grassroots supporters.
It’s not hyperbole to say that this election could come down to what you do right now.**I hope I can count on you.**
**[_Please pitch in any amount to win in New Hampshire and stop Mitch McConnell from regaining a GOP majority in the Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46400729/350104490/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk1090-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzgwMzFlYi05N2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeEjyOYLEGeDEJqBEP0WDd_Ol9syYXmbb-lh91LNvdc=)**

clean_body: When I talk about 2016, and the first year I ran for Senate, I say "we." Here's why: | | | = Hello, When I talk about 2016, the first year I ran for Senate, I say "we." Here's why: I say “we” flipped because no one wins by 1,017 votes on their own. My staff, volunteers, and family will tell you that after we won, I thanked them for the part they played in winning one of the closest Senate races in history. We truly wouldn’t have succeeded without them. = If each and every person who helped by donating, knocking doors, or calling voters hadn’t done what they did for our campaign, I would have lost. Unbelievably, the stakes are higher now than they were six years ago. The most recent public poll shows me down by 2 points to an anti-choice opponent, and political experts from Rachel Maddow to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight , are saying I have a difficult reelection fight ahead of me. Knowing what the margins in my last race were, I can’t win – and protect Democrats’ Senate majority – without you. Yes, you, and our grassroots supporters. name: Team Casey
subject: Equal work deserves equal pay.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania's pay gap is worse than average, nearly 60 years later. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46402336/350109489/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWYzMDc2YS05YmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9XzPaSqtHJ2IlI1fqJf7OSqIllRGs8ikygohtZD-sA=&emci=fc9aa539-37e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=49f3076a-9be9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

It's been nearly 60 years today since the Equal Pay Act became law.

Forty-six years after that, the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act of 2009 was passed to fill the gaps.

But even with that progress, **American women today still only earn about 83 cents for every dollar made by a man working the same job.** In Pennsylvania, the average is even worse: just 79 cents on the dollar. And most workers don't even have access to the data they need to know whether they're being discriminated against.

Senator Casey co-sponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the Senate to hold employers accountable and make it harder for them to hide wage discrimination. But Senate Republicans voted to block it.

**[Will you join Bob in telling Senate Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and make pay equity a reality? Add your name now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46402337/350109490/23152406?ms=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&refcode=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&source=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Kx5lPzkN96282m2IjCddYkq%2FdjcuzIcEFnNJXLpkZ8VK%2BWBApwhMhimeHMSZZbhlyndypGc8qw8gw1rNf7ezc1s3qj3oJEEkVaM5eEi4FpyH76ieTXemYL8vvUGO9d2SKzUcnQJvN524OJ6lfGFHDwFbtLSeJ4oG%2BwjUta2oPTZ%2B4cwLaQrR35eWjXAt3Kq%2B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWYzMDc2YS05YmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9XzPaSqtHJ2IlI1fqJf7OSqIllRGs8ikygohtZD-sA=&emci=fc9aa539-37e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=49f3076a-9be9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

Pay discrimination of any kind is completely unacceptable.

It’s not only unfair and unjust to those who face discrimination -- it deprives families of vital income that can be used to feed children, buy or rent a home, and make our communities stronger.

None of us can afford to let wage discrimination continue. Help Bob ensure that the Paycheck Fairness Act can finally become law.

**[Add your name now, and tell Senate Republicans: "Stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and stop wage discrimination."](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46402338/350109492/23152406?ms=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&refcode=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&source=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220610_eqlpay_adv_gq_act___TC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Kx5lPzkN96282m2IjCddYkq%2FdjcuzIcEFnNJXLpkZ8VK%2BWBApwhMhimeHMSZZbhlyndypGc8qw8gw1rNf7ezc1s3qj3oJEEkVaM5eEi4FpyH76ieTXemYL8vvUGO9d2SKzUcnQJvN524OJ6lfGFHDwFbtLSeJ4oG%2BwjUta2oPTZ%2B4cwLaQrR35eWjXAt3Kq%2B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWYzMDc2YS05YmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9XzPaSqtHJ2IlI1fqJf7OSqIllRGs8ikygohtZD-sA=&emci=fc9aa539-37e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=49f3076a-9be9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

Thank you,

Team Casey

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h1334c9ducvv336t187ebkiff2bbdf10agit80_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6pj16kr67dpge8qbct9h65rj4ptgetge0tpncdoneoj6cqq79dbimcqb1cpgc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddksup72phlcaqr4ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim2p73chgmeob24no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu77bpaoqhu4864sbvolvohh0s0k0ub8jpqfuo78_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm8ob7c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjj4tt290h7l1ncfo401jtbsp66fbsb6jqug2kmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm8ob7c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zupqln0oll2560n6bpuoiffmj0l6fopij53oo2s0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm8ob7c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: devastating poll just released;
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, I’m stunned. name: American Action News
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlghgd4nhqfc366csp91s1i4q64m1mb6aegrltc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulpmeoll6grb8olk66p64p34mdom8slieorb3c3565j7fd9gmdrjeo5kmjj67c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmsqr9ptie9j30s5jcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5c5ie6oj6c9j649fg)
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvb6q91dbu9tiijpqqhj2mfkacslotpqp7b2euc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm4pj2cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo09qujh5kbcdkgjeaqoi8r5bkoglvq45kgvlha0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm4pj2cph2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq17rgucotlo5104vg6o6c5hi16rvrb8b78ho9mg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm4pj2cph2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjmam0cos0idks9rlgkk46nebtecq3hohqk8heo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhm4pj2cph2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Vote Early! Vote Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=panorama_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=panorama_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friends,
Remember that these next two saturdays are your last chance to vote early before election day on June 21st! You can find your polling location in Arlington [https://vote.arlingtonva.us/Early-Voting] , Alexandria [https://www.alexandriava.gov/news-citywide/2022-05-02/early-voting-begins-may-6-for-june-21-democratic-primary-election] , Falls Church [https://www.fallschurchva.gov/140/Polling-Locations] , or Fairfax County [https://www.fairfaxcounty.gov/elections/early-voting] .
http://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote [http://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote]
Instead of waiting until Election Day, perform your civic duty early and cast your ballot EARLY! Do not let the weather or any unexpected occurrences inhibit you from making your voice heard. After all, the United States continues to be created by the people, for the people.
You can visit my website [https://www.victoriaforcongress.com/vote] if you have any questions about early voting, the importance of voting, or if you simply have any questions about me.
Happy Voting!
Victoria
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=panorama_headshot [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=panorama_headshot]
EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ev1a_10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ev1a_25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=ev1a_50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=ev1a_100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=ev1b]

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46406683/350115196/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220611_progress&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220611_progress&refcode2=384b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfqSN-m488Jt3Y-CQNpc_ueILbBTDz8v_obpKCUH6VU=) **After 17 years of ineffective leadership for Nebraskans in the First Congressional District, our community has made it clear that it’s time to elect a new type of leader.** **We need someone who will build consensus and deliver real progress on paid family leave, voting rights, and the issues that matter to working families.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46406685/350115198/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220611_progress&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220611_progress&refcode2=384b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfqSN-m488Jt3Y-CQNpc_ueILbBTDz8v_obpKCUH6VU=)****We need a legislator who puts power back into the hands of Nebraskans by investing in health care, our public schools, and our state’s economic development.** **We need a CongressWOMAN who is ready to codify reproductive rights and protect our bodily autonomy on Day One.** **Patty Pansing Brooks is the leader our state needs. We can’t wake up on June 29th wishing we had done more – so we need to build our arsenal of grassroots power today.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46406687/350115200/333259033?amount=25&refcode=em_220611_progress&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220611_progress&refcode2=384b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfqSN-m488Jt3Y-CQNpc_ueILbBTDz8v_obpKCUH6VU=)**

clean_body: We can’t wake up on the 29th wishing we had done more to elect our district’s first congresswoman. Patty Pansing Brooks for Congress | | = After 17 years of ineffective leadership for Nebraskans in the First Congressional District, our community has made it clear that it’s time to elect a new type of leader. We need someone who will build consensus and deliver real progress on paid family leave, voting rights, and the issues that matter to working families. need a legislator who puts power back into the hands of Nebraskans by investing in health care, our public schools, and our state’s economic development. We need a CongressWOMAN who is ready to codify reproductive rights and protect our bodily autonomy on Day One. Patty Pansing Brooks is the leader our state needs. We can’t wake up on June 29th wishing we had done more – so we need to build our arsenal of grassroots power today. = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters.
