name: Dan Farough
subject: Encouraging signs
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,
You’re probably reading the same headlines I am. But I have some good news for you today. Let's look at Jocelyn's race.
Before I go any further - May was our best grassroots fundraising month, ever . More than 2,000 of you stepped up to make sure we can win this election in November. So don’t think for a second that you’re alone. This, more than anything, gives me hope. There is a powerful movement behind Jocelyn.
But besides your enthusiasm and support for Jocelyn’s campaign, there are other signs that tell me that things are looking up.
* Messaging on Choice: Data shows that an overwhelming majority of Michiganders support a woman's right to choose and furthermore, that Kristina Karamo is too extreme on the issue (she publicly says that anyone who supports a woman’s right to choose “must worship Satan.”) She makes no exceptions for rape or incest. Voters are concerned that she would use the Secretary of State's Office to try and restrict access rather than doing her job.

On Jocelyn: An equally overwhelming majority of Michigan voters support the work that Jocelyn is doing when it comes to motor vehicle services. From adding online services to dropping branch office visits to 20 minutes or less - Jocelyn is focused on results. And when voters realize it, they’ll check the box to keep her in office another four years.

If we make this a contrast between Jocelyn and Karamo – we will win. Ultimately, this election will come down to WHAT’S WORKING or WHAT'S TOO EXTREME. If we continue to make that distinction over and over until Election Day, Jocelyn will be re-elected Secretary of State.
Now’s the time, friend. Join the 2306 supporters who have pitched in to make sure Jocelyn’s campaign can spread this message until Election Day. And if you pitched in last month, consider another contribution this month as well.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122]

Look, we’re all tired. It’s hard to keep up this fight in the face of ongoing extremism and turmoil. But if we keep working - if we stay the course - we’re going to win in November.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sosbenson?refcode=em061122] Thank you for being with us.
Dan Farough
Campaign Chair
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

subject: Help stop the movement that led to January 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
This week’s live committee hearings revealed new truths about the insurrection >>> ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407131/350115871/-1607675525?refcode=headerlogo&amount=30&ms=ea.334b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaEp9Oa_Idh6E653c0kiGO0orUyHZFrvAFbTJ0XCtfc=) The mob violently stormed the Capitol. Then, members of Congress sided with them. Hi there — the January 6th hearings made us all furious. If you felt the same, [help support our efforts to protect our democracy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407132/350115875/-1607675525?amount=25&refcode=ea.334b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.334b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaEp9Oa_Idh6E653c0kiGO0orUyHZFrvAFbTJ0XCtfc=) from people like Jeff’s opponents, who have said they also would’ve joined in voting to overturn the election.

Jeff has said many times that watching the events of January 6th unfold was one of the driving forces behind his decision to run for Congress. That day, _after the mob stormed the Capitol_ , the former representative from our district sided with the insurrectionists and refused to vote to certify the 2020 election.

Now, 18 months later, we are still sharpening our understanding of the disturbing details of that day. This week’s hearings made plain what really happened that day. Chair Bennie Thompson said it plain and simple: _“January 6 was the culmination of an attempted coup.”_

**Folks: These are trying times for our country, and our district cannot afford to send a leader to Congress who – in any way, shape or form – will support the very ideas that led to violence at the Capitol on January 6th.**

Jeff has made a commitment to our district and our country to do everything he can to strengthen the security of our elections and protect our democracy from any potential future attack.

[We need a leader who will stand up for us and our most basic freedoms. That’s why we’re asking you to make a donation today. In addition to ignoring the facts about January 6th, the GOP is spending millions of dollars in this race to protect their power. Our best chance at beating them is by harnessing as much grassroots support as possible. Can we count on you today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407134/350115880/-1607675525?amount=25&refcode=ea.334b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.334b9098-9fe9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzRiOTA5OC05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaEp9Oa_Idh6E653c0kiGO0orUyHZFrvAFbTJ0XCtfc=) Then, members of Congress sided with them. Hi there — the January 6th hearings made us all furious. If you felt the same, = from people like Jeff’s opponents, who have said they also would’ve joined in voting to overturn the election. Jeff has said many times that watching the events of January 6th unfold was one of the driving forces behind his decision to run for Congress. That day, after the mob stormed the Capitol , the former representative from our district sided with the insurrectionists and refused to vote to certify the 2020 election. Now, 18 months later, we are still sharpening our understanding of the disturbing details of that day. This week’s hearings made plain what really happened that day. Chair Bennie Thompson said it plain and simple: “January 6 was the culmination of an attempted coup.” Folks: These are trying times for our country, and our district cannot afford to send a leader to Congress who – in any way, shape or form – will support the very ideas that led to violence at the Capitol on January 6th. name: John King
subject: My Uncle Dolly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
The legacy of my uncle, at the forefront of integration in national sports, is something that I and so many others still hold dearly. But, his storied career was never without struggle.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407746/350117256/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220611&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf82f82c-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyZjgyYy1hMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BM2hkD5lKQ_iS9Hn37ui4Z3wJ_aY_7uj9nz6M-cdPE=)
---
| Peter, I wanted to take a second to reflect on my family’s story of perseverance and progress — with a highlight on my Uncle Dolly, one of the first African-Americans to integrate the National Basketball League. Like so many in my family, my uncle, William ‘Dolly’ King, truly valued his education at a time when it wasn’t readily accessible to Black Americans. He was a talented basketball player at Long Island University before he joined the New York Rens, an all-Black barnstorming team, and then the Washington Bears down in DC where his team went undefeated and then won the World Championship of Professional Basketball in 1943 (competing against the nation’s best all-Black and all-White teams). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407750/350117257/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220611&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf82f82c-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyZjgyYy1hMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BM2hkD5lKQ_iS9Hn37ui4Z3wJ_aY_7uj9nz6M-cdPE=) _My Uncle Dolly pictured here with his team, the world champion Washington Bears._ In 1946, my Uncle Dolly was one of four Black athletes signed to play in the National Basketball League, playing for the Rochester Royals, and integrating professional basketball. Fittingly, they later moved to California where they became the Sacramento Kings of the NBA. The legacy of my uncle, at the forefront of integration in national sports, is something that I and so many others still hold dearly. But, his storied career was never without struggle. It’s a true testament to his character that no matter how much harassment and discrimination he faced, he never once stooped to his opponents’ levels and kept his head held high. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407752/350117260/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220611&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf82f82c-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyZjgyYy1hMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BM2hkD5lKQ_iS9Hn37ui4Z3wJ_aY_7uj9nz6M-cdPE=) _Here Uncle Dolly is again in his Rochester Royals uniform._ So much progress has been made since the time of Uncle Dolly’s career. But, we cannot pretend that Black Americans have fully equal access to opportunities in our schools, economy, and through our judicial system. ** I am tired of lip service being paid to address inequity while there is too little investment.** That’s why I’m running to be Maryland’s next Democratic governor — to honor the work of previous generations of activists and change-makers, bringing real progress to the state my family and I call home. | | [JOIN US TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407755/350117261/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220611&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf82f82c-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyZjgyYy1hMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BM2hkD5lKQ_iS9Hn37ui4Z3wJ_aY_7uj9nz6M-cdPE=)
---
**It’s not lost on me that if elected, I would be Maryland’s first Black governor and only the third ever elected Black governor in our nation’s history.**
Peter, our campaign is breaking barriers and gaining tremendous momentum, but we need the resources to get us to the finish line in July. [_**Please, can you pitch into our progressive movement today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46407756/350117262/-1597515454?source=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220611-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220611&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf82f82c-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgyZjgyYy1hMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6BM2hkD5lKQ_iS9Hn37ui4Z3wJ_aY_7uj9nz6M-cdPE=)

clean_body: The legacy of my uncle, at the forefront of integration in national sports, is something that I and so many others still hold dearly. But, his storied career was never without struggle. | = | Peter, I wanted to take a second to reflect on my family’s story of perseverance and progress — with a highlight on my Uncle Dolly, one of the first African-Americans to integrate the National Basketball League. Like so many in my family, my uncle, William ‘Dolly’ King, truly valued his education at a time when it wasn’t readily accessible to Black Americans. He was a talented basketball player at Long Island University before he joined the New York Rens, an all-Black barnstorming team, and then the Washington Bears down in DC where his team went undefeated and then won the World Championship of Professional Basketball in 1943 (competing against the nation’s best all-Black and all-White teams). = My Uncle Dolly pictured here with his team, the world champion Washington Bears. In 1946, my Uncle Dolly was one of four Black athletes signed to play in the National Basketball League, playing for the Rochester Royals, and integrating professional basketball. Fittingly, they later moved to California where they became the Sacramento Kings of the NBA. The legacy of my uncle, at the forefront of integration in national sports, is something that I and so many others still hold dearly. But, his storied career was never without struggle. It’s a true testament to his character that no matter how much harassment and discrimination he faced, he never once stooped to his opponents’ levels and kept his head held high. = Here Uncle Dolly is again in his Rochester Royals uniform. So much progress has been made since the time of Uncle Dolly’s career. But, we cannot pretend that Black Americans have fully equal access to opportunities in our schools, economy, and through our judicial system. I am tired of lip service being paid to address inequity while there is too little investment. That’s why I’m running to be Maryland’s next Democratic governor — to honor the work of previous generations of activists and change-makers, bringing real progress to the state my family and I call home. | | = It’s not lost on me that if elected, I would be Maryland’s first Black governor and only the third ever elected Black governor in our nation’s history. Peter, our campaign is breaking barriers and gaining tremendous momentum, but we need the resources to get us to the finish line in July. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you, John * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. | **Vote Early Today!**
---
| Friends, Today marks ten days until the 7th Congressional District Republican Primary. It is also one of two Saturdays you can vote early at your local registrar's office. _If you think you might be busy on Tuesday, June 21st, please go vote early now. _ Voting early protects your vote. When you cast your ballot in person at an early voting location, your name comes off the list and no one else can request an absentee ballot under your name or show up to the polls and pretend they are you. Lastly, Republicans of the 7th District live busy lives. There is always a chance you may get busy with work, travel, or family on June 21st. _**Vote early so you don't have to worry about missing Election Day!**_

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46408151/350117892/353151928?refcode=202200611_CGVA_Walker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGIxYjM3Yi05ZmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l6t2IsOEqQndy236pCqe0BYZBye8oMKs_z7OcPeTq88=) Derek, We’re adding “Corruption” to the list of reasons we need to get rid of MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert. Peter, I want to wish you a Happy Pride Month!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46408637/350119967/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY0YWQyMy1hMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBdT_xvXdEKPPeGA8GxQb0a-SD2fuXzyjHRXAP9WdLw=)
---
Peter, this month is Pride Month. As you likely know, I’m a proud, openly gay man.

But I'll be honest... navigating that identity hasn’t always been easy.

**In 1994, I was publicly and painfully outed as gay by my Republican opponent – I lost that election**. It wasn’t until 18 years later that I was first elected to Congress.

From discrimination to stigma, bullying and rejection, queer adults and young people face a host of uniquely painful obstacles. That’s why Pride Month is such an important time for our community and our nation.

Because even today, our rights are at risk. Hateful, homophobic and transphobic lawmakers continue to attempt to criminalize LGBTQ+ people, often targeting young kids. _It disgusts me._

But I refuse to let them win. As a US Congressman, I’m at the front lines everyday working to stop them.

[**But Peter, I can’t keep fighting for LGBTQ+ rights without your help. If you’re able, consider chipping in $3 to help me win my re-election to Congress. My campaign needs to raise $3,500 this week to stay ahead of our Mid-Month fundraising goal. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46408638/350119968/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220611_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY0YWQyMy1hMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBdT_xvXdEKPPeGA8GxQb0a-SD2fuXzyjHRXAP9WdLw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46408645/350120022/653852622?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20220611_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY0YWQyMy1hMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBdT_xvXdEKPPeGA8GxQb0a-SD2fuXzyjHRXAP9WdLw=)

subject: this food KILLS inflammation (eat daily)
body:
Do you wake up in the morning with stiff joints or pain in your hips, back, knees or elbows? [unsubscribe](http://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn3be8ia2fxyb0j6tapf2lgiozb4txyl0a8onqc4q6vyab45uf3q2onjz88m9v5u8lvynaju7pzu80a502880ah83v1bfds5yk5a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Do you wake up in the morning with stiff joints or pain in your hips, back, knees or elbows? Then chances are you're feeling the effects of chronic inflammation taking its toll on your body.

The good news is that it is NEVER too late to help get this under control. And the best part is there are certain foods that help you do this naturally, without the need for prescriptions medications.

name: American Defense News
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1m8kdj1o8ivj18lojutflfsjtph9idv8uvmkp8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhmao30cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slicopj2ohgetg70stme1i7cp74e5g7bdlleooj4s3j6dr34ob4e1gn4tphcorrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p38phim2qr8dtmc1j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze0o6okqiq15ihpdi3k30k1qj8m8q7p8tqa2mt70_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhmao30cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5gn9f5ganaunssrj8pqkk9bqi3sk9daunnjdu5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhmao30cph2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1j3h775a4repnp0g2c6s6o3o2dn03v44ve65hi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhmao30cph2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2vcf7isq53qmj52pn5efcd770jhegqs2pc4gkug_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjhmao30cph2bs)**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Tax cuts work!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/taxcutswork?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Tax cuts mean more growth and opportunity. The evidence is overwhelming:**

* **Exhibit 1 – Trump’s tax break:** When Congress enacted the _Tax Breaks & Jobs Act_ in 2017, hundreds of thousands of Mississippians benefited directly. 204,900 Mississippi households benefited when this Act doubled the child tax credit, lowering the tax bill for these families. A further 933,540 Mississippi households benefited when the Act doubled the standard deduction. Thanks to these tax breaks, a typical family of four in our state were made almost $2,000 a year better off.

* **Exhibit 2 – Mississippi’s tax break:** Mississippi’s Tax Freedom Act 2022 means that the first $18,000 earned by every Mississippi worker will be free from any state income tax. A typical family in our state will now be $800 a year better off.

---
|
---
Talking tax reform this week with Speaker Gunn
|
* **Exhibit 3 – Ronald Reagan’s tax breaks:** When Ronald Reagan lowered taxes in the mid 1980s, he put America on a path of strong growth for the next thirty years. So successful was Reagan in achieving faster economic growth, Bill Clinton was able to run a federal budget surplus off of it a decade later!

Still not convinced that tax breaks work?
* **Exhibit 4 – Other states’ tax breaks:** Look at the three fastest growing states in the south; Texas, Florida and Tennessee. What do they each have in common? No state income tax. Our state could prosper like these no income tax states – if we abolish the income tax!

With clear evidence that tax breaks could make Mississippi more prosperous, why are many politicians reluctant to do it?

**Many politicians think they are better at spending your money than you are. **

Progressive politicians like AOC or Chuck Schumer more or less imply this openly. The trouble is that there are plenty of politicians that won’t tell you that they think they can do a better job spending your money than you can. But that is how they act when in office.

Right now, Mississippians face a cost-of-living crisis. Prices are soaring and this is hitting those on ordinary incomes really hard. At the same time, our state has a record $ billion surplus.

**We could help put more money in the pockets of Mississippians by not taking it out of their pockets in the first place. **

The massive cut in income tax that Gov Tate Reeves and Speaker Gunn delivered through the Tax Freedom Act is an inspiring start. In the months ahead, as the economic situation gets worse, the action they have taken will look like a very smart move indeed. It will help Mississippians financially and help our state get through tough times ahead.

What really excites me is that what Mississippi has started to do is getting national attention. **Leaders in different states around the country are beginning to look at Mississippi’s Tax Freedom Act as a model to follow.**

We need make sure that Mississippi makes more inspired moves on tax breaks in the months ahead.

---
| |
---
Have a wonderful weekend!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=290b8f88d5&e=5703353baa)
---
Watch this video published by the Mississippi Center for Public Policy: Author Douglas Murray discusses the negative effects rewriting history can have on the American people.

|
---

name: Jason Lindsay, Pride Fund
subject: VIDEO: 49 Seconds - Pulse 6 Year Anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, This is a somber weekend for the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence and everyone impacted by the Pulse nightclub shooting. Both in Orlando and around our country. This shooting struck at the heart of the LGBTQ community. Tomorrow will mark the 6-year anniversary of this terrible tragedy. 6 years since a man armed with an assault rifle, high capacity magazines, and a heart full of hate, murdered 49 people, injured 53 others, and emotionally scarred countless others. During this time of remembrance, we will be posting a series of videos to commemorate this heart breaking milestone, remember those we lost, and renew our commitment to honor those killed at Pulse, and in gun tragedies we see everyday, to honor them with action. Working together, we are making a difference in the gun reform fight, and we are only just beginning. **Please watch our video, "49 Seconds," and take a moment with us to think about this loss of life, remember the victims, and think about all the people around you that you want to protect from gun violence. ** To watch the video, click the link or image below, and then click the unmute button on the next page in the bottom left corner of the video. For cell phone users, scroll up.
**[Click here to watch:](https://act.myngp.com/el/EoJHtYwsQUghtfyXvl-i_WkhZselM8PTrkkebCyp4iE=/dSgBMVm0gJX3G_Id7gKvoUB7uCMNDmVH0Nvdbnq1Unw=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EoJHtYwsQUghtfyXvl-i_WkhZselM8PTrkkebCyp4iE=/dSgBMVm0gJX3G_Id7gKvoUB7uCMNDmVH0Nvdbnq1Unw=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)
The mission of Pride Fund is year round, working daily to enact gun reform, elect gun safety champions at the state and federal level, and advocating for change all over the country. We can't do it without your help. **Will you consider a donation of $49 in honor of the 49 victims? Or donate whatever level you can. Every dollar matters**. clean_body: Peter, This is a somber weekend for the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence and everyone impacted by the Pulse nightclub shooting. Both in Orlando and around our country. This shooting struck at the heart of the LGBTQ community. Tomorrow will mark the 6-year anniversary of this terrible tragedy. 6 years since a man armed with an assault rifle, high capacity magazines, and a heart full of hate, murdered 49 people, injured 53 others, and emotionally scarred countless others. During this time of remembrance, we will be posting a series of videos to commemorate this heart breaking milestone, remember those we lost, and renew our commitment to honor those killed at Pulse, and in gun tragedies we see everyday, to honor them with action. Working together, we are making a difference in the gun reform fight, and we are only just beginning. Please watch our video, "49 Seconds," and take a moment with us to think about this loss of life, remember the victims, and think about all the people around you that you want to protect from gun violence. To watch the video, click the link or image below, and then click the unmute button on the next page in the bottom left corner of the video. For cell phone users, scroll up. The mission of Pride Fund is year round, working daily to enact gun reform, elect gun safety champions at the state and federal level, and advocating for change all over the country. We can't do it without your help. Will you consider a donation of $49 in honor of the 49 victims? Or donate whatever level you can. Every dollar matters. We are honored to stand with you in this fight and for you to be with us in this important effort. We sincerely thank you for everything that you do. name: Rushern Baker
subject: WHAT’S THE WILL OF THE PEOPLE?
body:
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,

Yesterday, Nancy and I made the tough decision to suspend our campaign activities for Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland. However, we reserve the right to reactivate our political activities in the event that donations increase drastically.

We were just hitting our stride. [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000]

Despite being dramatically out-raised and outspent by our competitors, we have consistently polled near the top of the Democratic primary field – a validation of our records of service and priorities.

I believe if we had a million dollars, we could win this election, but public financing has proved itself challenging [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000].

The only way we win in July is by raising one thousand (1,000) $250 donations from everyday Marylanders across the State by 11:59pm on Monday, June 20th.

Through the system, (1000 x $250) plus matching funds = $1,050,000 [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000] .

I’m not going to lie, this is a tough lift, but our supporters have proved the establishment wrong in the past. If our supporters help us reach our goal, it will provide us with the necessary resources to resume our political activities, and most importantly, get our message back on the air.

If we are unable to resume our campaign, we will likely endorse one of the nine remaining candidates that we believe has the resources to turn our Governor’s mansion blue in November.

Where there’s a will, there’s a way [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000] .

What’s the will of Marylanders?

Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000 [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000]

**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/1000]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

body:
| | |
---
_THIS IS A PERSONAL INVITATION FOR DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM.
PLEASE ONLY RESPOND IF YOUR EMAIL IS DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM._
Team -- As a top Democrat in Pennsylvania, you have been personally selected to join our Democratic Advisory Board by answering this survey.
Primary elections are already underway in states across the country, so it's crucial that we hear from our most engaged supporters and finalize our strategy to defend our Democratic majority this November.

name: Rep. Shontel Brown
subject: I’m supporting Nan Whaley for Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
Our state has never elected a woman governor, and our country has never elected an all-women ticket as governor and lieutenant governor. Let’s change that.

Team,
I first ran for office because I knew I wanted to fight for working families and help build a better future for Ohio.
Now I’m serving in Congress, working to protect the values Ohioans hold dear – from creating opportunities to end poverty, to ensuring that our paychecks can pay the bills and protecting reproductive freedom.
**Mike DeWine is doing the opposite**. He has caved to extremists and special interests at every chance instead of putting working families first. Under his watch, our statehouse has endured scandal after scandal. _We deserve better._

**[Nan Whaley and Cheryl Stephens are ready to change all that and to make history in the process. We need to help them kick off the general election strong: Will you chip in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46410865/350130513/-1847025536?refcode=nw_email_220611_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTZmMzQ0Ny1hZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqszwWRbAViJ9VrlZJS2zHfU8OF68mVnXPoAA7Pkmx0=)**
I also know what it’s like to make history in Ohio – I was the first woman and first Black person to serve as chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party.
Our state has _never_ elected a woman governor, and our country has never elected an all-women ticket as governor and lieutenant governor. **Let’s change that.**
**[Join me in supporting Nan Whaley and Cheryl Stephens – pitch in to their campaign, and let’s make history together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46410866/350130514/-1847025536?refcode=nw_email_220611_1_t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTZmMzQ0Ny1hZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqszwWRbAViJ9VrlZJS2zHfU8OF68mVnXPoAA7Pkmx0=)**
Thank you,
Representative Shontel Brown

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46410867/350130515/-1847025536?refcode=nw_email_220611_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTZmMzQ0Ny1hZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yqszwWRbAViJ9VrlZJS2zHfU8OF68mVnXPoAA7Pkmx0=)****

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cIkO4ME-4R5GqCzkOtpylXum1dErmQh-ExYuww1sW7c=/OZ2t8i0KlgVxHXEq3V85yfDsVce3eZ2WY6nqpOFnpxc=)

The January 6th Committee held their first public hearings on Thursday. Aside from laying out a very convincing (and very disturbing) case about Trump's involvement in the insurrection, the Committee also proved _how important _protecting our House Majority will be this November.
If it wasn't for our House Majority, this committee wouldn't exist, which means we wouldn't be getting the answers we need to hold people responsible for their attempted coup.
**We 've crunched the numbers: our 16 frontline Congressmen MUST win reelection if we are to keep our House Majority after the midterms. body:
election day is coming

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=037f1f973b094c2ab66278f3ecc2d864&_e=1q7sMj8NVCuBLITDtZJqxM81jWdnAFBWvF6kvJxiAmnD7mRgcTRur3JFObpR8hLpWS6_YmUa3cCZ4rEvi51KcLF-gX8UE8PN43RG7HKcnJUff3aXyr0O4RHSBJG2WOjDrZ4v4RbZlO6L7A5tdMT0vp-Ms-ClK6EEHn3ivs1vZAPVw_TJebBtUX0gwtZXzX5SS5s2_R7t04MEv-pVyCj2EiJMJ9IOSbxFJ9NZgadINE7DV4kgq__e-AnxNccJfPEsz_XkVU0CDpaJkqbjrF40G51xrf8OR15cI15dHGWaakGwZd0_1dyGeCpsM1vHhCXROGc_k_Yew-3KZDwyjT6yNqh44SQrTyRadNkvGO-qPvbYne3VSRSaoV5OU9HWba-CMXgTl979y5aoYtKY-UzBzlDA9p09N3NaiqaYlL5QqOqxpy3tVb7JluBXl4qEGWgo3QBZ46lxW79idMB0tT8g_WlldCehT2MZJL8ZyoXyqCItklWM8x5jX90x5BkPJlh7)
---
Friend,

Just like you, the Commonwealth of Virginia is my home. And there are just ten days until we save it.

It is chilling to watch progressive policies from Spanberger run rampant across our great state. It’s more important than ever that we, as conservatives, stand up for what we believe in.

It’s our duty as Virginians to be active citizens and take advantage of our democratic opportunities, like being politically engaged and exercising our civic right and duty to vote.

clean_body: election day is coming | Friend, Just like you, the Commonwealth of Virginia is my home. And there are just ten days until we save it. It is chilling to watch progressive policies from Spanberger run rampant across our great state. It’s more important than ever that we, as conservatives, stand up for what we believe in. It’s our duty as Virginians to be active citizens and take advantage of our democratic opportunities, like being politically engaged and exercising our civic right and duty to vote. **In Congress, I will always stand up for conservative values, and I will ALWAYS put America, and Virginia, FIRST. But, in order to get there, I need your help. | The closer we get to the primary on June 21, the more expensive things get. I truly would appreciate any support you can offer me. I’m looking forward to seeing you at the polls in 10 days! Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. Support Yesli Vega for Congress by Voting YESLI on Tuesday, June 21st. ** | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

body:
In order to hold the majority, we need a new generation of leaders | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk7XLqJvp2HpQ7q72DuWU-2Mga1auV_YLyH0F2LpwJgjo2et5ya_dHkz_3U1BGLl4AnzA4b-VEa5ksXBn5b4t_uMHDZ67W03WNied_msTjcIo7vhipBT3A8S1FulfLa1d3JpHNL4rAWJr_K8Cd771FvhmYynkUKOIbePjrIWczBy4FgB0X9K0HUlHpaeNvqwkZwqgAKh6fWmTNLxHHp7RmL6/3mt/N2JFqNYcRg-JoeueDiw21g/h0/g00Sg4i-eot3vIAU0MT8_2FxdvjTdMymbCJzz6Ta394) Team, As we get closer to election day, I’ve been thinking more and more about what’s at stake. **This election isn’t just about deciding the Democratic nominee in IL-7, it's about deciding what we want it to mean to be a Democratic representative in Congress.** Going into the 2022 midterms, we need voters to look at the Democratic party and see leaders who show up, speak out, and are 100% clear about who is paying the bill. Danny Davis has missed more votes than almost any Illinois Democrat in Congress, and he has accepted money from corporations including GEO group, the private prison company that puts children in cages along the Southern Border. **In order to hold the majority, we need a new generation of leaders ready to get something done. Ready to lead. Ready to legislate.** [**We are fighting for the future of the Democratic party, and we’ve got 17 days left. Can you help us win? name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: image attached 📎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I wanted to take a second to properly introduce myself.
| | |
---
Peter, the past several months since launching my campaign for Senate have been a whirlwind, to say the least. I finally have a free moment, so I wanted to take a second to properly introduce myself and tell you a bit more about why I'm running for Senate.
I've spent my whole life in Missouri. As a young girl growing up here, I watched my parents live the American Dream.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411620/350134042/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
At a young age, my parents taught me that “to whom much is given, much is expected.” That sense of duty to help others is what drove me to choose a life of service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411621/350134043/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
When I was a kid, I dreamed of becoming a nurse. To me, nurses were the real superheroes. They took care of people and saved lives. That’s what I wanted to do – so I set out to make it happen.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411622/350134044/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
As a young woman, I fulfilled my dream of becoming a nurse. Right after nursing school, I worked at a hospital and cared for children, seniors, people who relied on Medicare and Medicaid for their healthcare, and folks from all walks of life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411623/350134045/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
During my time working in a hospital, I saw the importance of quality healthcare firsthand. As a nurse, I believe that every person deserves access to the very best medical care, and as a parent, I believe that everyone should have access to contraception and abortion care – full stop.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411624/350134046/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
I’ve spent my life giving back and helping others, and now I’m running for U.S. Senate because we need a nurse's heart in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411625/350134047/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
**To truly solve problems, we need leadership that puts politics aside and puts people first – and that’s exactly what I’m ready to do as your next U.S. senator.** But I can't run a winning campaign without your support.
My team is trying to reach our midnight goal before our 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight. **I'd really hate to fall short here – and we just need to bring in another $10,748 – so I have to ask you: **[Please, can you make a donation of $5, or whatever you can spare tonight, to help me bring compassion, honesty, and respect back to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411626/350134048/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)
| | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411627/350134049/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk67-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc4MWMwZi1iMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzjYOrBkGtm4cXqEhNzLzlPWOODFF5xebYkkc80nCDk=)

_**THEN:**_ Hundreds of grassroots supporters from all across the country stepped up to close my fundraising gap.
_**NOW:**_ I'm so close to reaching my critical goal (only 6% to go!), but I need just ONE more supporter from your area to help me get there before midnight.

I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet my midnight fundraising goal, **I'm still falling short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a crucial moment:
**In the race that will determine Senate control, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and top Democrats like Fred Guttenberg have said "we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs to replace him."**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the Senate Republican campaign arm is funding a new ad buy to blanket the airwaves with personal attacks against me _._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 or more to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411399/350132904/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3301-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTIxN2M1ZS1iMGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gB3c1DrN-B4ILnjVHxjCxl9XEu0jtUT89b7ACESsizQ=)**

Val Demings

name: Citizens for a Greater Georgia
subject: PHOTO RELEASE: CITIZENS FOR A GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS KICKOFF EVENT AND FIELD OFFICE GRAND OPENING
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, JUNE 11
PHOTO RELEASE: CITIZENS FOR A GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS KICKOFF EVENT AND FIELD OFFICE GRAND OPENING
ATLANTA - This morning, Citizens for a Greater Georgia held a kickoff event for the grand opening of its field office in Roswell. Citizens, the leadership committee representing a partnership between the State Senate Majority Caucus and former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler, is leading the effort to keep Georgia red up and down the ballot with a statewide field program focused on mobilizing conservatives to vote this November.
State Senator John F. Kennedy, Chairman of Citizens, was joined by Senator Loeffler and Republican nominee for Lt. Governor Burt Jones, as well as fellow elected officials and supporters. Following the event, volunteers joined Citizens staff to canvass in nearby neighborhoods.
View photos of the event below, and learn more about Citizens [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vtlRIEZ2u0KdgZIL46RhGFvi_jy7r5CoqKixjwWHCb1rYvqHPFPtglhsjFClIX4_CGzrMpxEbGXFDfukSFUZ4pWYz2whrhV4KLANoKJ_5ht5sxUDgOUoUef4emBSY5fHWq2R6sWJaAw0iO56Kw9-aI66zKhcdxQE&c=2vCBnNNto9sqP4CLJCyEj-rNoH_TL8vhLPx31G9IOVYMDAG_47D2PA==&ch=SS7BlaqwMrQ35kLDOw_Lg4i-rYo8laYLbw1kXnnpsPN0UCP-SewYAQ==).

name: Team Lira
subject: Some exciting news
body:
We have some exciting news to share. | Peter, We have some exciting news to share. This week Representative Joaquin Castro endorsed John for TX-23. [**Will you make a contribution of any size today to help us keep up our momentum? Any amount helps us reach people across the district to talk about John and our vision.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411801/350134874/-341001294?refcode=em20220610_textask_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQ1MWZhMi1iMmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSZ9oRzzZLL4w4d3Uytcd-AvxcQOAvaaRVSHKz2P-sg=) **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411802/350134875/-341001294?refcode=em20220610_button_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmQ1MWZhMi1iMmU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSZ9oRzzZLL4w4d3Uytcd-AvxcQOAvaaRVSHKz2P-sg=)** As a fellow Texan, Joaquin knows that we have a huge opportunity to flip this district this year — that’s why he’s getting behind our movement. Here’s why Joaquin is supporting John, in his own words: “I am proud to endorse fellow San Antonian John Lira in Texas’ 23rd Congressional District. John’s continued service to the country, experience, and dedication to serving others would make an effective partner for the communities in Southwest Texas.” This endorsement shows that the eyes of Texas — and the nation — are on us and our race to represent the people in Congress. To have the support of leaders like Joaquin Castro is an honor — and it will be even more of an honor for John to represent the diverse voices and communities of this district in Washington. **[We know John is ready to join Joaquin in the halls of Congress and get to work for the people of TX-23. subject: we need your help to reach more voters

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

It’s been a big week here at Stacey Abrams HQ,
Derek — we’re wrapping up our very
first volunteer Week of Action.

This week, volunteers called and texted voters across Georgia, shared
stories about why they’re in this fight and learned some of the best ways
to organize their communities to elect Stacey Abrams. But we have so many
more we need to reach.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1438?refcode=sa_em_220611_B1_Rachel_S1_T1_HQ_t3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1001&akid=603%2E1862389%2EUVXtf8 ]Brian Kemp has invested over $3 million in building up his own direct
voter contact machine — which is the biggest Republican investment in
organizing in Georgia history. Can I count on you to make a grassroots
donation of just $5 to help us persuade undecided Georgians
and mobilize our supporters all across the state?

Here’s the most important thing I can tell you: we’re putting together an
ambitious, data-driven, never-been-done-before organizing program that
will empower volunteers to reach millions of Georgia voters — including
voters that most campaigns neglect and leave behind.

But to reach all those folks in every corner of the state, we need
resources. And even if we do all of that, we still have to overcome
rampant Republican voter suppression.

This week’s volunteer Week of Action was our first step to building the
organizing program that will win in November. Now, we need to make sure we
have the grassroots resources to continue ramping up events like this
across the state.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1438?refcode=sa_em_220611_B1_Rachel_S1_T1_HQ_t3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=603%2E1862389%2EUVXtf8 ]That’s why I’m reaching out to
supporters like you
today, Derek.
Can you make your
first donation right
now to help us build out our volunteer program and out-organize Brian
Kemp?

Thanks for all you do,

Rachel Pinto
Deputy Digital Director for Mobilization
Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

| | We're exactly 52 days away from the primary election, and I'm unopposed, but it's a critical date that will launch a total onslaught of tough campaigning to defeat Jack Bergman this November. My opponent is nervous. He is campaigning hard, spreading misinformation, calling us names, and fundraising off my candidacy. It's flattering and shows you the state of this race, but it makes it that much harder for us to disseminate the truth to voters. We will try like hell to get my opponent to agree to debates. But, he knows when voters have the opportunity to compare his record to our vision, he's in big trouble. So, we need your help in building our war chest. **I'm confident if I can reach every voter, we have a fighting chance. Remember, a Democrat hasn't represented this district seat since Bart Stupak. But, the opportunity is ripe - my opponent's involvement in the Jan. 6 insurrection and other controversies and missteps makes this race one of the most flippable in the past decade.** Many people see what we're doing and are optimistic about our chances. But, we cannot get comfortable. My opponent's misguided supporters will pour money into the race when threatened to save this seat. He's backed by large corporate donors, PACs, affluent families like the Devos, and dark money. To compete, we not only need to put forth a better candidate with better policies, but we also need a lot of resources. In a district this big, we're putting on a lot of miles, putting in a lot of hours, and we can't let up. We've held four events over 800 miles in the past two days alone, connecting with hundreds of voters. Standing ovations are encouraging, and I need that same extraordinary enthusiasm reflected in our FEC reports. My years of moonlighting in emergency care clinics in rural Upper Peninsula - putting in 70 - 80 hour workweeks - built me to campaign like a workhorse, and **I will wake up before dawn every day to show you I want this job.** Every step of the way, I need you with me. Times are tough, and if you cannot make a financial contribution at this time, I understand entirely. In lieu of a donation, please visit [my website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46411859/350135102/-1488711019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzBiMDM3My1iM2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8erglrdZF94jTZ5B__opLX-2IzeQn1HiVfm22aGkXx0=&emci=f21d3993-b2e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=630b0373-b3e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) to:

I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. clean_body: A lot of people see what we're doing in Northern Michigan and the U.P. and are filled with enthusiasm and encouragement. But, the momentum is fragile and we're up against a lot. We cannot get comfortable. Here's why...| | | A lot of people see what we're doing in Northern Michigan and the U.P. and are filled with enthusiasm and encouragement. But, the momentum is fragile and we're up against a lot. We're 7 weeks away! Flipping the 1st will require all of us = This is a race for the, and I need your support now more than ever before. We have two weeks until our next FEC fundraising deadline, and we need a big push to meet our goal. Can you ? = | | = | = | | We're exactly 52 days away from the primary election, and I'm unopposed, but it's a critical date that will launch a total onslaught of tough campaigning to defeat Jack Bergman this November. My opponent is nervous. He is campaigning hard, spreading misinformation, calling us names, and fundraising off my candidacy. It's flattering and shows you the state of this race, but it makes it that much harder for us to disseminate the truth to voters. We will try like hell to get my opponent to agree to debates. But, he knows when voters have the opportunity to compare his record to our vision, he's in big trouble. So, we need your help in building our war chest. I'm confident if I can reach every voter, we have a fighting chance. Remember, a Democrat hasn't represented this district seat since Bart Stupak. But, the opportunity is ripe - my opponent's involvement in the Jan. 6 insurrection and other controversies and missteps makes this race one of the most flippable in the past decade. Many people see what we're doing and are optimistic about our chances. But, we cannot get comfortable. My opponent's misguided supporters will pour money into the race when threatened to save this seat. He's backed by large corporate donors, PACs, affluent families like the Devos, and dark money. To compete, we not only need to put forth a better candidate with better policies, but we also need a lot of resources. In a district this big, we're putting on a lot of miles, putting in a lot of hours, and we can't let up. We've held four events over 800 miles in the past two days alone, connecting with hundreds of voters. Standing ovations are encouraging, and I need that same extraordinary enthusiasm reflected in our FEC reports. My years of moonlighting in emergency care clinics in rural Upper Peninsula - putting in 70 - 80 hour workweeks - built me to campaign like a workhorse, and I will wake up before dawn every day to show you I want this job. Every step of the way, I need you with me. Times are tough, and if you cannot make a financial contribution at this time, I understand entirely. In lieu of a donation, please visit to: We've revamped our website to make it easier for you to stay engaged, get updates, reach me, and share our content. Have a look! I want you on my team. I need you in my corner. Thank you for your generosity and support. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Put America back on a path of greatness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | Peter, there isn't much time left, so this will be quick.

My special election is tomorrow, and I need your help.

Our country is at a crossroads. Out-of-touch politicians in Washington want to tax and spend their way out of every problem, debt is skyrocketing, the federal budget is ballooning, and the Democrat majority is only making things worse.

I promise you, I'm willing to put up a fight. I'm ready to roll up my sleeves on day one and get to work slashing budgets, cutting taxes, standing up to liberal special interests, and standing up for the American people. I won't stop when the going gets tough.

---
| | | [Donate Now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60565262:6GO-wFoNe:m:1:3253819041:9F406073A99829E08C7DA679E475AA05:r "Donate Now")
---

Peter, Washington will never change if we keep sending the same big-spending, status quo politicians to Congress. I'm ready to bring commonsense policies and actions to Washington, but I can't do it without you.

So, I have just one question: _**[Will you join me and help me win in Alaska? Will you help put America back on a path of greatness?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60565262:6GO-wFoNe:m:1:3253819041:9F406073A99829E08C7DA679E475AA05:r "Will you join me and help me win in Alaska? Will you help put America back on a path of greatness?")**_

Thank you and God bless America,

Sarah Palin

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm sweating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4109%2E3611125%2EkltXqt ][IMG]

Folks, is it hot in here or is it just this dead heat Senate race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14610?t=1007&akid=4109%2E3611125%2EkltXqt ]Tim doing yoga

I just finished up some hot yoga, but it’s not the only thing that’s got
me sweating lately.

My millionaire opponent JD Vance and his billionaire backers are
mobilizing against our grassroots campaign.

If we’re going to win this race, we’ve got to take a deep breath and keep
our balance so we can be ready at a moment's notice for whatever they
throw our way.

That means we’ve got to stretch every campaign dollar to maximize our
impact and come out on top.

Look, I'm bending over backwards for Ohio workers, but I'm going to need
your help to make sure we have the resources to flip this Senate seat
blue.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14610?t=1008&akid=4109%2E3611125%2EkltXqt ]Can I count on you to chip in to fight back against the big money
entering this race and outwork our GOP opponent JD Vance to win in Ohio?

Thanks for your support.

Tim

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Only days until our next Participate PA on universal health care – will you be there?

Dear Friend, After our recent virtual event, Keystone Progress Summit - Pennsylvania’s Progressive Summit, we realized we still had so much to discuss with our fellow PA progressives that we launched a summer series, Participate PA. **On Monday, we’ll be gathering for**[**Participate PA: Single-Payer/Universal Healthcare in PA and Beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398102/350092479/1809777891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYWQyMjVhLTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjM5aG0ekuIaymHXsCVX5odrR9hkSbWCJIlhQ-lyE5E=&emci=80ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2038134)**** Experts will offer an update on legislation in PA, other states, and Congress. **Monday, June 13, 2022****7:00 - 8:30 p.m.** [**RSVP TODAY.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398105/350092481/1809777891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYWQyMjVhLTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjM5aG0ekuIaymHXsCVX5odrR9hkSbWCJIlhQ-lyE5E=&emci=80ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2038134) Moderator Walter Tsou, MD, MPH, adjunct professor in the Department of Family Medicine and Community Health, at the University of Pennsylvania Perelman School of Medicine will lead the discussion with:
* Michele Hamilton, member of Healthcare 4 All PA, One Payer States, Centre County NOW, NAACP, and Religious Coalition for Reproductive Justice
* Chuck Pennacchio, president of OnePayerStates.org
* Cathy O’Neil, retired RN, president of Healthcare4All PA
* Zane Knight, activist and organizer
* Kristin Volchansky, Political Organizer, Action Together NEPA

**Please join us! Just RSVP here on our[website](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398107/350092485/1760035194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYWQyMjVhLTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjM5aG0ekuIaymHXsCVX5odrR9hkSbWCJIlhQ-lyE5E=&emci=80ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2038134) or [Facebook page](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46398111/350092486/-1857042109?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzYWQyMjVhLTkzZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kjM5aG0ekuIaymHXsCVX5odrR9hkSbWCJIlhQ-lyE5E=&emci=80ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83ad225a-93e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2038134).** And if you’re missing our talks from this year’s Summit or maybe you missed them in April, we’re uploading our conversations to YouTube. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Our birthday gift ideas for Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s get Oz a gift that reminds him of home.
#
Derek,
It’s Dr. Oz’s birthday and we just can’t decide what to get him!!!
**Will you help us pick?** We want our gift to remind him of where he’s from -- which is, notably, NOT Pennsylvania, the state he’s running in against John for U.S. Senate...
Here are our ideas so far...
**A Jersey Shore t-shirt**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)
**Tickets to Six Flags Great Adventure, one of New Jersey’s most popular theme parks**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)
**A top-up of his EZ-Pass for all the commuting he does to PA on New Jersey’s Garden State Parkway**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)
**Fries from the Atlantic City boardwalk**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)
Cast your vote on this urgent matter below 👇
[What should we get Dr. Oz for his b-day? 🎂](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5) Select a gift: A Jersey Shore t-shirt Tickets to Six Flags Great Adventure A top-up of his EZ-Pass Fries from the Atlantic City boardwalk **[Submit →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)**
---
Oh, and if you’re ready to help John defeat a quack celebrity doctor who loves Trump, spreads misinfo, and IS NOT EVEN FROM PENNSYLVANIA...
[**_Consider chipping in your first donation to help elect John, beat Dr. Oz, + flip this U.S. Senate seat blue._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-1?refcode=em20220611-6163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)**
We have our fun, don’t we? 😉
Thanks,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220611-6163-footer&t=1&refcode2=6163_434096_uWoCj5&akid=6163%2E434096%2EuWoCj5)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Peter, When I met Jeremy Hunt, I knew I had found my husband. He is kind, courageous, honest, and dependable. And watching him grow as an Army Captain and a father, those traits have shone through even brighter. They’re the things that make him the love of my life: and now, I get to watch him use them in his fight to represent the great people of Southwest and Middle Georgia.

clean_body: | | | Peter, When I met Jeremy Hunt, I knew I had found my husband. He is kind, courageous, honest, and dependable. And watching him grow as an Army Captain and a father, those traits have shone through even brighter. They’re the things that make him the love of my life: and now, I get to watch him use them in his fight to represent the great people of Southwest and Middle Georgia. | | Jeremy is an incredible man, and right now, he needs your help. He’s taking on a nearly 30-year incumbent because he believes that our community deserves better than an out-of-touch career politician. But facing someone so entrenched in the swamp is difficult. His opponent has years of connections and cash on his side. But I know with you on our team, we can beat “politics as usual” and step up for the people of this district. It doesn’t have to be a lot - any amount gets us one step closer to victory this November. Thank You, Ky September Hunt | | Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Re: enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
We need common-sense gun safety laws in this country now.
No parent should ever experience the terror and powerlessness that comes with knowing your child is potentially in an active shooter situation.
I've been through it — and I wouldn't wish it on anyone.
Here's the thing: we can change this pattern.
With universal background checks, red flag laws, a ban on assault weapons, and an end to the gun show loophole, we can fight back against the epidemic of gun violence rocking our country.
Last week, the House passed a gun reform bill with a lot of these measures. It's currently stalled out in the Senate, but that doesn't mean this fight is over.
I will fight nonstop in Congress to make sure we pass bipartisan gun reform laws that keep EVERYONE safe. Will you help me get this done by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_061122_GunControl]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_061122_GunControl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_061122_GunControl]

Thank you!
— Kirsten
Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a State Legislator who has spent the past 5 years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62709/images/kirsten-engel-WEB-1.jpg]

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqxDAM_Jrk5hA770MOCyW3LaUUejSOLCemsWNsp2X_vk53C70VhBCjGTEaOUqQgkKuR1YyVraU0rrum6Foyrlhfa_oTAeFlczqUmzoY-HRHfOmQdgowofaPWABu8nXEVhXgaoFdKIbmm6e53SzUefcgKja_P3Kr0Jv2i7PwuDoo-I-cCt4XBVBi3658ZZQShjjNN_GNUYXsuqSsSlVQDg8ymJFr6NYsNj9kuC7jmgr0WFqFpCEw3_i7ZRV0xENB2Gc0IvNqqc7_S87Y-3JCfuRXkkM5_fgEGKy-VgZlPowp9gk-w8QdhvRxoS-XMjr20R-A8z9KN2X3jYd2i7Ftpyin4jiPy9_A3dJhTg)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqxDAM_Jrk5hA770MOCyW3LaUUejSOLCemsWNsp2X_vk53C70VhBCjGTEaOUqQgkKuR1YyVraU0rrum6Foyrlhfa_oTAeFlczqUmzoY-HRHfOmQdgowofaPWABu8nXEVhXgaoFdKIbmm6e53SzUefcgKja_P3Kr0Jv2i7PwuDoo-I-cCt4XBVBi3658ZZQShjjNN_GNUYXsuqSsSlVQDg8ymJFr6NYsNj9kuC7jmgr0WFqFpCEw3_i7ZRV0xENB2Gc0IvNqqc7_S87Y-3JCfuRXkkM5_fgEGKy-VgZlPowp9gk-w8QdhvRxoS-XMjr20R-A8z9KN2X3jYd2i7Ftpyin4jiPy9_A3dJhTg) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUMtqxDAM_Jrk5hA770MOCyW3LaUUejSOLCemsWNsp2X_vk53C70VhBCjGTEaOUqQgkKuR1YyVraU0rrum6Foyrlhfa_oTAeFlczqUmzoY-HRHfOmQdgowofaPWABu8nXEVhXgaoFdKIbmm6e53SzUefcgKja_P3Kr0Jv2i7PwuDoo-I-cCt4XBVBi3658ZZQShjjNN_GNUYXsuqSsSlVQDg8ymJFr6NYsNj9kuC7jmgr0WFqFpCEw3_i7ZRV0xENB2Gc0IvNqqc7_S87Y-3JCfuRXkkM5_fgEGKy-VgZlPowp9gk-w8QdhvRxoS-XMjr20R-A8z9KN2X3jYd2i7Ftpyin4jiPy9_A3dJhTg)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Sent to Republican Task Force subscribers.

Peter,

Donald Trump is not a leader. We all know that. He keeps a thumb on his supporters by spreading lies and refusing to accept the truth.

For him, nothing is more important than power. He thinks defeating Liz this August equates to another notch in his belt of “victories.”

But he has not counted on the fact that Liz and our entire team are not intimidated by him. Liz knows that she has a duty to defend the Constitution and stand up to the danger the former President poses. She will never waver in that fight.

We have to choose to vote for our founding principles. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Will You personally endorse Mark Kelly?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**Mark Kelly Personal Endorsement Tracker**
**Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Your Endorsement: No Signature on RecordAction Requested: Add your name today!**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-june22/?source=em220611-1-15&t=1&akid=3034%2E6688874%2EhcXJZd)**
Friends —
Now that Election Day is quickly approaching, it’s crucial that we make sure Mark has the support of a big — and growing — team behind him.
Why? Well there are a few reasons: First, the NRSC spent **$1 MILLION** in attack ads against Mark **in just one week.** Now, we’ve learned another **$8 MILLION** is on the way. If that sounds like a lot — it’s because it is. Second, Trump just endorsed one of Mark’s opponents. And third, now that he has, you can bet the attack ads will start rolling in even heavier.
So, we need more people to personally endorse our campaign and help Mark fight back. So far, over 75,000 people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to make that number 100,000 by the end of this month.
That’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen on our list of folks who proudly say they stand with Mark.
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? It’s important for Mark and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and win this race.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-june22/?source=em220611-1-15&t=2&akid=3034%2E6688874%2EhcXJZd)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-june22/?source=em220611-1-15&t=3&akid=3034%2E6688874%2EhcXJZd)
Personally endorsing Mark is a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: re-elect Mark and keep his reliance on science, data, and facts in Congress.
So, thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-june22/?source=em220611-1-15&t=4&akid=3034%2E6688874%2EhcXJZd)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=3034%2E6688874%2EhcXJZd).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
