name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Pramila’s push for accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our democracy is still very much at stake — we must join shoulder to shoulder with Pramila to protect it.
#
Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s message from the other day.
The first of several public hearings from the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the Capitol began on Thursday — what we revisited and learned was painful. It was especially painful for Pramila and several of her colleagues, who remained trapped in the House gallery as the insurrectionists closed in on the floor.
In the coming weeks, more damning details will be revealed. **But we cannot ignore the fact that right now,_57 insurrectionists are running for elected office in 2022._ Our democracy is still very much at stake — we must join shoulder to shoulder with Pramila to protect it.**
Republicans are already hard at work downplaying the details revealed during the first hearing and we can’t let them get away with it. [**Can you contribute $3 or any amount today to fuel Pramila’s fight for accountability, our democracy AND our Democratic majority? Every dollar donated truly makes a difference.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14382?refcode=em20220611-1340&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)
Please read Pramila’s original email below.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Thu, Jun 9, 2022
Subject: We cannot forget the horror of that day, fueled by the Big Lie
Peter,
Today, the January 6 Committee begins hearings to hold all those responsible for the Capitol insurrection accountable. We must do this for our democracy — everything is on the line.
The Committee’s work is critical — we need to ensure people know how close we came to losing our democracy. This is about accountability. This is about making sure the perpetrators of the insurrection are punished. It’s about making sure this never happens again.
When the House Floor was cleared on January 6th, about 30 of us were left behind, trapped in the gallery as the insurrectionists invaded. I remember fearing for my life as they pounded on the doors, only a few feet from where I hid under the seats. I was trapped and prepared to fight back using a cane and a gas mask. I am grateful that I reached safety later that day, but our democracy is far from safe.
Donald Trump and his Republican allies, like Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley, peddled dangerous misinformation about our elections. We cannot forget the horror of that day, fueled by the Big Lie.
And today, the GOP continues to attack our democracy with lies about our elections. They spread misinformation as they attempt — and in some states succeed — at restricting voting rights, making it harder for people to cast a ballot.
We must hold those responsible for January 6 accountable and we must protect our democracy. That’s why I’m redoubling my efforts to protect our House Democratic majority in this crucial midterm election year.
[**Can you stand with me today and contribute $3 as I fight for our democracy and our Democratic majority?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14382?refcode=em20220611-1340&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14382?refcode=em20220611-1340&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220611-1340-footer&t=4&refcode2=1340_420207_IZqQs1&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1340%2E420207%2EIZqQs1)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: the truth + 1/6 Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- As you surely know, the first of at least seven televised public hearings of the 1/6 Committee was broadcast Thursday night (a digest of all the pertinent facts and testimony is at the bottom of this email). The facts, as they'll be laid out over the next month, should speak for themselves. But, I also know they will fall on _some_ deaf ears. And sadly, that's due to one of the biggest missed opportunities of this whole saga: Leaders failing to stand up and tell their supporters the uncomfortable truth that the leader of the Republican Party, and his close advisors, set a coup attempt in motion that nearly toppled democracy. But even if some choose not to watch (thanks, Fox News), not to listen, or not to believe -- that's okay. I'm not standing for the truth to benefit or harm Republicans or Democrats. I'm not standing for the truth to malign Donald Trump. I'm standing for the truth because that's the test of a real leader. The truth doesn't belong to any one party -- it belongs to us, to our kids, and grandkids. It belongs to history. My son Christian may be only five months old, but someday, when he learns about this time, he'll have the crystal clear facts of what unfolded following the 2020 election, and that will be due to the work of this Committee. So buckle-up, stay-tuned, and let us know what you're thinking: [>> What is your greatest hope for the work of the 1/6 Committee? What questions do you most want answered in the final report?](https://www.country1st.com/1_6_feedback22?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/1_6_feedback22?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=3 "Let me know your Top Priorities") [Let me know your Top Priorities](https://www.country1st.com/1_6_feedback22?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=3)
---
Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. Hope you have a great weekend! **The next hearing is Monday, June 13th at 10am ET / 7am PT.**
Country First,

Adam
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Digest to highlight the important work of the 1/6 Committee. Our aim is to make this available to our members within 24 hours after each hearing. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger Speaks to [CBS](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcidWXR_XtL6LVsVE-Q_p8o4uBxT5CUJKHoAiXiF2rROkyjGwcC31A6je8vG2_Ht94B3gEm8BLB6wy7deUA0XtmUodsmi_fRp0mhC_ZHYQefOYaaRrvxIU6osHa76danA2Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=4) about the first 1/6 hearing

**Who Gave Testimony Yesterday:**
* **Officer Caroline Edwards:** Capitol Police Officer [injured](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbinVuOEMNsdR1hYLOO7Iat&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=5) by insurrectionists on 1/6
* **Nick Quested:** Documentary filmmaker [following](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZfLCZ5htJvJkUf_NUl2G5p&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=6) the Proud Boys

Here are the major developments from the committee: **"Stand Back and Stand By" Comments Made By the Former President Dramatically Increased Proud Boys Membership** "It tripled, probably." Those were the words of a high-profile member of the Proud Boys, Jeremy Bertino, giving testimony about [membership](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zEodYuBL40Va5aXY1hXiWi5nhj7XDOiNzgS9T8FZ_cluiHML7hYfegmqXoS3LE76vzH5l9I07dtC8NBLknm5a_2bZvlcjE2jet7JaoJfMK80w&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=7) for the alt-right white supremacist group after the former President refused to condemn them. Instead, his infamous "stand back and stand by" comments dramatically increased the group's membership. First revealed during the first primetime hearing of the 1/6 Committee's investigation into the attack on the U.S. Capitol, Bertino also admitted that the infamous words of a then-President was a watershed moment for the group. Bertino, when asked if he sold merchandise with the words of the former President, admitted that another vendor on his page beat him to it, but he wished he would have made a "stand back, stand by" t-shirt. Bertino was the subject of an FBI search earlier this year, but has not been arrested. Several members of the Proud Boys have been charged in connection to 1/6 and five others have been charged with [seditious conspiracy](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_Ne2_dvt_-iTPYIUPr-0aOaAwT-dMd3MQKT9AKEy-pLQy7pkER_KwRlrBwK4Dgn0yLFKXLsXfVhLnGxv_9Jeg8tCjNSSrMGNWE60PW1H37mAIGCjTHwYRgLS5563OKEN_cx_WT3isl2waUcy394p82cn-Mv6oYG3FZKZ8hhNC0bRK_0cmCjlYIgh3DqbruLOUlDvzqUHkhrYbWoMxITZahMRXUZ5ciw6B488QDWbpKrd&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=8) in connection with the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. **Multiple GOP Members Called the Former President Asking For Pardons After 1/6** In the primetime hearing, never before seen video and testimony was given, [shocking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUa_M1qI2R-4V1D7GKRIHHWyMQP3nVB84HdC0YLtTp8BAsPmS6DPoocWS7ctvEgkrwxDbQRCZmg5TzXeqMuB3hRo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=9) a nation once again, including the opening remarks from vice-chair of the panel, Congresswoman Liz Cheney (R-WY). In the Congresswoman’s opening remarks, Cheney said that Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA) was among "multiple other Republican congressmen" who sought presidential pardons for their roles in the attempted coup against the United States. The statement made by the Wyoming Congresswoman had Democratic members, many of whom sat in on the hearings, asking which of their fellow colleagues sought a pardon. Although no names have been released by the 1/6 Committee yet, they did subpoena GOP lawmakers Andy Biggs and Mo Brooks in May of this year. **Former President Believed Former Vice President Pence “Deserved” to be Hanged** Gallows were erected on the U.S. Capitol grounds on January 6, 2021, with a [noose](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHk1KOxbf7BAxkl_YXQz_ury4R7MZWPqmZ5iD3ljuwse5U5-bKaDAAME1xFt6XYXEMO6OmE--qkbSVX55GYY9-uy0bL8SsktQS9rhdDrwQ4dZwrlrXMQ5xDqOxuIEnMnGWgypFToAN-YBv237aHjKpPQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=10) prepared, seemingly, for the execution of the mob's enemies. As the crowd learned that Mike Pence planned to certify the election, it became more aggressive and began to chant "Hang Mike Pence." Instead of quelling the violence, the former President yelled at staff and refused to make any sort of statement. Vice-chair Cheney said in her opening statement, "You will hear that President Trump was yelling and, quote, 'really angry' at advisers who told him he needed to be doing something more" to stop the riot. Cheney continued, "And, aware of the rioters' chants to 'hang Mike Pence,' the president responded with this sentiment: quote, 'Maybe our supporters have the right idea,' Mike Pence, quote, 'deserves it'." The 1/6 Committee plans to hold hearings throughout June, in which they plan to share more about the former President’s lack of response and incitement of violence. **Cheney Outlines "Seven Part Plan" to Attack the United States Capitol** The former President had a seven-part sophisticated [plan](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHk1KOxbf7BAxkl_YXQz_ury4R7MZWPqmZ5iD3ljuwse5R4ROMW3ywO-7kBq7pPVlkrZTPliMYnFTzScyEFIXqLR5ffIGM2FqF0gJurIYZqHF641QV1gZGQ_K-EGmNP9olDQb8DWPNZz7fXsP_zdE9bFG5d5kr_WbPjp9RVoQAXMN&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=11) to overturn the election, said Congresswoman Liz Cheney, vice-chair of the 1/6 Committee. The plan included:
1. Spreading false elections claims;
2. Planning to replace the Attorney General;
3. Pressuring Vice President Pence to decertify the election;
4. Pressuring state officials to install a new slate of electors;
5. Instructing states to create a false slate of electors _and_ submit the fraudulent slate to the US Congress and the National Archives;
6. Summoning multiple far-right groups and even white supremacists to the US Capitol; and
7. Refusing to call in the National Guard or any other law enforcement to protect or stop the attack.

The 1/6 Committee outlined the Former President’s plan to remain in power after 2020’s free and fair election. Despite pursuing all legal challenges, the former President was never delivered the results he wanted, causing the seven-part plan to be enacted. The 1/6 Committee outlined its plan to unravel the web of lies that brought about the attempted coup. **Former Attorney General Barr Called "Bull****" on Trump’s Fraud Claims** Testimony given by the former President’s closest allies, including Jason Miller, former Attorney General William Barr, and even the President’s own daughter, Ivanka Trump, revealed they had [no reason](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=ByhkdA7RrYhHtdiUMWUYvFr6-b2hDUvZKNDO1lgwuMX1HQfSigxLdcElHpxMDD8Py9cVO_XigVEAfAALDbKa_URAE2TrQK8oZPOl5fNMKH5qh4Z7EFmSqO4k8PnxpEteCQ1Se7-KxXXbmOO45c--Ny9TVBRDXlhuH_9bKoZANKU&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=12) to believe the election was stolen. Instead, the former Attorney General, William Barr, said he saw "absolutely zero basis for the allegations," and that they were "nonsense" and "bull****." Further, former senior White House Advisor, Ivanka Trump said that Barr's assessment of no election fraud, "affected my perspective" and that she "accepted what he was saying." Many of the former President’s closest advisors agreed: No voter fraud existed. However, the former President did not accept their counsel. Instead, after months of being advised against pursuing election fraud claims, the former President held a rally outside the White House on January 6th. Many in attendance then marched from the White House to the Capitol and violently attacked in an attempt to disrupt the counting of the electoral votes. **Vice President Pence, not President Trump, Wanted the Military’s Help at the U.S. Capitol** In new testimony, recorded by the 1/6 Committee and released on Thursday, General Mark Milley, the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, testified that the Former Vice President was [asking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=T9ZtceE9m2Ok5OEA7HCjAg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=13) for help, not the former President. General Milley said Vice President Pence "issued a very explicit, very direct, unambiguous order... 'get the Guard down here, put down this situation.'" Instead of acting on the Vice President's directions, former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows was more concerned with the narrative, wanting the public to believe the President was still in charge. General Milley called it, "a red flag for me personally." According to 1/6 Committee vice-chair Liz Cheney, "President Trump gave no order to deploy the National Guard that day. And he made no effort with the Department of Justice to coordinate and deploy law enforcement assets." Cheney went on to affirm the testimony made by General Milley, that Vice President Pence was the top official trying to involve the National Guard. **Harrowing Testimony From Capitol Police Officer Shows Violent Mob Assaulting Officers** Caroline Edwards, a U.S. Capitol Police Officer, described the scene on January 6, 2021 as "carnage." In [graphic](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=zveC7zroragI2qrXZZ9Nau8g06OiiFSrYZB4vdSsTxxol28Dp7GJmGfYfuAzD-_Ddo8Dq-oeoivpUnt586PXx4c47CJ4bB4EikgFu1xuEDlaWq1VI0JK8RNWIch8ZyVaTFMZSEdkzAJtDWmBY68gXw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hearing1_nd&n=14) testimony given on Thursday, June 9th, Edwards laid out her experience, from being knocked unconscious to re-engaging with insurrectionists after coming to again. Edwards’ testimony was accompanied by never-before-seen footage, including the exact moment she was overpowered by the violent mob and thrown onto the ground, hitting her head and sustaining a concussion. Despite her injuries, she came to and continued to hold the line into the U.S. Capitol Building. "My literal blood, sweat, and tears were shed in defending the building I spent countless holidays and weekends working in," Edwards said. Edwards also spoke of her colleague, U.S. Capitol Police Officer Brain Sicknick, recalling the moment he went "ghostly pale." Sicknick was injured while holding the line to the Capitol Building and suffered a stroke. Unfortunately, Officer Sicknick died the following day. Members of his family were in attendance at the hearing. **MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR THE NEXT HEARING:** **MONDAY, JUNE 13 AT 10 AM ET** _Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- As you surely know, the first of at least seven televised public hearings of the 1/6 Committee was broadcast Thursday night (a digest of all the pertinent facts and testimony is at the bottom of this email). The facts, as they'll be laid out over the next month, should speak for themselves. But, I also know they will fall on some deaf ears. And sadly, that's due to one of the biggest missed opportunities of this whole saga: Leaders failing to stand up and tell their supporters the uncomfortable truth that the leader of the Republican Party, and his close advisors, set a coup attempt in motion that nearly toppled democracy. But even if some choose not to watch (thanks, Fox News), not to listen, or not to believe -- that's okay. I'm not standing for the truth to benefit or harm Republicans or Democrats. I'm not standing for the truth to malign Donald Trump. I'm standing for the truth because that's the test of a real leader. The truth doesn't belong to any one party -- it belongs to us, to our kids, and grandkids. It belongs to history. My son Christian may be only five months old, but someday, when he learns about this time, he'll have the crystal clear facts of what unfolded following the 2020 election, and that will be due to the work of this Committee. So buckle-up, stay-tuned, and let us know what you're thinking: | "Let me know your Top Priorities" Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. Hope you have a great weekend! The next hearing is Monday, June 13th at 10am ET / 7am PT. Country First, Adam 1/6 Committee Digest Country First presents the next edition of The Digest to highlight the important work of the 1/6 Committee. Our aim is to make this available to our members within 24 hours after each hearing. In Case You Missed It: Rep. Kinzinger Speaks to about the first 1/6 hearing Who Gave Testimony Yesterday: Officer Caroline Edwards: Capitol Police Officer by insurrectionists on 1/6 Nick Quested: Documentary filmmaker the Proud Boys Here are the major developments from the committee: "Stand Back and Stand By" Comments Made By the Former President Dramatically Increased Proud Boys Membership "It tripled, probably." Those were the words of a high-profile member of the Proud Boys, Jeremy Bertino, giving testimony about for the alt-right white supremacist group after the former President refused to condemn them. Instead, his infamous "stand back and stand by" comments dramatically increased the group's membership. First revealed during the first primetime hearing of the 1/6 Committee's investigation into the attack on the U.S. Capitol, Bertino also admitted that the infamous words of a then-President was a watershed moment for the group. Bertino, when asked if he sold merchandise with the words of the former President, admitted that another vendor on his page beat him to it, but he wished he would have made a "stand back, stand by" t-shirt. Bertino was the subject of an FBI search earlier this year, but has not been arrested. Several members of the Proud Boys have been charged in connection to 1/6 and five others have been charged with in connection with the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. Multiple GOP Members Called the Former President Asking For Pardons After 1/6 In the primetime hearing, never before seen video and testimony was given, a nation once again, including the opening remarks from vice-chair of the panel, Congresswoman Liz Cheney (R-WY). In the Congresswoman’s opening remarks, Cheney said that Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA) was among "multiple other Republican congressmen" who sought presidential pardons for their roles in the attempted coup against the United States. The statement made by the Wyoming Congresswoman had Democratic members, many of whom sat in on the hearings, asking which of their fellow colleagues sought a pardon. Although no names have been released by the 1/6 Committee yet, they did subpoena GOP lawmakers Andy Biggs and Mo Brooks in May of this year. Former President Believed Former Vice President Pence “Deserved” to be Hanged Gallows were erected on the U.S. Capitol grounds on January 6, 2021, with a prepared, seemingly, for the execution of the mob's enemies. As the crowd learned that Mike Pence planned to certify the election, it became more aggressive and began to chant "Hang Mike Pence." Instead of quelling the violence, the former President yelled at staff and refused to make any sort of statement. Vice-chair Cheney said in her opening statement, "You will hear that President Trump was yelling and, quote, 'really angry' at advisers who told him he needed to be doing something more" to stop the riot. Cheney continued, "And, aware of the rioters' chants to 'hang Mike Pence,' the president responded with this sentiment: quote, 'Maybe our supporters have the right idea,' Mike Pence, quote, 'deserves it'." The 1/6 Committee plans to hold hearings throughout June, in which they plan to share more about the former President’s lack of response and incitement of violence. Cheney Outlines "Seven Part Plan" to Attack the United States Capitol The former President had a seven-part sophisticated to overturn the election, said Congresswoman Liz Cheney, vice-chair of the 1/6 Committee. The plan included: 1. Spreading false elections claims; 2. Planning to replace the Attorney General; 3. Pressuring Vice President Pence to decertify the election; 4. Pressuring state officials to install a new slate of electors; 5. Instructing states to create a false slate of electors and submit the fraudulent slate to the US Congress and the National Archives; 6. Summoning multiple far-right groups and even white supremacists to the US Capitol; and 7. Refusing to call in the National Guard or any other law enforcement to protect or stop the attack. Friends of Liz Cheney,

As our state and nation continue to face unprecedented challenges, there are some important points we must remember to _**keep Wyoming and America strong.**_

_And this starts with the men and women we elect._

There are people who don’t do their homework, who are more focused on being celebrities than solving problems, and who treat politics like it’s a game. It’s not a game. People’s lives are affected by the decisions our elected leaders make. Our country’s future is determined by how elected officials choose to lead. **We must incentivize seriousness or else we will stay trapped in an endless cycle of vitriol and toxicity that is hurtling us towards a dark, destructive, and dangerous place.**

Liz Cheney is a serious leader. She’s serious about doing what is best for Wyoming and focused on putting our country over partisan, political interests.

And she needs your support today. _**“Republicans are eyeing the Oregon governor’s mansion as an opportunity to score a win in a solidly blue state.”** — NBC News, 5/30/22_

Peter,

Tina’s victory in the primary wasn’t by chance. Voters know that Tina is the best candidate for the job. They know she’ll fight for them and get things done. She’s the candidate that will build on our progress and make things happen, rooted in community and justice for all.

But Republicans see our race as a rare opportunity to pick up a governor's seat, and their campaign arm has announced record-breaking fundraising hauls — **raising _tens of millions of dollars_** — to flip seats just like this one.

With their campaign coffers loaded and getting bigger by the day, we need to respond and defend Tina’s vision for Oregon to the voters. **But unlike the GOP, we don’t rely on corporate mega-donors who can write giant checks — a lot of what we raise comes from emails just like this, from supporters just like you.**

[**Peter, will you pitch in to Tina’s campaign today to help us go toe-to-toe with the GOP and win this November? clean_body: | “Republicans are eyeing the Oregon governor’s mansion as an opportunity to score a win in a solidly blue state.” — NBC News, 5/30/22 Peter, Tina’s victory in the primary wasn’t by chance. Voters know that Tina is the best candidate for the job. They know she’ll fight for them and get things done. She’s the candidate that will build on our progress and make things happen, rooted in community and justice for all. But Republicans see our race as a rare opportunity to pick up a governor's seat, and their campaign arm has announced record-breaking fundraising hauls — raising tens of millions of dollars — to flip seats just like this one. With their campaign coffers loaded and getting bigger by the day, we need to respond and defend Tina’s vision for Oregon to the voters. But unlike the GOP, we don’t rely on corporate mega-donors who can write giant checks — a lot of what we raise comes from emails just like this, from supporters just like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We know this grassroots team has what it takes to beat back the attacks that are sure to come. So thank you, Peter. We’re grateful to be able to count on the support of people just like you to build a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian. — Team Tina = Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Now that Adam’s jungle primary has passed, we've turned our focus to
another big event on the horizon — the FEC quarterly fundraising deadline
at the end of this month.

Every three months, we file a public report listing all of our
contributions for that period to the FEC along with all other campaigns.
Then, the media highlights stand-out numbers, pundits gauge the energy of
the midterm elections off of them, and Republican politicians and their
dark money donors pore over them looking for signs of weakness.

They’re sure to be scouring over Adam’s and other Democrats’ reports to
try and see where a few million bucks from a dark money super PAC could
swing an election.

In a year where just 4 seats separate us from a Republican House majority,
it's absolutely essential we post a strong number — especially after just
finishing an expensive jungle primary election where Adam is still
introducing himself to tens of thousands of new voters.

Right now, Adam is busy with work in Congress (which you may have seen),
and as a result, he hasn’t had time to fundraise. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]Can you help us make
up for it and be a part of our grassroots fundraising effort by pitching
in $10 today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2022_abs_em.DoGQ0c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2022_abs_em.P8MHmG&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

In a way, the FEC public filing acts as a report card for how much
momentum a campaign has, and with Adam being a high-profile Democrat, all
eyes are sure to be on his numbers to see how our party overall is fairing
during midterm season.

If we want to set the tone that Democrats are staying strong and that the
people reject the thought of a Kevin McCarthy speakership, having a
stand-out report is a must. And we have some work to do.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220611_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=346%2E5257348%2E1D6UsS ]Chip in $10 today to support us in building a movement capable of
defending our House majority in November.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

It's Biden’s top priority

It's Biden's top priority
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ouu7ogno2kng9vadberqo3cvekiniklhgrfst8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjjm2o36c1h2bs)
Navy SEAL Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden here.

Growing up in poverty, I quickly learned the importance of hard work, perseverance, and never letting an opportunity to succeed go to waste. At the age of 18, I left home and enlisted in the Navy. Shortly thereafter I became a Navy SEAL.

I went on to serve five combat deployments in war zones across the globe including Iraq and Afghanistan.

When I left the SEAL teams, I never thought I'd be called to serve again- at home of all places.

But I took an oath to serve and defend our great nation. I knew I had to get into this race to stop the Democrats and their hundred-yard dash to socialism.

Biden and Pelosi know how much I love this country and they know I'd lay down my life to protect it. But that's not going to stop them. They've already spent millions to sink my campaign.

Friend, I don't ask for help often, but today I'm humbly asking you for your support. [**We don 't need to outraise the Dems, we just need to keep them within reach. Just a few bucks?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkc0cj23mjiubojmar8gngvpq65mpl50f30nnr60_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjjm2o36c1h2bs)

I'd love to have you on our team,

Derrick Van Orden
Trump Endorsed Republican
Ret. Navy SEAL
**
** ****
Paid for by Van Orden for Congress

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
“This was an attempted coup of the United States of America."
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220611-3095-header&t=1&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)
In the days and weeks after the January 6 attack, right-wingers tried to downplay what happened. They said it was small. They accused us of lying by saying the attack was “only” at the Capitol dome.
The footage and evidence from the January 6th committee hearing in Congress this week proves that no – they were everywhere. The screams were everywhere.
This is what American terrorism looks like.
Here’s just a few of the revelations from the hearing and other crucial facts.
* The committee will provide proof that Rep. Scott Perry and multiple other Republican members of Congress **sought presidential pardons for their roles** in attempting to overturn the 2020 election and their actions on January 6. It means they consciously knew and believed that their actions were criminal and proceeded to support an attempted coup of the U.S.

* The committee released not previously publicly seen **video footage from police body cameras** , Capitol hallway and office footage, as well as police radio communication, that shows just how coordinated and dangerous the events were. Meanwhile, Republicans like Lauren Boebert were tweeting Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s location as this was all happening.

* **Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife was involved** in January 6th. She attended the rally and relentlessly urged the President’s Chief to overturn the US election. Justice Thomas later refused to recuse himself from rulings related to the matter.1

* **21 Republicans voted against** granting the Congressional Gold Medal to Capitol police officers who tried to defend the Capitol on January 6.2

The facts unveiled are extremely serious and could potentially lead to charges from the Department of Justice. This committee is bipartisan – both Republican and Democratic members were part of the investigation that uncovered these facts – and yesterday was just day one.
Republicans are walking away from this. Trying to pretend it didn’t happen. It’s our responsibility to remember. **The next hearings will take place on Monday and Wednesday at 10:00 AM ET.**[**To watch the hearings, visit the Jan 6 Committee YouTube channel here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14677?t=2&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)**.**
Lastly, the choice we are facing this November is not between two political parties. It’s a choice to save our democracy or to turn it over to the rioters that stormed the Capitol. If you’re able to chip in to help us go toe-to-toe with right-wing Republicans who are still trying to spread lies about what happened, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220611.653H6L&refcode=em20220611-3095-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5).
We’ll keep you posted as the hearings continue.
With resolve,
Team AOC
1 - [New York Times
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14700?t=4&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)2 - [Washington Post](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14701?t=5&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220611?refcode=em20220611-3095-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=6&refcode2=3095_2526796_h0uZh5&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220611-3095-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=7&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3095%2E2526796%2Eh0uZh5)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m honored to have your support. 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I am so deeply honored. ❤️

**Now that I'm *officially* the Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania’s must-win Senate seat,** I want you to know this fight is personal to me -- and I'm asking for your help to bring this race home. 🙏

[**Will you please split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC, so we can flip Pennsylvania blue + expand our already _razor-thin_ Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4715%2E9716520%2EpkPvP3)

We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe it’s because of my height (6’8”) or my tattoos (I have a bunch). But that’s why voters are taking a chance on me.

**The tattoo on my left arm is the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania -- my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years. My wife Gisele + I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.

**And look, I never thought this would be a flex, but I actually live in Pennsylvania!**

I recently found out that my Republican opponent is Dr. Oz -- a quack celebrity TV doctor from New Jersey who made a fortune by lying to people.

I don't know why Dr. Oz thinks he can move to another state + spend millions of his own dollars to buy himself a Senate seat, but **the whole reason I’m running for Senate is because I believe *every* community is worth fighting for like it’s my own. Just like Braddock.**

This election is about making sure no person, no town + no community are left behind.

CNN ranks our race as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022. But in order to build the kind of campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now to go up against Dr. Oz and his millions.

**[So I’m asking you personally: Please, split $5 now between my campaign and the DSCC so we can defeat Dr. Oz, expand our Senate majority + continue the fight for our families:](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4715%2E9716520%2EpkPvP3)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between John Fetterman and the DSCC.
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4715%2E9716520%2EpkPvP3)

It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own.

Thank you for honoring me with your support. ❤️

John

John Fetterman
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Pennsylvania
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4715%2E9716520%2EpkPvP3)
John Fetterman served as Mayor of Braddock for 13 years before running statewide for Lt. Governor -- and flipping 6 counties that Donald Trump won. Now, he’s running for Senate in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Seat, so he can fight for every community like it were his very own. But he needs grassroots supporters like you to join this movement.

**[Chip in now to help John Fetterman flip Pennsylvania blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8092?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220611-JohnFetterman-FettermanTandemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4715%2E9716520%2EpkPvP3)**

Maybe it’s because of my height (6’8”) or my tattoos (I have a bunch). But that’s why voters are taking a chance on me. The tattoo on my left arm is the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania -- my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years. My wife Gisele + I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill. And look, I never thought this would be a flex, but I actually live in Pennsylvania! I recently found out that my Republican opponent is Dr. Oz -- a quack celebrity TV doctor from New Jersey who made a fortune by lying to people. I don't know why Dr. Oz thinks he can move to another state + spend millions of his own dollars to buy himself a Senate seat, but the whole reason I’m running for Senate is because I believe every community is worth fighting for like it’s my own. Just like Braddock. This election is about making sure no person, no town + no community are left behind. CNN ranks our race as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022. But in order to build the kind of campaign that can flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, the honest truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now to go up against Dr. Oz and his millions. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between John Fetterman and the DSCC. | | | | | It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own. Thank you for honoring me with your support. ❤️ John John Fetterman Candidate for U.S. Senate, Pennsylvania Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania John Fetterman served as Mayor of Braddock for 13 years before running statewide for Lt. Governor -- and flipping 6 counties that Donald Trump won. Now, he’s running for Senate in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Seat, so he can fight for every community like it were his very own. But he needs grassroots supporters like you to join this movement. | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. Three quick things to update you on:
1. We just launched a positive TV ad across this swing-district, IL-13.
2. The response from voters has been amazing – they think it's a GREAT ad!
3. Our Primary Election is at the end of this month.

It's very exciting! But here's the important reason we're emailing you:

**We just set a new fundraising goal to raise $12,500 this month from online supporters.**

Now, before we ask you to chip in $3 (or anything you can spare), we want to quickly tell you what we want to accomplish by raising that money:
1. **We need to boost Nikki Budzinski's name ID in this big district.**
1. That means buying more yard signs, paying for mail, and printing walk cards for our field team.
2. **We need to keep running our positive TV ad.**
1. We hate negative ads as much as you do. So we're running a positive ad right now and want to make sure voters see it.
3. **We need to hire more field organizers and feed volunteers.**
1. We need staff to talk to voters directly and explain Nikki's dedication to key issues for working families like affordable healthcare, lowering costs, and increasing the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour.

[**This is by far one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. And, it's one of the ONLY chances that Democrats have to flip this district out of Republican control. Will you chip in $3 toward our $12,500 goal? subject: We have the power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The power rests in our hands to secure the future of the Senate – or to give up all the hard-won progress we have made in the name of equality and justice.
| | |
---
Team, we are on the cusp of a momentous point in history.
The power rests in our hands to secure the future of the Senate – or to give up all the hard-won progress we have made in the name of equality and justice.
That's why today I'm reaching out personally to ask you: **[Will you help us make history this year by keeping Maggie Hassan in the Senate? Even just $3 or $10 will make all the difference when it comes to our razor-thin majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46412823/350139923/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1133-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFhNTg1OC1iZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGVhLoC8hHVYiLjE_q0vG9RB5h_cFw1gQ60KiqB5IBU=)**
I've spent the past four decades making films unpacking the most pressing themes from American history to help interpret our present, and I know a historic moment is upon us.
Our present has perhaps never been so fraught. I've seen New Hampshire go through tumultuous changes over the past 40 years I've been a resident, but I have never before felt such a threat to our democracy.
Maggie Hassan is a vital voice in the Senate, and we cannot afford to lose her tireless work on behalf of Granite Staters and all Americans.
Throughout my career, I've learned that history is not a fixed thing: Each generation has the chance to rediscover and reexamine the past in a way that gives new meaning to the present.
But it will require us to act with all the civil energies at our disposal to reinstate true equality – the hallmark and birthright of ALL Americans.
Maggie is helping us reinstate this equality. But we must give all we can right now to help her on her uphill battle towards reelection.
So I'm asking you now, friend: **[Will you please rush a gift of $3 right now to help us defend Maggie's seat and our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46412824/350139924/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1133-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFhNTg1OC1iZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGVhLoC8hHVYiLjE_q0vG9RB5h_cFw1gQ60KiqB5IBU=)**
Thank you for joining me in making history today.
– Ken
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46412825/350139925/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1133-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFhNTg1OC1iZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGVhLoC8hHVYiLjE_q0vG9RB5h_cFw1gQ60KiqB5IBU=)
_Over the past 40 years, Ken Burns has produced and directed some of the most acclaimed historical documentaries ever made. He has made his home in New Hampshire since 1979._
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46412826/350139926/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk1133-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFhNTg1OC1iZWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lGVhLoC8hHVYiLjE_q0vG9RB5h_cFw1gQ60KiqB5IBU=)**. name: Ryan Kelley for Governor
subject: Peter, The FBI just showed up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563977:6ygzvFoqN:m:1:3317145305:9D566FAB80D069A9DD1E7C33CE4B7993:r)
---
| | Peter, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. **_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. That's ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. **That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. ** I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. _I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. _ There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative _**will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people**_ and attempting to steal our God-given rights. _I_ _need_ _your_ _help_. [I need you to make a donation right now and help me fight back. I have no intention of letting up now. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563977:6ygzvFoqN:m:1:3317145305:9D566FAB80D069A9DD1E7C33CE4B7993:r) That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: _What will you do next?_ Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you [click the link, make a donation, and be part of the true grassroots movement that is building here](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60563977:6ygzvFoqN:m:1:3317145305:9D566FAB80D069A9DD1E7C33CE4B7993:r)? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. **They want us silent. They want us on our knees.** Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me. This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. That's ok. The media and the establishment swamp have tried to pretend I don't exist, but I am now leading in the polls to be the Republican nominee for Governor in Michigan. That's right. Governor. In Michigan. A state where election fraud happened and Trump's victory was stolen...and Biden's DOJ just had me arrested. I started this campaign for a simple reason. The government's grip on the throat of its citizenry has grown so tight as to make our republic unrecognizable. When the COVID lockdowns came to Michigan and the "vaccine passport", and "rules for thee but not for me" crowd unconstitutionally locked us in our homes and closed businesses and took away our rights--I stood up. I stood up. And this is what happens when you stand up to tyranny in Biden's America. I will never bend the knee to tyrants. I don't think you will either. There is a simple answer. We beat them. We beat them at the ballot box so badly that they can't cheat. They can't steal it. We beat them so badly that no government, no political party, no deep state operative will ever, ever forget the consequence of oppressing the will of the people and attempting to steal our God-given rights. I need your help. That they're trying to throw me in prison shows they're scared. You know what will scare them more? A war chest unrivaled in history. A war chest that says every man and woman across this country who believes in liberty and the rights of the people are standing arm-in-arm ready to defend those rights. You've probably never gotten a letter from a political prisoner, but you're getting one now. The question is: What will you do next? Will you delete this email and go back to your day waiting around for them to take away your next freedom? Maybe your second and first amendment rights next? Or will you ? I've made it clear where I stand. I will not back down. I will not stop defending OUR rights. Yours and mine. I need you to commit, right now. Click the link, make as generous a donation as you can. They want us silent. They want us on our knees. Stand up. Stand with me. Get involved right now, while there is still time. Ryan D. Kelley, Political prisoner and candidate for Governor. | | | | | | Paid for by Michigan for Ryan D. name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Wanted to update you on how things are going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Texans deserve a governor who will always put them first — over the interests of their political donors.
#
Hi — it's Nick, Beto's campaign manager.
These past few weeks have been some of the hardest of my professional career, but they've also reminded me of exactly why I joined this campaign. When 19 children and two teachers were killed in Uvalde, Beto stopped all fundraising and went directly to Uvalde to be with this beautiful community.
_Greg Abbott went the opposite direction to attend a political fundraiser that very evening._
**That is why we are doing this work. Because Texans deserve a governor who will always put them first — over the interests of their political donors.**
**[It's on us to elect a governor who will finally take action to keep Texans safe. Will you chip in $3 or more right now to help Beto defeat Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220611-1.njtvIe&refcode=ema20220611-193456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=193456%2E444211%2ECfzzGd)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220611-1.njtvIe&refcode=ema20220611-193456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=193456%2E444211%2ECfzzGd)**
It's simple: Greg Abbott has failed Texas. We have no choice but to respond by building the largest organizing movement this state has ever seen to spread the word about his failed agenda and share Beto's positive, unifying vision for this state.
Political pundits will tell you that the odds are stacked against us — and we certainly have a lot to overcome, including Abbott's more than $50 million in the bank. **But I know we have what it takes to make history.**
Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and first-time voters alike are joining our campaign in record numbers to organize for the change they want to see in Texas. People are turning tragedy into action, as we just witnessed our biggest week of organizing so far. From being at events with Beto, I can tell you that our momentum continues to grow.
[So I'm humbly asking: Will you please be one of the grassroots donors we need to power our campaign and help elect Beto? We’re building the movement to make it possible, and it's happening one $3 donation at a time.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220611-1.njtvIe&refcode=ema20220611-193456&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=193456%2E444211%2ECfzzGd)
I'm so grateful to be in this fight with you.
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220611-193456-footer&t=22&refcode2=193456_444211_CfzzGd&akid=193456%2E444211%2ECfzzGd)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

clean_body: This is what it takes. | | | Peter, $7. That’s what we’re asking you to donate to our campaign to elect Odessa Kelly and flip Tennessee’s 7th District blue. Unlike our anti-LGBTQ+ extremist opponent Mark Green, we’re a grassroots-powered movement that doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. We’re able to hire organizers, run ads, and hold events because of thousands of people chipping in donations as small as $7 to help us campaign. We’ve got big plans this month, from showing up and showing out at Nashville Pride to launching our summer organizing trainings, and that’ll take a lot of resources. Signs, shirts, clipboards, and even gas don’t pay for themselves. We rely 100% on grassroots supporters to power this movement because when Odessa gets to Congress, she’ll be accountable only to the people of the 7th district, not corporate PACs. Thank you for being part of this movement fighting for change. Together, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

The truth is, Republicans are panicking because Val Demings is only _a few points_ behind Marco Rubio. And if she wins, Democrats are practically guaranteed to keep Senate control **– so the GOP will spend whatever it takes to buy this seat.**
That means Val Demings is facing the full power of the GOP establishment. The Senate Republican campaign arm and RNC have targeted her personally. And now, a Rubio-aligned super PAC is unleashing a new SEVEN-FIGURE wave of attack ads to defeat Val Demings – all in an effort to turn Florida red PERMANENTLY.

name: Missouri Republican Party
subject: Ranked Choice Voting Wrong for Missouri!!
body:
| [ ](http://mogop.nationbuilder.com/?e=0dfd3a06cfe3c611511abac6047b8f95&utm_source=mogop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_6_11&n=1)
---
Peter -- Last month, the out of state funded Better Elections campaign, submitted over 300,000 signatures to get the proposed constitutional amendment to change elections in Missouri on the November ballot this year. The Ranked-Choice initiative would open Missouri primaries, so that all the candidates, regardless of party affiliation, are listed on one ballot. **This creates a jungle primary.** The four candidates for a particular office who get the most votes in the primary would all advance to the general election. Voters would then be expected to vote for all four candidates in the general, ranking them from 1-4, with 1 being the voter’s favorite choice and their 2nd, 3rd, and 4th choices being essentially their “backup” votes. If no candidate intially receives a majority of the total first choice votes, or 50% plus one vote, the candidate with the least amount of first choice votes gets eliminated and the votes of those who voted for that candidate as their first are reallocated to their second choice candidate. This allocation would continue until one of the candidates has a majority of the votes, which can be made up of 1st choice, 2nd choice, 3rd choice, or even 4th choice votes. This system of voting would not be good for Missouri and is designed to chip away at the Republican’s stronghold by handing candidates with marginal support a real chance to win a whole election with a faux majority. Not only that, but **99.9%** of the funding behind this initiative is coming from Virginia and D.C. Why are out of state interests trying to change our Missouri elections? Here are just a few examples of how ranked-choice voting has turned out in other jurisdictions:
* In Australia in the 2010 election: the center right party, the Liberal-National coalition received 43 percent of the first choice votes, while the liberal Labor Party only won 38 percent of those first choice votes. The Labor Party won the Australian House after the reallocation of votes. Having a ranked-choice system undermineded the votes of those who wanted a more conservative choice directing their government.
* Maine’s Second Congressional District election in 2018: Again, the Republican, Bruce Poliquin initially had the most first choice votes with 46% but after counting second choice votes, the Democrat Jared Golden was determined to have won the “majority” and declared the winner. But Golden never got a real majority because Maine’s Secretary of State, Matt Dunlop, “exhausted” or threw out a total of 14,076 ballots of voters’ _who had not ranked all of the candidates (_ only voted for one candidate, instead of ranking all of the candidates). Golden really prevailed by winning 49 percent of the vote, not 51%.
* San Francisco Board of Supervisors, 2010 Election: After multiple rounds of counting, a winner was declared with a majority of 4,321 votes — but, by that time, 9,608 ballots had been discarded due to “exhaustion.”
* A study published in 2015 reviewed the exhaustion rate of 600,000 votes cast using ranked- choice voting in four local elections in Washington State and California. The study found two things: First, on average, over 10% of ballots get thrown out due to exhaustion. Secondly, the winner in all four of these elections received LESS than a majority of the total votes cast, despite the claims that with ranked-choice a candidate is only elected who receives a REAL majority of votes.

As you can see from these examples, a big problem with ranked-choice voting is exhaustion. Voters do not want to vote for every candidate, but if they don’t want their ballot thrown out after the first couple of rounds, they must. Even if they strongly disagree with those other candidates. This is how candidates with marginal support end up winning, because this system of voting “forces” the electorate to cast a vote for every candidate. If the petition signatures are approved, which they probably will be, this proposed constitutional amendment is going to be on the November ballot. Keep Missouri Red by keeping ranked-choice voting out of our state. Make sure you and your friends vote no on this amendment. Missouri Republican Party
[http://mogop.nationbuilder.com/](http://mogop.nationbuilder.com/?e=0dfd3a06cfe3c611511abac6047b8f95&utm_source=mogop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_6_11&n=2)
The Missouri Republican Party · PO Box 73, Jefferson City, MO 65102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mogop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=0dfd3a06cfe3c611511abac6047b8f95&utm_source=mogop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_6_11&n=3).

The four candidates for a particular office who get the most votes in the primary would all advance to the general election. Voters would then be expected to vote for all four candidates in the general, ranking them from 1-4, with 1 being the voter’s favorite choice and their 2nd, 3rd, and 4th choices being essentially their “backup” votes. If no candidate intially receives a majority of the total first choice votes, or 50% plus one vote, the candidate with the least amount of first choice votes gets eliminated and the votes of those who voted for that candidate as their first are reallocated to their second choice candidate. This allocation would continue until one of the candidates has a majority of the votes, which can be made up of 1st choice, 2nd choice, 3rd choice, or even 4th choice votes. This system of voting would not be good for Missouri and is designed to chip away at the Republican’s stronghold by handing candidates with marginal support a real chance to win a whole election with a faux majority. Not only that, but 99.9% of the funding behind this initiative is coming from Virginia and D.C. Why are out of state interests trying to change our Missouri elections? Here are just a few examples of how ranked-choice voting has turned out in other jurisdictions: In Australia in the 2010 election: the center right party, the Liberal-National coalition received 43 percent of the first choice votes, while the liberal Labor Party only won 38 percent of those first choice votes. The Labor Party won the Australian House after the reallocation of votes. Having a ranked-choice system undermineded the votes of those who wanted a more conservative choice directing their government. Maine’s Second Congressional District election in 2018: Again, the Republican, Bruce Poliquin initially had the most first choice votes with 46% but after counting second choice votes, the Democrat Jared Golden was determined to have won the “majority” and declared the winner. But Golden never got a real majority because Maine’s Secretary of State, Matt Dunlop, “exhausted” or threw out a total of 14,076 ballots of voters’ who had not ranked all of the candidates ( only voted for one candidate, instead of ranking all of the candidates). Golden really prevailed by winning 49 percent of the vote, not 51%. San Francisco Board of Supervisors, 2010 Election: After multiple rounds of counting, a winner was declared with a majority of 4,321 votes — but, by that time, 9,608 ballots had been discarded due to “exhaustion.” A study published in 2015 reviewed the exhaustion rate of 600,000 votes cast using ranked- choice voting in four local elections in Washington State and California. The study found two things: First, on average, over 10% of ballots get thrown out due to exhaustion. Secondly, the winner in all four of these elections received LESS than a majority of the total votes cast, despite the claims that with ranked-choice a candidate is only elected who receives a REAL majority of votes. As you can see from these examples, a big problem with ranked-choice voting is exhaustion. Voters do not want to vote for every candidate, but if they don’t want their ballot thrown out after the first couple of rounds, they must. Even if they strongly disagree with those other candidates. This is how candidates with marginal support end up winning, because this system of voting “forces” the electorate to cast a vote for every candidate. If the petition signatures are approved, which they probably will be, this proposed constitutional amendment is going to be on the November ballot. Keep Missouri Red by keeping ranked-choice voting out of our state. Make sure you and your friends vote no on this amendment. Missouri Republican Party The Missouri Republican Party · PO Box 73, Jefferson City, MO 65102, United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent’s campaign.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06bfdi3f234m4bd6nu7ag57o8jo0kc9dvshjcm8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpm8s36mjhr9pr462qj9o9iedieas9m6tg74pjkcprbfdj2elgreddh64pbaotn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj35cllmjjr4cr66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgm9pr4s5j64oh5u)

| | | Friend,

**Great news! We won Georgia 's Republican primary for U.S. Senate.**

I'll be the Republican nominee to face Democrat Raphael Warnock in the Senate race in November, which means this fight is heating up.

It's no secret that Democrats are pushing millions of dollars into Georgia to defeat me, fueling my opponent's campaign. In the first three months of the year, my opponent raised $13.6 MILLION - _that 's $151,000 per day or $105 per minute!_

Raphael Warnock has outraised EVERY candidate in the country, which is why I'm reaching out to you now. _**[Friend, I need your help now more than ever.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6et00khq051t74cdt1ilcujujt00tbftgtumecg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjjm9ob6c9h2bs "Friend, I need your help now more than ever.")**_

_**[If you're able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it's $1 or $100, your help is critical.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97ht11ugl7noqm4qrbmhdtqfjrbc03g5d5pl84g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cjjm9ob6c9h2bs "If you’re able, would you please contribute any amount to help us close the fundraising gap? I promise that every penny counts, so whether it’s $1 or $100, your help is critical.")**_

We must band together to flip this crucial Senate seat in Georgia. It's up to strong conservatives like us to win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track.

Thank you for your continued support.

On to victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Peter Welch
subject: The state of our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
There’s no way we can trust Senate Republicans with the majority again, and definitely not while Mitch McConnell is in a position of power.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
Hello,
I'm running in the hope of bringing some more of Vermont's common sense approach to the Senate. And it couldn’t be more important that we win. Because everything, including our imperiled democracy, is on the line.
This is a moment in history that requires action—we’ve got a really good shot at following through on our progressive vision. I'll be there on Day One fighting for everything we believe in. But this will require a strong grassroots coalition, so I’m hoping I can count on your support for this all-important Senate campaign right away.
[**Our democracy is on the line, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate not just to protect it, but to make it even stronger. Can you chip in $5 and help make our vision for America a reality?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=3&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=15&amount=3&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=17&amount=15&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=19&amount=28&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=21&amount=50&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=11&amount=100&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=13&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---

---
To me, getting things done is at the heart of public service. _Are you bringing home results for your constituents? Are you fighting as hard as you can for the big, bold solutions this country needs for its future?_
For Senate Republicans, the answer to both questions is a resounding no. Time and time again, we see them fight for failure. And if they win the Senate in November, it will be more of the same. They’re targeting Vermont, so it’s up to us to show them Vermont is not for sale.
Any chance we have at enshrining abortion rights in federal law, fixing our gun laws, protecting the right to vote, combatting climate change, lowering health care costs, and so much more starts and ends with the Senate Democrats holding onto and building upon their ranks. This race in Vermont could make or break it all. I’m in it because I believe we can win it, and I know you do too. We just need to keep building our momentum through the summer, and that work has already begun.
[**Can you make a $5 contribution right away? Together, we’ll create the change we’re looking for in our country, and I’m excited for the opportunity.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2946?t=7&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
Thanks for all you do,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22jun?refcode=em_20220611_f_p_gop&refcode2=522_61531_zPJuiN&akid=522%2E61531%2EzPJuiN)
---
---

---|---|---

Richmond, VT 05477

name: Christy Smith
subject: Happy Pride Month! 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414040/350148665/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhMDkzNC1jYWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLM6lPWUXmyslAk1d0sdylnFSFjnrbxiPaeOLZAzsfM=&emci=5bbb5ce2-e6e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b0a0934-cae9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Happy Pride Month, Peter!

**Pride is a time to celebrate our LGBTQ+ community, and a time to remember those who fought for equality.**

Those like Marsha P. Johnson, who was an instrumental figure in the Stonewall Riots, which kickstarted the LGBTQ+ equality movement. Those like Sylvia Rivera, who tirelessly fought for the inclusion of transgender and gender non-conforming people in the LGBTQ+ equality movement. And those like Harvey Milk, the first openly gay politician in California, who advocated for legal protections for gay and trans people.

**I will always fight to make CA-27 – and the rest of the country – a more equal and just place.**

[**As we celebrate our LGBTQ+ community this month, please join me in the fight for equality. Add your name now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414041/350148666/-1919437383?refcode=em22_220611_Pride&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhMDkzNC1jYWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLM6lPWUXmyslAk1d0sdylnFSFjnrbxiPaeOLZAzsfM=&emci=5bbb5ce2-e6e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b0a0934-cae9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414042/350148667/-1919437383?refcode=em22_220611_Pride&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhMDkzNC1jYWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLM6lPWUXmyslAk1d0sdylnFSFjnrbxiPaeOLZAzsfM=&emci=5bbb5ce2-e6e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b0a0934-cae9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749) **Unfortunately, the fight for LGBTQ+ equality is far from over.**

**Policies, like Florida's "Don't Say Gay" bill, continue to be passed in state legislatures across the country.** Last year, extreme Republicans in the House – including Mike Garcia – voted "no" on passing the Equality Act, legislation that would have barred discrimination based on sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity in areas like employment, housing, and education.

There is still more work to be done. **But unlike Garcia, I promise I will always fight for your right to love who you love and be your true, authentic self.**

[**In the wake of the constant attacks on our LGBTQ+ equality, it is paramount that we do everything in our power to show our support to the LGBTQ+ community and fight for their right to exist. Add your name to join me in recommitting to the fight for equality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414043/350148668/-1919437383?refcode=em22_220611_Pride&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhMDkzNC1jYWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLM6lPWUXmyslAk1d0sdylnFSFjnrbxiPaeOLZAzsfM=&emci=5bbb5ce2-e6e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b0a0934-cae9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414044/350148669/-1919437383?refcode=em22_220611_Pride&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBhMDkzNC1jYWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLM6lPWUXmyslAk1d0sdylnFSFjnrbxiPaeOLZAzsfM=&emci=5bbb5ce2-e6e8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b0a0934-cae9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749) Thank you,

Christy

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor
Derek,

Encanto took the world by storm. It’s on the radio. It’s everywhere on
TikTok. Our kids have played “We Don’t Talk About Bruno” for the millionth
time. And now, you can see your favorite cast with your favorite candidate
in one place.

Two of the stars from the movie sensation — Stephanie Beatriz who played
Mirabel and Jessica Darrow who played her sister Luisa — are joining
Stacey Abrams for an [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1443?refcode=sa_em_220611_B2_Encanto_S1_T1_HQ_t4&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&akid=608%2E1862389%2ERSA_t4 ]exclusive virtual fundraiser just for you.

This Sunday, June 12 at 5:15 PM ET, Stacey, Stephanie and Jessica will
discuss Stacey’s vision for One Georgia, the latest updates about our race
and answer some of your questions about Encanto and more! Because we don’t
talk about Bruno, but we do talk about voting rights and the issues that
matter to our communities.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1443?refcode=sa_em_220611_B2_Encanto_S1_T1_HQ_t4&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1002&akid=608%2E1862389%2ERSA_t4 ]No pressure, but we’d love for you to join us tomorrow,
Derek. Claim your ticket now
with a grassroots donation of just $5 or more.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1444?refcode=sa_em_220611_B2_Encanto_S1_T1_HQ_t4&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1003&akid=608%2E1862389%2ERSA_t4 ]Join Stephanie Beatriz, Jessica Darrow and Stacey Abrams for a virtual
fundraiser on Sunday June 12 at 5:15 p.m. ET

We hope to see you there,
