name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Sign on as a Citizen Co-sponsor to Fight White Supremacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

On May 14, an 18-year-old gunman viciously took the lives of 10 Americans
and injured three more. Eleven of the 13 victims were Black Americans.

This act of terror was inspired and initiated by a white supremacist
conspiracy called the “Great Replacement Theory”— a deeply harmful
ideology that describes a false plot where non-white immigrants are
entering America to disempower and subjugate white people. It is a tool
used to justify Islamophobia, xenophobia, and mass murder.

Peter, we can no
longer wait for Congress to take action. That’s why this week I introduced
House Resolution 1152 to clearly address the tragedy in Buffalo, NY,
implement a national day of remembrance, and urge the whole of Congress to
be diligent in combating white supremacy. I’m proud to say it passed with
218 votes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110439?t=1002&akid=23780%2E1203867%2E25AS_K ]Will you sign on and stand with me and House Democrats as we call for
immediate action to end white supremacy? Add your name to strengthen our
call for change.

Add your name »

The Buffalo shooting was one of the worst racially motivated massacres in
New York’s history. I can remember sobbing in my car, terrified of taking
my children to school as I thought about what could possibly happen to
them. I just couldn’t bear it — and that’s why this work is so deeply
personal and important to me and millions of Americans across the country.

House Resolution 1152 is not just a one-off action. It’s about continuing
to look at where white nationalism lives and breathes in our democracy and
our law enforcement.

We often believe that Republican rhetoric is so outrageous that American
people aren’t going to be influenced by it. Yet, the Great Replacement
Theory has been highlighted hundreds of times by conservative news sources
and has been invoked by mass shooters at the Tree of Life synagogue in
Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania in 2018, in El Paso, Texas in 2019, and by the
Christchurch shooter in New Zealand, in 2019.

If this rhetoric radicalizes just one person to commit mass murder, then
we have failed as a Democratic Party, and irreversible damage has already
been done. We need to do everything in our power to push back against it.

Peter, the swift
passage of this resolution is but the first of many steps in our fight to
rid our nation and our democracy of white supremacy once and for all.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110439?t=1003&akid=23780%2E1203867%2E25AS_K ]Add your name today in support of our resolution to fight back against
racist rhetoric and work to build a safe, unified, and multi-racial
democracy and community that we deserve.

Add your name »

Peace and love,

Jamaal Bowman

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220611-23780-footer&t=1004&refcode2=23780_1203867_25AS_K&akid=23780%2E1203867%2E25AS_K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, On May 14, an 18-year-old gunman viciously took the lives of 10 Americans and injured three more. Eleven of the 13 victims were Black Americans. This act of terror was inspired and initiated by a white supremacist conspiracy called the “Great Replacement Theory”— a deeply harmful ideology that describes a false plot where non-white immigrants are entering America to disempower and subjugate white people. It is a tool used to justify Islamophobia, xenophobia, and mass murder. Peter, we can no longer wait for Congress to take action. That’s why this week I introduced House Resolution 1152 to clearly address the tragedy in Buffalo, NY, implement a national day of remembrance, and urge the whole of Congress to be diligent in combating white supremacy. I’m proud to say it passed with 218 votes. [ ]Will you sign on and stand with me and House Democrats as we call for immediate action to end white supremacy? Add your name to strengthen our call for change. Add your name » The Buffalo shooting was one of the worst racially motivated massacres in New York’s history. I can remember sobbing in my car, terrified of taking my children to school as I thought about what could possibly happen to them. I just couldn’t bear it — and that’s why this work is so deeply personal and important to me and millions of Americans across the country. House Resolution 1152 is not just a one-off action. It’s about continuing to look at where white nationalism lives and breathes in our democracy and our law enforcement. We often believe that Republican rhetoric is so outrageous that American people aren’t going to be influenced by it. Yet, the Great Replacement Theory has been highlighted hundreds of times by conservative news sources and has been invoked by mass shooters at the Tree of Life synagogue in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania in 2018, in El Paso, Texas in 2019, and by the Christchurch shooter in New Zealand, in 2019. If this rhetoric radicalizes just one person to commit mass murder, then we have failed as a Democratic Party, and irreversible damage has already been done. We need to do everything in our power to push back against it. Peter, the swift passage of this resolution is but the first of many steps in our fight to rid our nation and our democracy of white supremacy once and for all. [ ]Add your name today in support of our resolution to fight back against racist rhetoric and work to build a safe, unified, and multi-racial democracy and community that we deserve. Add your name » Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Andrew Dolberg, Team Jared
subject: Reminder: Join us June 15th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m writing with a reminder to join Jared Moskowitz, Congressman Ted Deutch, Brady PAC Senior Advisor Fred Guttenberg, Giffords Florida Director Sami Barrios, and a representative from Moms Demand Action for a gun violence prevention forum on June 15th.

After the tragic shooting in Parkland, Jared championed the most comprehensive gun violence prevention, mental health, and school safety legislation in Florida history. At next week’s event, we’ll be discussing how to get this done in Washington.

Please click here to RSVP and join us for this important discussion. [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_tOCzb4BcQGa_WF0-FM4uiQ]

After the slew of mass shootings over the past month, we need bold action more than ever before.

Jared took action in Tallahassee. With your support, he’ll win this race and make sure Congress does the same.

Please click here to join us for next week’s forum and learn more about how together, we can keep our kids safe and put an end to gun violence. [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_tOCzb4BcQGa_WF0-FM4uiQ]

Thank you for your continued support,
Andrew Dolberg
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

| | ****NEW AD ALERT: Paying the Price****
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2d32b0eaf0f4470baf797d2617357a6c&_e=ggbmN5Z-WtLUrP0zVm6aCrVw9Acd9msCMG17S-_nsZGgDXlqNOY_b2Er1oMipJcytryyYHOda9lRDlLnpkK92CIk1DogFEu9p8IGfPV--T32luGC3HuNx-Z2c-ugFLXfjdVwQv_frjn_8NBshHfCd94uJ1dGPiGPiMw48Cww4MTItaOveJqEIrVhbdxIDUp8jmV1w1hE9s92zMmSK8qZQQxw-LmiTMftncAJpoLr8BqL9vP8eCQdbBpa0HRGQ0M5rkTcr1uPyEGKQO61mCydFC2hIClMkFNgyZe_4XE5UR0%3D)
---
Skyrocketing inflation, fueled by Washington’s out-of-control spending, is a hidden tax that's crushing every hardworking Alabamian. As Alabama’s Senator, I will fight to balance the budget, secure American energy independence, support good-paying jobs and 21st century opportunity across Alabama, and get inflation under control. Together, we will preserve the dignity of an honest day’s work and save the American Dream for our children and our children’s children.
---

The planned assassination of Justice Kavanaugh must be condemned by all — and the perpetrator must face the full force of the law. This is an attack on the institution of the Supreme Court and the rule of law. Make no mistake— this is also a direct result of the leak of the Supreme Court’s draft Dobbs decision, subsequent rhetoric against the Court, and the White House and Department of Justice standing by while Justices were intimidated and harassed at their homes. The leaker must be identified and DOJ must act.

clean_body: | | | | | OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER | | **NEW AD ALERT: Paying the Price Skyrocketing inflation, fueled by Washington’s out-of-control spending, is a hidden tax that's crushing every hardworking Alabamian. As Alabama’s Senator, I will fight to balance the budget, secure American energy independence, support good-paying jobs and 21st century opportunity across Alabama, and get inflation under control. Together, we will preserve the dignity of an honest day’s work and save the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. | | Katie On the Campaign Trail It was great campaigning across Clay, Coosa and Elmore Counties yesterday! With just two weeks left until the June 21 runoff, we’re continuing to work hard every day to share our message! | | Biden’s Response to Baby Formula Shortage The Biden formula crisis continues to get worse. Alabama moms and kids are suffering because of Joe Biden’s incompetence. As Senator, I’ll hold the Biden administration accountable. | | Katie Responds to Planned Kavanaugh Assassination Attempt The planned assassination of Justice Kavanaugh must be condemned by all — and the perpetrator must face the full force of the law. This is an attack on the institution of the Supreme Court and the rule of law. Make no mistake— this is also a direct result of the leak of the Supreme Court’s draft Dobbs decision, subsequent rhetoric against the Court, and the White House and Department of Justice standing by while Justices were intimidated and harassed at their homes. The leaker must be identified and DOJ must act. | | Katie on “Unscripted” I was happy to interview live today on ’s “Unscripted” show. We have under five months until Election Day, and our race is heating up, Peter. Four pro-Trump, pro-NRA, anti-choice Republicans are running to flip WA-08, a Kevin McCarthy-aligned super PAC announced they’re spending _$3.9 million_ to attack Kim, and we’re quickly approaching our biggest fundraising deadline so far this cycle at the end of June.

## The Boogey Man of Gas Prices
### Saturday, June 11th 2022
Friend, Some say Putin is to blame for rising gas prices. Others point fingers at OPEC. But here's the real culprit behind rising gas prices and why it's going up so much... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb2XAXkYEf2yI4563T2JYa9wi_PwhFcXD1KpoL1g5W0Dw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_boogey_man_of_gas_prices&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb2XAXkYEf2yI4563T2JYa9wi_PwhFcXD1KpoL1g5W0Dw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_boogey_man_of_gas_prices&n=3)
No one knows how high gas prices will climb, but one thing is for sure, with the large increase in the money supply, we are not going back down to $2 gas. If it did, that would mean our economy has halted and we're in an economic depression. Minnesota families need their surplus money back. But Republican Senators are negotiating with Governor Walz on how to spend it. And they want to have a Special Session so they can blow our surplus on more wasteful government spending. Tell your legislator "No Special Session unless they Give Back ALL the surplus to us." | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoeydXsGz92cVrFhOOGKxAVM6_YCm43WSS4uZsz0eMdEnx&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_boogey_man_of_gas_prices&n=4 "Contact Your Senator") [Contact Your Senator](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoeydXsGz92cVrFhOOGKxAVM6_YCm43WSS4uZsz0eMdEnx&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_boogey_man_of_gas_prices&n=4)

clean_body: | The Boogey Man of Gas Prices Saturday, June 11th 2022 Friend, Some say Putin is to blame for rising gas prices. Others point fingers at OPEC. But here's the real culprit behind rising gas prices and why it's going up so much... No one knows how high gas prices will climb, but one thing is for sure, with the large increase in the money supply, we are not going back down to $2 gas. If it did, that would mean our economy has halted and we're in an economic depression. Minnesota families need their surplus money back. But Republican Senators are negotiating with Governor Walz on how to spend it. And they want to have a Special Session so they can blow our surplus on more wasteful government spending. Tell your legislator "No Special Session unless they Give Back ALL the surplus to us." | "Contact Your Senator" Jake Duesenberg Action 4 Liberty "Support Us"

body:
| Hi there, **The violence we have seen in our country this past week is unacceptable. Despite what politicians like Senator Lankford may say, our gun laws are contributing to the violence we continue to see. ** Across the U.S. people are marching demanding, common sense gun reform and know were at the Oklahoma Capitol building just hours ago doing the same because _we ARE the campaign that shows up!_ I believe in responsible firearm ownership and when elected, I will work to:
1. Enhance the background check process
2. Support firearm training and testing pathways for obtaining a firearm
3. Enact firearm license renewal process with periodic training and evaluation steps
4. Establish higher qualifications and requirements to obtain assault and military grade firearms
5. Create a tax on firearms with a percentage going to community outreach and safety programs

[**_Now is the time to take action if you believe in sensible gun reform and help us win in November. _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414690/350152359/-90123?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_20220331_1_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjAwZGYzNS1kM2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CRh95dm_flWUiRK3gpXHAZO0Kmw_g-iAozIJC_Kg2Bw=) [**_Will you take action by dontating _****_$10, $20, $50,_****_or even $200 TOD_**** _AY? _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414691/350152360/-90123?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_20220331_1_8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjAwZGYzNS1kM2U5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CRh95dm_flWUiRK3gpXHAZO0Kmw_g-iAozIJC_Kg2Bw=) We need to keep our communities safe. name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20St.=20John?=
subject: Keep Your Eye on the Ball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/keep-your-eye-on-the-ball?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Friends,

Nothing Up My Sleeve

We marvel at the practiced skills of any truly great magician. Where did it go? Where did that come from? How did he do that? The answer of course is sleight of hand.

Practiced fingers and thousands of repetitions deceive the audience while the magician directs their attention away from what’s actually happening at the moment of deception. We are watching master deceivers at work in Washington and most Americans don’t even know it.

While we’re trying to figure out if we can buy enough gas to get to work, our gun rights are being taken away and the second amendment tossed in the trash. While we’re focused on the latest CDC booster guidelines, America is facing a looming food crisis the likes of which most Americans have never even imagined. While Wall Street corporations celebrate “pride month,” our children are being sexually groomed and indoctrinated as early as preschool, our borders are being overrun, and we are heading into the greatest global food crisis in recent history. We face rolling blackouts this summer, a worsening fuel crisis, and a looming financial meltdown that threatens the entire American economy.

It’s already too late to entirely avoid many of the disasters created by the liberal fixation on a new world order. The upcoming elections will determine whether America emerges from the imminent crisis or whether we disappear into the textbooks of history.

Southwest Washington needs a representative who will not allow the White House, social media, and the mainstream media to distract her from the essential task of protecting our constitutional rights and navigating America through the dangerous seas ahead. That’s why I’m seeking your vote in 2022.

Washington State is worth fighting for—and together, we can restore law and order to our nation and our state. Please help me get to Congress by [donating here](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=2ab6e0cef4&e=b0bcc6b4f9). Sincerely,
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Hi Friends, Nothing Up My Sleeve We marvel at the practiced skills of any truly great magician. Where did it go? Where did that come from? How did he do that? The answer of course is sleight of hand. Practiced fingers and thousands of repetitions deceive the audience while the magician directs their attention away from what’s actually happening at the moment of deception. We are watching master deceivers at work in Washington and most Americans don’t even know it. While we’re trying to figure out if we can buy enough gas to get to work, our gun rights are being taken away and the second amendment tossed in the trash. While we’re focused on the latest CDC booster guidelines, America is facing a looming food crisis the likes of which most Americans have never even imagined. While Wall Street corporations celebrate “pride month,” our children are being sexually groomed and indoctrinated as early as preschool, our borders are being overrun, and we are heading into the greatest global food crisis in recent history. We face rolling blackouts this summer, a worsening fuel crisis, and a looming financial meltdown that threatens the entire American economy. It’s already too late to entirely avoid many of the disasters created by the liberal fixation on a new world order. The upcoming elections will determine whether America emerges from the imminent crisis or whether we disappear into the textbooks of history. Southwest Washington needs a representative who will not allow the White House, social media, and the mainstream media to distract her from the essential task of protecting our constitutional rights and navigating America through the dangerous seas ahead. That’s why I’m seeking your vote in 2022. Washington State is worth fighting for—and together, we can restore law and order to our nation and our state. Please help me get to Congress by . name: Sarah Longwell
subject: We stan Liz Cheney
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
|
---
Friend,

The January 6 Committee held its first major hearing detailing its investigation last night, and what they had to say should shock every American. I felt the same sickness in the pit of my stomach watching the new footage of the attack that I did on the day itself. And what the committee has laid out so far is harrowing. We learned that not only did Donald Trump refuse to deploy the National Guard to stop the violence, but the committee also showed how everyone from Trump’s closest advisors to his family were begging him to call off his supporters. It was a moment of crisis for our democracy. But for too many Republican leaders, these revelations mean nothing. [As Liz Cheney said last night](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX0xnB3jwZSTW8TyX931J_nVTW1FPBGm4L9P14N6J4pZr3q90_V1-WJV7CgJgwW6dy9SY2bT_8ZVHWn_g7x9J9PW40qY_73pKHL4W9l-5pN8MXDRhW64qz1F4_hp3hW6MCVKH8rbqKwW2yPZbX7frC_-W891XZB3vyyGCW6SyZnv7zDHwjW74Y8KP56RBRSN5fTmLBQ5j15W3_DhHc28-GNPMLQ_sHvMp8RW2jSkBb3w1b5hN8mTQNbqSLR0W7sbDF2946PdWN3KJZTS2B8rxW86WTsZ6yLG_MW85DHfN1VLwmKW85YllW79cH0kW6Wl3Sq21v4xbW3yCSLH6LDmBRW5flGDQ9j-N-_W79llZv7X8TNpW8j-ZHx8jF9rkW8YR6q124-ZFyW7QF0cl3jRqz0W4J_GZs46g4kPN28FSndCMxQdW3bxmLh7m6R1Z3fML1), “there will come a day when Donald Trump is gone, that your dishonor will remain.”
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX0xnB3jwZSTW8TyX931J_nVTW1FPBGm4L9P14N6J4pZr3q90_V1-WJV7CgVNnW1C7msw7lknxjW84k5Ts6y4w79W4dKgDB4w7r0pN7RFg3gBj5jMW8kPx0b18wCDCN8PqRkc1njqpW38j9fq1ZY0FKN9jZVxw_cxwKW3QTyM86_6cYwW2kqRST2VS1m0W3k-BLJ50wWRKW8cgMLL7zZxgDV_T2Hf7f2znWW7T703z8jrczwW6MD-K25Hk2D0N5Fddvd8WDsGW7X8KgC4rnr-nW4qRyGj4cn9pHW6rXYf-94VbxhW4Dc7x824JtQdW6K5wP-49sy8zN8vvdMBMdc0ZW7STG-91rM45-W97N1gH8nDQHXW11-z1h4lyQ1GW7jJxLs8tHtWNW3--2Hl6DLJWLN8Q0FlRJYbB6N6ps5V0mdxLRW70jykW2s8wkJ3cYL1)
---
And for those who only watch Fox News or Newsmax, they may never even hear what the committee presented.
##
That’s why it’s so crucial to amplify the committee’s findings. We need to make sure the Republican leaders who deny how serious the attack was and the voters who are being kept in the dark can’t escape hearing the truth.
##
We need your help to do it.
##
As RAP continues to cover the Jan. 6 hearings, [chip in to support our work](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX0xnB3jwZSTW8TyX931J_nVTW1FPBGm4L9P14N6J4pYS3q90pV1-WJV7CgGvkN8Z6Qx8rLZpWW7cs2lm8VwM3jW4MPdy94G6VSqW8nQ7QZ61ZWwmW5Sn2Nk8b4kHgN3G5zd3M-kQxV5ssCr8Rc_5dVJ0tp-8QFDfzW5sVgvt3sTJbtW1xpjY_6xyHjWW80qNx81MtT2mW6cpySD2S7F0tN78KbHRppbdQW6w1c9590Gd3sW5gYzt-44ztfVW2TGQH55dxj-RVqxWcy9jzV90W6x5GY11-SggJW7bqXXS7GCvWvW6sWbS-6mtYjrW9gNSPy25gf_LW7yBqj15tkMrrW4ktrpk2gcWPJW8GHzDf1jmfLKW3gn8SG29TkdfN5sllgFLD_4w3q7n1) so we can continue our coverage of the hearings, roll out more ads and billboards to get the truth in front of as many people as possible, and push back against MAGA conspiracy theories.
##
The Jan. 6 Committee’s opening hearing underscored how close we came to losing our democracy. It’s up to all of us to defend it.
##
Sarah Longwell, Executive Director Republican Accountability Project

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. clean_body: Find out what Nikki has been up to this week...| | | | NIKKI HALEY JOINS JEREMY HUNT IN GEORGIA Jeremy Hunt and Nikki Haley hosted an amazing Runoff Rally in Columbus, Georgia. People all across GA-02 are rallying behind Jeremy Hunt to get him across the finish line on June 21. We are ready to make history in Georgia! | | | | | | DERRICK VAN ORDEN (WI-03) – ENDORSED BY NIKKI HALEY Ambassador Nikki Haley announced her official endorsement of Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden for Congress in WI-03. After 26 years of service on the front lines, Van Orden vowed to serve in a new capacity — as a congressman for his beloved state of Wisconsin. Derrick is a fighter for Wisconsin farmers and will hold Biden accountable for his foreign policy blunders. TOM KEAN (NJ-07) – ENDORSED BY NIKKI HALEY This week, Nikki Haley endorsed Tom Kean for Congress in NJ-07. Tom Kean has been devoted to the people of New Jersey for years and understands what it means to serve with integrity. He is committed to reviving New Jersey’s small businesses and increasing job opportunities across the state. Tom Kean will shake up the streets of Washington and we are excited to support him. | | | 🇺🇸 THE 2022 CONSERVATIVE COMEBACK 🇺🇸 Tuesday was a huge day for Republicans across the country. Conservative fighters like Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks (IA-01), Rep. Ashley Hinson (IA-02), Gov. Kim Reynolds, Sen. Chuck Grassley, Rep. Randy Feenstra (IA-04), and Rep. Michelle Steel (CA-45) won big in their primary elections and Rep. Young Kim (CA-40) is in a strong position to head to the general election, but the race has not yet been called. Meanwhile, Democrats are losing ground in places like San Francisco because of their failure to combat the growing crime crisis. The 2022 conservative comeback is in full swing — here is what you need to know and how you can help. | | 🤔 DEMOCRATS ARE SPENDING...ARE WE SURPRISED? 🤔 House Democrats are spending big to stop the 2022 conservative comeback. The party has pledged over $21.5 million in television bookings across 13 media markets, in 7 different states. In short, we need your help to stop the Democrats and make the conservative comeback a reality. TIFFANY SMILEY IS READY TO FLIP WASHINGTON Polling shows the Washington Senate race between Democrat Patty Murray and Republican Tiffany Smiley tighter than Democrats would like. With the Left’s track record on crime, the economy, and education, a Republican can win in Washington state. Even Democrats believe Murray’s time is up after nearly 19 years of service. The state of Washington wants a fresh face representing them, and Tiffany Smiley is the one for the job. UPCOMING EVENTS WITH NIKKI HALEY If you live in South Carolina’s 1st Congressional District, we want you to join Nikki Haley and Nancy Mace at get-out-the-vote rallies on Sunday in Summerville and on Monday in Hilton Head. We know Nikki Haley would be thrilled to see you there to help get Nancy Mace across the finish line on Tuesday, June 14. | | | WANT TO HELP STAND FOR AMERICA PAC ELECT CONSERVATIVE CANDIDATES ACROSS THE COUNTRY?** | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm asking you personally:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I'm writing to you on behalf of my colleague Maggie Hassan, who could be the difference maker when it comes to the outcome of our Senate.
| | | Friend, I'm writing to you on behalf of my colleague Maggie Hassan, who could be **_the difference maker_** when it comes to the outcome of our Senate.

And listen: **I want to _keep working_ with Maggie Hassan. **

Maggie's from New Hampshire, the Live Free or Die state. A state that also has _really close_ elections. She won her last race by only 1,017 votes. **Those 1,017 votes defeated Republican attempts to repeal the ACA, securing health care for millions of Americans.**

But with her reelection battle projected to be one of the tightest races in the country, we can't afford to take her independent voice for granted. **Maggie Hassan could make all the difference in the future of our country.**
---

clean_body: I'm writing to you on behalf of my colleague Maggie Hassan, who could be the difference maker when it comes to the outcome of our Senate. | | | Friend, I'm writing to you on behalf of my colleague Maggie Hassan, who could be the difference maker when it comes to the outcome of our Senate. And listen: I want to keep working with Maggie Hassan. Maggie's from New Hampshire, the Live Free or Die state. A state that also has really close elections. She won her last race by only 1,017 votes. Those 1,017 votes defeated Republican attempts to repeal the ACA, securing health care for millions of Americans. But with her reelection battle projected to be one of the tightest races in the country, we can't afford to take her independent voice for granted. Maggie Hassan could make all the difference in the future of our country. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm for freedom. name: Mike Waltz
subject: All my life, this has been my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
Ever since I was a young boy, I dreamed of serving in the U.S. Army. | | | Peter, Ever since I was a young boy, I dreamed of serving in the U.S. Army.

Even as a child, when I celebrated the Fourth of July, watched my parents vote, and said the pledge of allegiance in school, I knew I was a part of something special.

_And when I grew up, those American promises showed themselves to be true._**__

I served as a Green Beret and built a business in the great state of Florida. I saw the most dangerous corners of the Earth, and I knew with more certainty than ever we MUST protect what we have in our great country.

I take the same spirit of service I had as a Green Beret to the halls of Congress with me every day. We need more conservative veterans and servant leaders in Washington, but I can’t do it without your help. ** [**Will you pitch in now to take back the House with REAL Republican leadership in Congress?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=687d9697fba54a6fbf42d285f686e501&_e=2lx3qAicjFZ2y-JShU9W2gQ3ZV8SFhNsApc0UOBnNZmHhuERc35faKc9vLMysM8D4I7p6IcKLoLBXiCdKBREg8GHVglKH8jrmYtijn_RrneINjhO4705xK5qkmhLCHpwIOulxqo0Uoiqfpf2DFjHbEzUTvJ9wGOWw1L0aUU-MGCYilq4wJGQDtxtJQo73N0NA07Y6cglQoiiDEvNIO0QKqgyUeOord51DRDFEIAbNr5eZfczVz3vIBJbhX-d6zy5qbcY4cHtRrqqkMj5dzWShv7_b0GIDQ5Pmzlp2nLgfSYGxViY98ZQqinJgytV3eLsO7jKKtnM3z3PHGgwyTOpSCD6Ou4WqkUbTNazUfbXLWxDTK5DtPDojmZSXOCE3F5Jx0IF7oAtkwuwnVmy6MW0bJUpb3xdNtkEOncitpGbM0c%3D)

I’ve fought terrorists abroad who hated America with every bone in their body.

But I _never_ thought I’d see that same hate from inside of our own country.

Elitists on the radical Left have _everything they could ever want_ \- but it won’t be good enough until they control you and I like dictators.

With their censorship, their disinformation boards, and their ministries of truth, the socialist Left has launched a full-scale attack on our rights.

The only way to stop them is with Republican leadership, and I’m building an A-team to take back the House.
**

clean_body: Ever since I was a young boy, I dreamed of serving in the U.S. Army. | | | Peter, Ever since I was a young boy, I dreamed of serving in the U.S. Army. Even as a child, when I celebrated the Fourth of July, watched my parents vote, and said the pledge of allegiance in school, I knew I was a part of something special. And when I grew up, those American promises showed themselves to be true. I served as a Green Beret and built a business in the great state of Florida. I saw the most dangerous corners of the Earth, and I knew with more certainty than ever we MUST protect what we have in our great country. I take the same spirit of service I had as a Green Beret to the halls of Congress with me every day. We need more conservative veterans and servant leaders in Washington, but I can’t do it without your help. I’ve fought terrorists abroad who hated America with every bone in their body. But I never thought I’d see that same hate from inside of our own country. Elitists on the radical Left have everything they could ever want \- but it won’t be good enough until they control you and I like dictators. With their censorship, their disinformation boards, and their ministries of truth, the socialist Left has launched a full-scale attack on our rights. The only way to stop them is with Republican leadership, and I’m building an A-team to take back the House. In Service, | | Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. They don’t know the communities that make up this district. They don’t know the struggles our friends and families have been going through. Yet, they are ready to stick their noses into this race to help their MAGA Republican nominee Monica De La Cruz. Michelle is not someone who is going to back down even in the face of this GIANT storm coming for us — and we are going to need every single person reading this email on board to weather this and fight BACK. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

clean_body: Genuine Representation | Friends, There is so much greed in Washington. Sometimes I wonder if any of them are there to serve the people who elected them. ...to serve YOU and get America back on track. | Every day we see politicians go on TV and talk about solutions to problems, but very rarely do we ever see them turn their words into action. Most of them don’t even propose legislation on the issues they seemed so inspired about. But I’m different. Donald Trump endorsed me because he knows I’ll walk the walk - I’m no cheap politician. I mean what I say! Politics, as usual, is over. We don’t have time to play that game. If you help me get to Washington, I will listen to you and actually address the issues, not just talk about them. Sincerely, Vernon Jones Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump. Vernon Jones is the only Trump-endorsed candidate in his race. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vernon for Congress Don't want to receive our emails anymore? name: Chuck Morse
subject: It’s parents who know best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1MTImZD1oM2gyeTBw.sV2IgGQqVbdgE0Uh9EFTK5yaxktCaeycAn7bg1QxUbE)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1MTkmZD1lNmE1bjV4.3iJzqQOpoA28YiMB8k8oXOkEBZ9t_7HrqwArKtbPiFw)
---
| | | Derek, __When it comes to raising children, it’s parents who know best - not the ever-growing federal government. **Unlike Joe Biden and Maggie Hassan, I do**** _NOT_****believe a parent’s rights end at their child’s classroom door!**
---
---
| |
---
| | [AGREE? CLICK HERE!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1MzkmZD1wMnYzcTZn.s-aPJADN0nyNAV_jY98CHj9Tr-kx5jKnWB73kvCLPCE)
---
---
| | | So here’s just one of the things I’ve done to take action on that front here in New Hampshire: I fought for **_School Choice_**** _._** By expanding choice for parents and students through Education Freedom Accounts - and by establishing the Children’s Scholarship Fund - we gave thousands of Granite State families educational opportunities that they didn’t previously have access to. THAT is how you stand up for parents... **_Hassan and her Teachers’ Union donors should take notes!_**
I’ll work to build on our success and deliver victories like this one we had for School Choice not just for NH - but for the whole country. Because unlike Hassan and the Democrats, I will **ALWAYS** stand up for parents’ rights. And I have the record to back it up!

---
---
| |
---
| | [STAND UP TO HASSAN. STAND UP FOR PARENTS’ RIGHTS!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1NTgmZD1oMHg1cjZu.iJu08NFy3s4lL8iR1GiWss5tIgYqn_Ea-m_dkO3Xp-4)
---
---
| |
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1NzMmZD1wM3c5ajBj.Nv3AqBIf0KZuOHFfsuWQhNkFOXyQumYB5xQENsnZ3oA)
---
---
| | | Thank you for joining me, _Chuck Morse_ P.S. - School choice wasn’t our only victory for parents either... We also banned CRT, made sure parents had a right to know what their kids were being taught, and more. _Bottom line is this -__[_if you support parents’ rights, there’s no better campaign to get behind than this one right here in NH!_](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTcwNDQwMDA5ODI3NzUyNjY3JmM9cjNoMyZlPTAmYj05ODEwMTI1ODAmZD12MGw1dTNu.EXzKGDsw-OroZv4LidrcSBerwlTyZnV21Q2PbqrAIgE)____

Peter,

Stacey Abrams is set to face off against incumbent extremist Republican Governor Brian Kemp in November. The future of Georgia rests literally in your hands!

Stacey Abrams is the leader Georgians deserve. She has dedicated her life to public service and has always stood shoulder to shoulder with everyday working folks. As a legislator, Stacey launched statewide organizations to ensure that all Georgians – regardless of race, income, or background – can register to vote, cast a ballot, and have their ballot recorded correctly and counted in the U.S. Census.

On the other hand, her Republican opponent, Brian Kemp, has used his power to implement harsher voter restriction laws in Georgia. The choice has never been more apparent. If you believe in the sanctity of our democracy and that voting rights are essential, [_**please pitch in what you can to support Stacey Abrams today. We cannot allow self-serving extremists like Brian Kemp to stay in office past November.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46411942/350135526/292284003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220611-em-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjYjYwMjNlLWI2ZTktZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6FgwsC43K7jVMXyxXGhMxel5I5UT9WVPNtKYA3a2hzY=)

BUST BIG TECH

MAJOR BILLS TO TAKE ON TECH’S MONOPOLY POWER!

A small number of companies have way too much power, and it’s crippling
our democracy.

Join Our Revolution and our allies in a strategic national campaign to
bust up the power of the big tech monopolies acting as gatekeepers to the
public square.

The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act have
a REAL SHOT TO PASS and would enable fair competition on Big Tech
platforms and app markets. This will create fairness for small businesses
and empower users with more choice on the platforms.

Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has pledged a floor vote this month —
and we’re going to hold him to it!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5728?t=1022&akid=3027%2E5885482%2E90DopK ]You can take a quick and simple action to kick off this fight! CALL
YOUR SENATORS NOW and tell them you want these two important bills passed!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5957?t=1023&akid=3027%2E5885482%2E90DopK ][IMG]

On Monday we were joined by US Rep. David Cicilline (RI-1), who has led
the fight to Bust Big Tech as chair of the House Antitrust Subcommittee.

“There’s a lot of momentum behind these bills,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5962?t=1024&akid=3027%2E5885482%2E90DopK ]Bloomberg reported him
saying on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5963?t=1025&akid=3027%2E5885482%2E90DopK ]live broadcast. “They have significant bipartisan
support, and they will pass when they come to the chambers in the coming
weeks.”

“Concentrated economic power comes with concentrated political power,”
Rep. Cicilline told us. “By spending millions on ads and lobbying to try
to defeat these bills, Big Tech is making our point of how dangerous
monopoly power is to our democracy and economy.”

Apple, Amazon, Google and Meta spent $16.7 million lobbying in the first
three months of this year, identifying the antitrust bills as their top
priority. Tech-backed trade groups spent another $25M in ads.

“If you look at the history of our country, it's been the battle between
democracy and concentrated economic power,” Rep. Cicilline said. “This is
the most recent form of it, and we can win this fight.”

decades of work on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5963?t=1028&akid=3027%2E5885482%2E90DopK ]live broadcast Monday.

“For every ill we face today, monopolists are part of the cause — driving

formula, taking away our healthcare, undermining national security,
fueling the climate crisis,” Barry said.

“We must use our most powerful political tool - our anti-monopoly laws.

“We can strike at the heart of these companies’ harm - which is their

day with cynicism, critical of our political systems, but then we have to

The Open Apps Markets Act and the American Innovation and Choice Act have a REAL SHOT TO PASS and would enable fair competition on Big Tech platforms and app markets. This will create fairness for small businesses and empower users with more choice on the platforms. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has pledged a floor vote this month — and we’re going to hold him to it! [ ]You can take a quick and simple action to kick off this fight! CALL YOUR SENATORS NOW and tell them you want these two important bills passed! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] On Monday we were joined by US Rep. David Cicilline (RI-1), who has led the fight to Bust Big Tech as chair of the House Antitrust Subcommittee. “There’s a lot of momentum behind these bills,” [ ]Bloomberg reported him saying on our [ ]live broadcast. “They have significant bipartisan support, and they will pass when they come to the chambers in the coming weeks.” “Concentrated economic power comes with concentrated political power,” Rep. Cicilline told us. “By spending millions on ads and lobbying to try to defeat these bills, Big Tech is making our point of how dangerous monopoly power is to our democracy and economy.” Apple, Amazon, Google and Meta spent $16.7 million lobbying in the first three months of this year, identifying the antitrust bills as their top priority. Tech-backed trade groups spent another $25M in ads. “If you look at the history of our country, it's been the battle between democracy and concentrated economic power,” Rep. Cicilline said. “This is the most recent form of it, and we can win this fight.” [ ]CALL YOUR SENATORS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Barry Lynn, executive director of the Open Markets Institute, who pioneered understanding of how 21st Century monopolies, talked about his decades of work on our [ ]live broadcast Monday. “For every ill we face today, monopolists are part of the cause — driving down our wages, driving up inflation and rent, causing shortages like baby formula, taking away our healthcare, undermining national security, fueling the climate crisis,” Barry said. “We must use our most powerful political tool - our anti-monopoly laws. That’s how we build Liberty, Democracy, Community, Peace, Prosperity,” he stated. [ ]CALL YOUR SENATORS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Fight for our Future Director Evan Greer revved up the folks on our [ ]national organizing call, emphasizing the huge opportunity we have to pass real antitrust legislation. “Big Tech lobbyists are throwing everything they have because they’re panicking,” Evan said. “They see the writing on the wall — no member of Congress wants to go on the record as a shill for Big Tech, and they know when these bills hit the floor, they’re going to pass overwhelmingly.” “We can strike at the heart of these companies’ harm - which is their scale and power that gives them outsized influence over our economy and what the future of our society looks like,” Evan said. “I wake up every day with cynicism, critical of our political systems, but then we have to be stoked and seize these opportunities to make something happen.” We’re asking everyone to make a quick call to your senators right now and ask them to support two major antitrust bills to curb the monopoly power of Big Tech. [ ]When you follow this link, you’ll put in info and instantly get an automatic call connecting you with your senators offices. Most times, you’ll just leave a brief message - so it’s not no work at all! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DEMS SERIOUSLY MUST DELIVER Learning nothing, Corporate Dems have spent the Biden administration giving excuse after excuse about why they haven’t kept their promises or delivered for working people. Bernie, as usual, put it best: “You really can’t win an election with a bumper sticker that says: ‘Well, we can’t do much, but the other side is worse.’” Young, Hispanic, Asian-American and Black voters are all drifting away from Democrats, [ ]Politico said, noting Bernie’s warning: “Unless we turn around, the voter turnout is going to be very, very low on the Democratic base.” With the Republican Party openly embracing fascism, we can’t afford another second of this pathetic weakness. That’s why [ ]Our Revolution is working every day to defeat corporate Dems in primaries and elect progressives who will actually fight to make our democracy function and deliver for the lives of working people. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] While the mainstream media claims voters are rejecting criminal justice reform in big cities, they’re missing the real story unfolding in front of their eyes. In major population centers like Alameda County, CA, progressive civil rights attorney Pamela Price is poised to win the District Attorney’s race! And in Contra Costa County, CA, progressive DA Diane Becton won her re-election bid! Progressives fared well in other CA races, too - Alex Lee ran a corporate-free campaign that overcame attacks from real estate developers to win his primary for re-election to the CA Assembly D-25. And, Fatima Iqbal-Zubair - backed by Bernie! - will also move on to the General Election in November for Assembly District 65. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Congratulations to Our Revolution Iowa victorious candidates in the June 7th primary! Deidre DeJear made history on Tuesday by becoming the state’s first Black nominee for Governor from a major party. And, Kimberly Graham heads to November as the likely next Polk County Attorney, another progressive prosecutor winning on issues like wage theft and sentencing disparities – not prosecuting low-level marijuana offenses. State Rep. Liz Bennett is on track to be the first out-LGBTQ woman in the State Senate! Molly Donahue also won her Senate primary on a message of restoring collective bargaining rights to public-sector unions! Dr. Megan Srinivas led her primary for State House as a powerful voice for public health throughout the pandemic. She pledges to repeal Medicaid privatization and fight for a living wage. Our Revolution also snagged two progressive County Supervisor seats with Jon Green, who wants to bring Bernie’s vision to Johnson County, home to Iowa City, and Tavis Hall who won on a message of economic and criminal justice in Black Hawk County. [ ]Our fight is far from finished! This month, we have working-class fighters on the ballot in Illinois, Nevada, New York, and around the country. Chip-in now to keep chipping away at the corporate establishment. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ELECTION DAY FOR AMY IN NEVADA Amy Vilela heads to Election Day on Tuesday in Nevada’s 1st District backed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution. Sending Amy to Congress would be HUGE for our movement!! One of our most passionate champions for Medicare for All, Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat. “I am running to represent the working class,” Amy told us on a [ ]National Organizing Call. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.” Let’s get out the vote in NV-1 — find a Vote Center [ ]HERE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] EARLY VOTING STARTS IN D.C. Early voting is also underway in Washington, D.C., where Our Revolution is backing Erin Palmer and Zachary Parker to make the DC Council more progressive! Erin is running for DC Council Chairwoman against a corporate-funded incumbent backed by gambling bosses and big developers. Like Erin, Zach is fighting for housing and economic justice and will always put DC residents and locally-owned businesses first. [ ]Join our Phonebank Force to help power these allies into office! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] It’s not just a “squad” anymore, we’re building a powerful progressive voting bloc in Congress to take on the corporate establishment. We’ve already clinched important wins for Congress with Greg Casar (TX-35), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jamie McLeod Skinner (OR-5), Michelle Vallejo (TX-15) Andrea Salinas (OR-06), and others! Even as corporate Dems sabotage their own prospects for the midterms, we are growing progressive power at every level of government. Let’s build on this momentum! [ ]Pitch-in here to help us take down the worst corporate puppets before they forfeit what’s left of our democracy to Republicans in November! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] It’s official! Our Revolution-endorsed Jamie McLeod Skinner defeated Kurt Shrader – known as the Joe Manchin of the House! Her progressive campaign overcame huge spending by Big Pharma and Biden’s endorsement of Shrader, who worked so hard on behalf of Big Pharma last year to derail Build Back Better and drug price cuts. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution-endorsed Michelle Vallejo has declared victory in a close race for Congress in Texas’ 15th District! “I want us to build stronger and healthier neighborhoods and I have a plan to make this happen,” she said. “We all deserve to work and live with dignity, and I am ready to fight for that every single day.” Also in Texas, Jessica Cisneros has called for a recount in TX-28, where she has battled Henry Cuellar - Trump’s favorite Democrat - into a dead heat. Despite Cuellar being opposition to abortion rights and gun legislation, Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Whip Jim Clyburn both campaigned for him and helped him eke out his paltry 136 vote lead. [ ]This is why it matters that we muster all of our collective strength to battle the Democratic establishment in these critical races. Becoming a recurring donor today to help progressives fight back against big money. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution New York Progressive Action Network joined with NY Working Families Party to support Jumaane Williams ahead of Tuesday’s NY Gubernatorial Debate! Jumaane is the progressive choice for NY Governor against the status quo Democrats, who seem more interested in giveaways to billionaires than in serving the vast majority of New Yorkers! While Jumaane is taking on Kathy Hochul, his running mate, Ana Maria Archila is [ ]calling out the crypto-billionaire dumping $1M to back her opponent. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This primary season, Our Revolution Phonebank Force has made 443,876 calls to voters across the country! We’re recruiting as many folks as possible to make calls to get us to that half-million mark and beyond! Right now, we have shifts for incredible candidates for Congress like Amy Vilella (NV-1) who is on the ballot THIS TUESDAY, Brittany Ramos-DeBarros (NY-11), Andy Levin (MI-11), David Segal (RI-2) and many others! One of our lead phone bankers, Amanda Walker, told us how fun and easy it is to make calls. “Our crew is there to help every step of the way, and it’s amazing to see our collective impact on these races,” Amanda said. “This is how we turn the tide against big money in these critical primary races.” Sign up for a shift today to mount a unified front against big money targeting our movement and our candidates! [ ]JOIN OUR PHONEBANK FORCE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ORNJ RACKS UP 90 LOCAL PARTY WINS Our Revolution New Jersey racked up more than 90 wins in local races on Tuesday, [ ]Insider NJ reports. “Since 2016, our members have been doing the work of transforming the party,” said Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky. “I’m excited to grow the base of county committee members who will work to build the party, engage voters and create transparency and good government in their districts.” Our Revolution Trenton Mercer Chair Joe Marchica and his running mate Denise Soto, defeated two long-time incumbents and resources from the local party to win county committee seats. Our Revolution NJ is also celebrating Karol Ruiz and Sandra Wittner winning seats in Dover – a further testament that a grassroots movement can confront the machine, beat back relentless attacks from well-funded incumbents and win. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DEFEND DEMOCRACY PETITION The January 6th hearings are underway, but Congress only has the power to investigate - not prosecute. That’s why Our Revolution is calling on secretaries of state to do their job, enforce the Constitution, and bar insurrectionists from the ballot! The American people cannot stomach any more political theater. Let’s put the findings from the hearings into action and make sure Trump and his minions are disqualified from seeking re-election! [ ]SIGN OUR PETITION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BUST BIG TECH - CALLING ALL SENATORS We’re asking everyone (this means you!) to make a quick call to your senators right now and ask them to support two major antitrust bills to curb the monopoly power of Big Tech. When you follow this link, you’ll put in info and instantly get an automatic call connecting you with your senators offices. Most times, you’ll just leave a brief message - so it’s not no work at all! Just tell them to support the Open Apps Markets Act (S.2710) and the American Innovation and Choice Act (S.2992), which would end Big Tech’s self-dealing, creating fair competition for small businesses, and empower citizens with more choice on the platforms. It’s a really simple way to make a HUGE IMPACT to wrest control of our democratic and economic power from corporate behemoths. [ ]CALL YOUR SENATORS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As our movement is showing with primary victories, we can overcome the force of big money with our direct voter outreach. We have a shot to elect more allies and replace more #ManchinDems in these pivotal elections — IF we do the work! It feels great to change a voter’s mind in real time and know that you helped get an amazing candidate into power. Help us make calls for Our Revolution partners on the ballot in coming weeks like Alexi Giannoulias for IL Secretary of State, congressional candidates Andy Levin (MI-11), Brittany Ramos DeBarros (NY-11), David Segal (RI-2), Amy Vilela (NV-1), and DC Council candidates Erin Palmer and Zack Parker. [ ]SIGN UP TO MAKE CALLS ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BECOME A MEMBER Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month, you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month, get a sticker 6-pack, and at $15, get the stickers and a poster. For $27, get both and a tote bag, or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

| Team, it’s been two years since our state headquarters went up in flames, displacing our staff and supporters during a crucial election year. Thanks to our grassroots donor team, we’ve recently been able to find a new state headquarters, just in time for another crucial election year.

**And then almost on cue, the air conditioning went out.** Trust us, it’s not a “dry” heat when there’s no air conditioning. So once again, our staff and our supporters are displaced during a crucial election year, just as we were starting to get ourselves back together. It’s been incredibly disruptive to our work.

Obviously, we can’t get the work done we need to do during the hot desert summer without air conditioning. But we didn’t budget a brand new AC unit into our plans. Last time we asked our team for support when our building burnt down, y’all rose to the challenge and made sure we didn’t have to take any money out of our campaigns to fix things.

**[Team, so we’re asking again. We don’t want to take money out of our voter contact or advertising budgets. We clearly didn’t anticipate our new headquarters having problems this early either. That’s why we’re coming straight to you. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. I wanted my top supporters – including you, friend – to weigh in and help this team craft a better campaign. But I'm still missing your response, friend. This focus group doesn't take long – no longer than 60 seconds, seriously – but it's absolutely invaluable in helping us strategize for a race that POLITICO has named one of the MOST COMPETITIVE in the nation. You see, I firmly believe that we CAN craft a strategy to flip Arizona blue, but we can only do that with the help of engaged, high-impact folks like you. Here's the link, in case you need it again: Thanks, Marco \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Marco Lopez Date: Fri, Jun 10, 2022 Subject: urgently need your help today (time-sensitive) | | | The Washington Post says that defending our most fundamental rights will come down to electing Democratic governors, and I have to say I agree, friend. Joe Biden may have won the presidency, but Arizona still has a Republican governor – one who's signed racist voter suppression bills and a radical 15-week abortion ban into law. But here's the thing, experts from POLITICO to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirm we can win this race. But we're going to need to build a winning strategy to flip this battleground blue – and that's where you come in, friend. I asked my team to gather a list of top supporters for our official Summer Strategy Survey, and your name was on the list, friend. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. From: dpwillis67@gmail.com Dear Congresswoman Cheney & the January 6th Committee,

Last night, you made me proud to be an American.

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.

[**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14587?t=9&akid=3134%2E878179%2ErwRPtC) | [DONATE $6 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/14587?t=10&akid=3134%2E878179%2ErwRPtC)

A Proud Democrat

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Newsletter: Ballots in the mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **Big news here in Maryland. The Board of Elections just started mailing absentee ballots, which means voting starts NOW.** We’re working hard to reach every voter with our message that it’s time for some damn change. After 42 years of the same corporate-backed leadership, it’s time for a representative who is beholden only to the people. [_**We need your help before this final stretch of the campaign: can you join us at our virtual textathon this Tuesday, June 14th from 7-8:30pm? Sign up here!**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWnukDo_cKk9iBdfkTrHm0v7SkkEvjvegOfEDQGRdwHreKX7505HxEhIWoutMx6ibZqf6g81MYLcoTIAYRFliZC7ByPF1_PX9ryMAIK64QcYN23xITuti5SmRc265zlN-FnWNMbxsLhgYXgUcFmsSWDasbmKJQANJPGeNa1gz35jhwMmDiUHejmg1MNgwV9l0bkRU1l4GOpMMZ-Uzir1rybGU9DLpnNS5osYO4TCxcIkNLa1hj51d3YqVVHMxVU4c/3mt/4qd_d03dQ-uJyteBcipL3Q/h0/JgNzPrYAp8NcT0MBjNJHB4PX6bk7gTl4djAJ2OCtud4) We've been out in the community, meeting people where they are. I believe that **people shouldn't have to go to a fancy fundraiser to meet the people who represent them** \- it's up to representatives to seek out all their constituents. That means I’m not afraid to canvass in unusual places, like nail salons, barber shops, and discount stores. And usually, the people there are always pleasantly surprised that we stopped by! **It’s Pride Month, and now more than ever, we need to stand up for the right of LGBTQ+ people to be themselves.** We marched in the Annapolis Pride Parade to send a message: we’re here, we’re not afraid, and we’re not going away. clean_body: | | | Team, Big news here in Maryland. The Board of Elections just started mailing absentee ballots, which means voting starts NOW. We’re working hard to reach every voter with our message that it’s time for some damn change. After 42 years of the same corporate-backed leadership, it’s time for a representative who is beholden only to the people. We've been out in the community, meeting people where they are. I believe that people shouldn't have to go to a fancy fundraiser to meet the people who represent them \- it's up to representatives to seek out all their constituents. That means I’m not afraid to canvass in unusual places, like nail salons, barber shops, and discount stores. And usually, the people there are always pleasantly surprised that we stopped by! It’s Pride Month, and now more than ever, we need to stand up for the right of LGBTQ+ people to be themselves. We marched in the Annapolis Pride Parade to send a message: we’re here, we’re not afraid, and we’re not going away. We need to be able to finish out this final stretch of the campaign strong – if you can make a contribution to help us do that, it would mean a lot. Even better: our will be a rocking virtual event and we need you to come! We’ll have templates and refcodes for you to reach out to people you know who would be willing to make a grassroots contribution. There will be prizes for the volunteers who raise the most, in the form of 2 free tickets to an event of your choice from a list of over 30 events (including Washington Nats games, Washington Commanders games, Kendrick Lamar, and The Price is Right.) I hope to see you there! Thank you so much for being part of this movement with us! In solidarity, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Box 670 Riverdale, MD 20738 | | Sent via . Hey team! My name is Berdetta Hodge, and I’m Jevin’s mom.

I’ve always told my children about the importance of helping others and being kind, so I’m proud to see Jevin doing just that by running for Congress. He’s personally faced many of the struggles that Arizonans are currently facing, and I know he’ll do all he can to help them. [_**Will you please consider supporting his movement today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46415616/350156393/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220611-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDkxY2QyMC1lMWU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6W83baaqjW69j_JbtrX1nTZsB_2_VlkAW13s72X7mA=)

---
I was so honored to be the first Black woman elected to public office in Tempe. I’m delighted to know that my son now has the same opportunity because Jevin would be the first Black member of Congress from Arizona if elected.

clean_body: I’ve always told my children about the importance of helping others and being kind, so I’m proud to see Jevin doing just that by running for Congress. | = | = Hey team! My name is Berdetta Hodge, and I’m Jevin’s mom. I’ve always told my children about the importance of helping others and being kind, so I’m proud to see Jevin doing just that by running for Congress. He’s personally faced many of the struggles that Arizonans are currently facing, and I know he’ll do all he can to help them. = | = I was so honored to be the first Black woman elected to public office in Tempe. I’m delighted to know that my son now has the same opportunity because Jevin would be the first Black member of Congress from Arizona if elected. Jevin has told me how much he wants to help the people of AZ-01 by lowering prescription drug prices, increasing investments in our public school system, and so much more. I believe he can get to Congress and improve the lives of everyday Arizonans, but he can’t do it alone. He needs you to step up and help his campaign. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Berdetta Hodge * | | = Paid for by Friends of Jevin D. Hodge Friends of Jevin D. body:
TOGETHER we make a difference.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00191AWA9lzMefuvUUZad-lPvgnWHDleMPwdEXWyvQOkNQMqv8xhq2piJfJ5BXBPOONTYNlYxSQk1R20glpieIJzupKk_BnWbphcoqTmJ-uz9MoRY5mVZS_pEUZ8XfhGFqmoaN0i8KdvwrF9-Q3703xWg==&c=XZtopoDEOpmg2Pz9HEibarAcO7iW6P4zuu5INZNqxoKUAnv2UX9sLg==&ch=5wdN7a7IbHCZg2Esb3SZ0WHkAv93pfmCpg7WqR0BXhWt1YJwYCOAEg==)
---
| Thank You! TOGETHER we make a difference.
---
|
---
Dear Friends, With all of my heart, THANK YOU! THANK YOU!
Messages and calls continued to come late into the night and began again early this morning. I am deeply grateful to and for all of you. THANK YOU! An important phone call I wanted to make this morning was to Skylar Williams. I am so proud of him. He represents the future of our country on many levels and is a leader of integrity, vision, intelligence, and determination. I look forward to watching him change the world! It's been an honor to be on this journey with Skylar and Mark. I am proud of our support for one another and our united front. We grew together in our shared passion for meeting people's needs and fighting for accessible and affordable healthcare and housing. Together, we spoke out on the battles being fought to save our family farms and ranches. Together, we defined our individual traits and our shared values. Together. For this, I am profoundly grateful.
To Skylar and Mark, thank you.
Pictured with me is a new friend from Choteau, MT. While in Choteau, I stood with Leah as she wept for our country. I held her as she shed tears for the children who have died from gun violence, the potential overturning of Roe v. Wade, and the political division pitting American against American as if we were each others enemy. Leah recited dates to me of times in history when the political parties worked together to better the lives of Americans in need. She talked at length of her love for her community and what she had lived through to gain equal value under the law as a female. She shared how that equality helped women build their communities and finance social programs that helped the most vulnerable. And she wept as she reflected on the fear she now felt.
I understand this fear. I have felt it too, Leah.
We often use the word *fight* when talking about social or political change. Two distinct thoughts have become clear to me on this political journey in regard to the word *fight*.
1\. We fight FOR something good when it is hard to achieve. This type of fight tests our will, our determination, our values, our willingness to sacrifice, and the core of what we stand for. This type of fight brings growth, strength to our nation, and builds our value as a whole.
2\. We fight AGAINST something that attempts to reduce our power or control. With this meaning, I am referring to manipulation of facts, outright lies, and the demeaning of our fellow Americans for personal gain. This type of fight weakens our country, increases our division, and relishes in creating strife.
My aim, goal, and fight going forward is that we, as a country, work TOGETHER to build up one another, support our democracy, and grow our common good. May we be all that we can be when we work TOGETHER.
And may we hold on to, learn from, and believe in the love all of the Leahs have for our country.
Thank you, Montana. I believe in you.

---
---
|
---
| To donate to our General campaign fund, please click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00191AWA9lzMefuvUUZad-lPvgnWHDleMPwdEXWyvQOkNQMqv8xhq2piJfJ5BXBPOONTYNlYxSQk1R20glpieIJzupKk_BnWbphcoqTmJ-uz9MoRY5mVZS_pEUZ8XfhGFqmoaN0i8KdvwrF9-Q3703xWg==&c=XZtopoDEOpmg2Pz9HEibarAcO7iW6P4zuu5INZNqxoKUAnv2UX9sLg==&ch=5wdN7a7IbHCZg2Esb3SZ0WHkAv93pfmCpg7WqR0BXhWt1YJwYCOAEg==)!

Thank you again for your support through the Primary! Because of your support Penny was able to travel more than 7,000 miles throughout the 2nd Congressional District. YOU are making difference in our state!
We are now gearing up for the General Election and looking forward to hitting the road.
See you soon!
Sincerely, Penny's Campaign Team
---

|

body:
| | | ****ALERT: President Biden calls for _IMMEDIATE_ action on gun safety

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8151?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&akid=4701%2E9716520%2ESQXo_h)
******Stand with President Biden:**
**[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show your support for commonsense gun safety reform>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8151?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&akid=4701%2E9716520%2ESQXo_h)******

Team --**It's time for urgent action to end gun violence.**

Even though an overwhelming _93% of Americans_ SUPPORT commonsense gun safety measures, **Republicans have still spent years BLOCKING bipartisan gun safety legislation across our country!**

But while Republicans follow the gun lobby's orders, communities like Uvalde, Buffalo, and Tulsa are torn apart. President Biden needs us to use our voices, to PROVE that Americans want action.

We’ve launched a MASSIVE Democratic petition to answer the president's call and show that Americans are standing up for gun reform,**_but we’re 27 signatures short in Pennsylvania!_ So please, before midnight:**

**[Stand with President Biden and sign on to show your support for commonsense gun safety reform>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/8151?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220611-PresidentialUpdate-BidenGunSafety-ETG-sl1&akid=4701%2E9716520%2ESQXo_h)**

subject: I CAN BEAT DAN NEWHOUSE!
body:
It's crunch time.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wPvvky1j5qehh99cIQYI8FLRbve4h8HIRIxI6Kh0COHZuWKxelQvVuBOlZgvdzrH8fSkW0lHP_GYxPnz71AL_eo1Ds8oRku1x82LEZe859-xYD_lBCgqwf_bpt5vCpdOAiHElrPaN2LrbxVfgbcXSA==&c=s8uNIvD5vCyCWTU0BDw05Q4ixLeE6q-WgB1kYF2e1w7aScn51qDiCA==&ch=O7ZTSlGuymqKqgVHGa9DVGgHztdiJnoDOme4Kh6tyMEou21DzwIVYQ==)
---
I CAN BEAT DAN NEWHOUSE!
---
HELLO FRIENDS,
We have approximately one month until ballots start to arrive. It's crunch time and we need to double down on all fronts. From radio to digital advertising and signs, the time for fundraising has never been so important!
Please consider a first time or additional donation to help us get across the finish line!!
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wPvvky1j5qehh99cIQYI8FLRbve4h8HIRIxI6Kh0COHZuWKxelQvVkLXLSdmNMo6d59Ydul3MVyIMpBfn4H-WaLWuSELldOhF6rzeEJ9bofN6mRWC-vhuFfmb7hdynZLfrRF7TdWuyYn4RRVeE-QoA5nzeSNcV3ZCkb3Q_WKfvGtnYTKDuJVfg==&c=s8uNIvD5vCyCWTU0BDw05Q4ixLeE6q-WgB1kYF2e1w7aScn51qDiCA==&ch=O7ZTSlGuymqKqgVHGa9DVGgHztdiJnoDOme4Kh6tyMEou21DzwIVYQ==)
---
Most agree, from my ability to communicate to my policy ideas and strategy, I rise to the top. I CAN BEAT DAN NEWHOUSE! ...But it's going to take everything we have.
We can get through the primary and we can win the general! I promise to deliver for you.
---
Patriotic to the core,
Corey Gibson

clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Peter, I'm sending you a quick update on Herschel Walker's race. Sen. Raphael Warnock is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in November. Electing Herschel Walker is key to taking back the Senate and Republicans CAN do this in November. But, this will be a tough and expensive race. Liberal Sen. Warnock is raising record-breaking amounts of money. In the first three months of the year, he raised $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE! My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: 1,000 Marylanders
body:
The only way we will win in July is if 1,000 Marylanders donate $250 by 11:59pm on Monday, June 20th. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=1-PSleSJDhA2U8fwALaOuP0K4Ew%3D)
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=FfSMtVpyttX7E2q4cANyPyQrVd4%3D)
---

**Team Baker,** Yesterday, Nancy and I made the tough decision to suspend our campaign activities for Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland. However, we reserve the right to reactivate our political activities in the event that donations increase drastically.[We were just hitting our stride.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=FfSMtVpyttX7E2q4cANyPyQrVd4%3D)Despite being dramatically out-raised and outspent by our competitors, we have consistently polled near the top of the Democratic primary field – a validation of our records of service and priorities.[I believe if we had a million dollars, we could win this election, but public financing has proved itself challenging.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=FfSMtVpyttX7E2q4cANyPyQrVd4%3D)**The only way we will win in July is if 1,000 Marylanders donate $250 by 11:59pm on Monday, June 20th.**[Through the system, (1000 x $250) plus matching funds = $1,050,000.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=FfSMtVpyttX7E2q4cANyPyQrVd4%3D)I’m not going to lie, this is a tough lift, but our supporters have proved the establishment wrong in the past. If our supporters help us reach our goal, it will provide us with the necessary resources to resume our political activities, and most importantly, get our message back on the air.If we are unable to resume our campaign, we will likely endorse one of the nine remaining candidates that we believe has the resources to turn our Governor’s mansion blue in November.[Where there’s a will, there’s a way](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Femci%3D7a644095-a0e9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a%26emdi%3Dea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001%26ceid%3D%257B%257BContactsEmailID%257D%257D%26ss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=sLqXSdoGBQOaADwQ1bOq_y78KhE%3D).
---
[_ _**DONATE** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62a502b72224c256171380fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fgo.rushernbaker.com%2Fa%2F1000%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62a4cf02a7f07b7498539ee5%26ss_email_id%3D62a502b72224c256171380fb%26ss_campaign_name%3D1%252C000%2BMarylanders%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-06-11T21%253A03%253A03Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&l=en-US&s=FfSMtVpyttX7E2q4cANyPyQrVd4%3D)
---
**What’s the will of Marylanders?
**
---
Thank you for your support,
---
|
---
Rushern L. Baker, III
