body:
I can't believe the new poll that shows my liberal opponent has pulled within 4 POINTS.
| **THE HILL: Mike Lee holds slight lead in Senate reelection bid: poll**
Peter,

My team just held an emergency meeting over new polling in my Utah Senate race. My liberal opponent - Evan McMullin - **has pulled within 4 points.**

As one of my biggest supporters I’m reaching out to you first. name: Doug White
subject: Immigration Reform Now! Reforma Migratoria Ya!
body:
¿Dónde está la verdadera reforma migratoria? ¡#DoNothingDan ataca de nuevo! La Ley de Modernización de los
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/1bO5FSy1i/c?w=4DozCTFcZRs42jY-EX_uK206168WMThxtX1mLxI849M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzFiTzVGU3kxaT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Immigration Reform Now! Reforma Migratoria Ya!
---
| |
---
| | ¿Dónde está la verdadera reforma migratoria? ¡#DoNothingDan ataca de nuevo! La Ley de Modernización de los Trabajadores Agrícolas fue una pieza de legislación introducida por Newhouse que se suponía iba a transformar la inmigración y proporcionar una "vía a la ciudadanía". Tenía todo el apoyo necesario: Los sindicatos pensaron que era buena, los demócratas la aclamaron con la vicepresidente Harris haciendo campaña por ella, el respaldo de las organizaciones de trabajadores agrícolas y los agricultores la apoyaron. ¿Suena demasiado bien para ser verdad? Lo es. Incluso los abogados conservadores que representan a los grandes empresarios afirman que no tiene sentido y que el camino hacia la ciudadanía es en realidad una servidumbre moderna. Entonces, ¿por qué se promocionó tan grandemente? Los sindicatos de labor la aceptó porque mantenía los costos de la mano de obra temporal más altos que los salarios de la mano de obra local y eso proporcionaba seguridad en el empleo para la mano de obra local. Los demócratas la promovieron porque probablemente no la leyeron o no la entendieron completamente. Los representantes de los trabajadores agrícolas probablemente vieron el camino a la ciudadanía como un pequeño, pero significativo paso en la dirección correcta. Las grandes empresas del sector agrícola estaban de acuerdo con ello porque nada cambiaba. Pero lo más probable es que la verdadera razón por la que se hizo el ruido fue que todos los partidos se unieron y forjaron juntos una legislación que parecía ser un golpe decisivo. La propaganda política superó con creces la floja legislación y el insulto no tan velado a los trabajadores temporales. Personalmente, aplaudo este hecho como un logro por el hecho de que estas facciones se unieron; eso es un comienzo. Pero está claro que Newhouse no es la persona adecuada para llevar a cabo una verdadera reforma migratoria. La amnistía, la eficiencia del proceso de visas, y una vía razonable para la ciudadanía es donde debemos estar; no aceptes nada menos. Es lo que exige el centro de Washington.
---
| Where is the real immigration reform? #DoNothingDan strikes again! The Farm Workers Modernization Act was a piece of legislation written by DND that was supposed to transform immigration and provide a “pathway to citizenship”. It had all the right support: Labor thought it was good, democrats hailed it with Vice President Harris stumping for it, endorsement from farmworker organizations, and farmers backed it. Sounds too good to be true? It is. Even conservative lawyers representing big AG claim that it is hollow and the pathway to citizenship is really just modern-day indentured servitude. So why was this so grandly touted? Labor was ok because it kept seasonal labor costs higher than local labor wages and that provided job security for local labor. The dems touted it because they probably didn't read it and or fully understand it. The farmworker representatives probably saw the pathway to citizenship in black and white a small, but significant step in the right direction. Big AG was ok with it because nothing changed. But most likely the real reason it got the hoopla was that all parties came together and forged legislation together that appeared to be a bold stroke. The political fanfare far outweighed the limp legislation and not-so-veiled insult to seasonal workers. I do, personally, hail this as a milestone for the fact that these factions came together; that is a start. But clearly, DND is not the person to get the hard work done. Amnesty, efficiency of the visa process, a reasonable pathway to citizenship is where we should be; accept nothing less. It is what Central Washington demands.
---
| | |
---
| | El PRIDE continúa. Pasé una noche maravillosa en la cervecería Bale Breaker en un evento celebrado por la organizacion PRIDE de Yakima. Esto fue un período previo al gran desfile PRIDE programado para el 18 de Junio en el centro de Yakima. Asegúrate de pasar por mi puesto y saludar. PRIDE continues. I spent a wonderful evening at Bale Breaker Brewery at an event held by Yakima Pride. This was a run-up to the big PRIDE parade scheduled for June 18th in downtown Yakima. Be sure and show up at my booth and say hello!
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | De Wapato a Mabton. Me tomé un día y recorrí todos los pueblos para conocer a los propietarios de pequeños negocios. Eran muy cálidos y acogedores, pero, por desgracia, compartían muchos de los mismos problemas: violencia, falta de vivienda y falta de apoyo a sus negocios. Los propietarios de pequeñas empresas con los que hablé afirmaron que no recibían ningún tipo de ayuda para covid, como las empresas más grandes, y que luchaban contra las regulaciones de sus propias comunidades. Las pequeñas empresas son las que más dinero aportan al sistema fiscal. Merecen ser escuchadas. From Wapato to Mabton. I took a day and drove through all the towns to meet small business owners. They were so warm and welcoming, but sadly, they shared many of the same problems: violence, homelessness and no support for their businesses. The small business owners I spoke with stated they received no relief for covid like larger businesses and they struggle with the regulations in their own communities. Small businesses are the largest contributors of business tax dollars. They deserve to be heard.
---

|

name: American Briefing
subject: Ukraine Responds to Biden's Bizarre Attack on Zelensky's Leadership

name: Dustin Roberts
subject: Welcome to Team Dustin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DUSTIN ROBERTS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Thank you for joining my team. Together, we can fight for our rights and get this country moving in the right direction again.
| | |
---
| | Peter, Thank you for joining my team. I'm grateful to have your support. As a husband, veteran, business owner, and Oklahoma native, I'm deeply concerned about the direction our country is heading. **I 'm running for Congress because we need an experienced fighter to defend our state from federal government overreach, protect our military bases, and preserve our conservative values.** To do that, we need to send battled tested conservatives to Washington and fire Nancy Pelosi. With the radical left out of power, we will restore a balanced budget, fight for smaller government, and banish the liberal ideology being pushed on the next generation. Thank you again for joining my team. We will be sending you updates about the campaign, and I look forward to hearing from you about how I can best represent you in Washington. Together, we can fight for our rights and get this country moving in the right direction again. Thank you,

Dustin Roberts Candidate for Congress | | [**CONTRIBUTE >>>**](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/click/2-396995-47-0-3777-4605-bab91f6cf2-gbf96b5604)
---

| PAID FOR BY DUSTIN ROBERTS FOR CONGRESS
---
Dustin Roberts for Congress
PO Box 449
Durant, OK 74702

You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com

I believe email is an important tool to keep my friends and supporters up to date on the latest news from my campaign for Congress. Thank you for being a part of my team. Together, we can fight to protect our military bases, defend Oklahomans from federal government overreach, and represent the conservative principles of Oklahomans.

[Unsubscribe](https://click.connect-strategic.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-396995-47-0-3777-edacb6b9d7a5be0-gbf96b5604)

name: James Carville
subject: Hold your horses, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14615?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4123%2E3611125%2EgQy9dN ]Carville headshot

Recent polling has shown Tim Ryan leading MAGA puppet JD Vance, which is
obviously good news.

But let’s not get ahead of ourselves, folks.

I can tell you from experience that races like this can change faster than
you can say “Senate majority”—so before we go running off half-cocked and
hoist the victory banner, we’ve still got work to do.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14615?t=1015&amount=25&akid=4123%2E3611125%2EgQy9dN ]Tim is leading JD right now, but that’s sure to get the attention of
the billionaires and corporations trying to tilt the scales of this race.
Can you chip in $25 right now to counter what’s sure to be a deluge of GOP
spending in the coming days?

JD is an awful candidate with zero interest in actually helping working
Ohioans—he’s way more interested in making himself and his super rich
friends even richer.

But we can’t afford to underestimate this clown. He sold out to secure the
support of Peter Thiel and Donald Trump, and those guys are ready to
break the bank to see him in the Senate.

Conversely, Tim is giving this race and the people of Ohio everything he’s
got, because that’s just who he is. He’s been fighting for Ohio families
his entire career, and he’s counting on us to send him to the Senate.

subject: You stood up – Thank you

Friend,
---
It’s because of people like YOU that we have a chance to beat Democrats this fall. ** ** I want to personally thank you for standing up for Republicans and partnering with organizations like Stand For America PAC. ** ** You are critical to helping us defeat the radical Left agenda and restoring traditional American values.** ** As an elite group of our top 1% of supporters, I am inviting you to join the Conservative Coalition Advisory Board. By joining this board, YOU will shape how we win the election and save America from the Democrats’ dangerous policies.** ** [**RSVP here >>**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=387569d5076240d69b8c0fbe41002e8b&_e=D2EH23wJWPp74YEpL8RILWKNrQuevc3aQ94vOIAIQqCiniqh2B6a9wiTkWnCg57PSUSsEBAaAaTkYzlitIwSHD9m-9NM_aWjPOcUAa4niFW5-FTeH_92-vWDimO3pnVrSkQ5lK7G8Wos5t9Pub5eCyVZWd4zjHw6ioKIEEpq91DPE-Ie-DUOXD9ix4wjUrebh2ovGIXkQbANOcp9jS7h4VH6_49vhYnDcS94HdVBUFPfqyEMogfPaHkdZhW_UrbV6rAe_Bb9oGoa67L1gnfioG-ikZAquG-R1rkqLxq5W5ud6P34AhIqZra3quGNZRuhVEnMqf77g7DYRK7sjCYcE0LqV3iHud-TlJPcMnbFT9D5CWhysHcTILYLp4s_5MtnSI_1gT3Qkk7Xokczy-BHOQV_3079mvHoOJUAW5MIqV4DEFBk25RLK2qMVY_e0yNFqwnhdfKfDeoa-zivHm4fvHK5xNv-m0R8gNspIN8iD_g%3D)** ** My very best,**

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. **[Pre-order your signed copy today to have it shipped to you once it launches in October.](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=387569d5076240d69b8c0fbe41002e8b&_e=D2EH23wJWPp74YEpL8RILWKNrQuevc3aQ94vOIAIQqB4G6pzcxeEglNWwbUC-EHx-m41x8tfbXMDXFrySI8SDG9tOdbUDzXUjpUzcmt84-a7G8K8xRvw7fY4frQdbgLlpekIASnd2zktkJ125ubJYgDIWM-_rYQc5qqnl7fOrs3mL5b1oYzin5iNEwHQR1D-3khwCtKvoA4Fpxjw-TNJEa7p9ujAgXDgUQq7a8Iz9-LQO2N5dX7P5pOQRSn3swsXMZqoU5TZa7uIKJh8EFn7GAIwEpojwFknwxbhnKtT4m1ndrWGwIshWJdaV7gAsykS9l8VoKF4mjhRRRHzRqT4etlUhnbw3srfULfBvzMa2_-HbbqBKVPmDrwdKvnWxRrM87fR0qERvalQpOMsaZvW0qeg-SmD6kAwtVWoDvUaY0zAWjAxAmQRAKeDHYCEW8X_bS5L_1loSPYzeg2hcj5kmQ%3D%3D) clean_body: | | | Friend, It’s because of people like YOU that we have a chance to beat Democrats this fall. I want to personally thank you for standing up for Republicans and partnering with organizations like Stand For America PAC. You are critical to helping us defeat the radical Left agenda and restoring traditional American values. As an elite group of our top 1% of supporters, I am inviting you to join the Conservative Coalition Advisory Board. By joining this board, YOU will shape how we win the election and save America from the Democrats’ dangerous policies. My very best, Nikki Haley | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: What our opponent was doing on January 6:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The January 6 Committee’s hearing this week was chilling and a reminder of why Ted Budd cannot be allowed to represent us in the U.S. Senate.
#

The January 6 Committee’s hearing this week was chilling and showed us once again why our opponent Ted Budd cannot be allowed to represent us in the U.S. Senate.
While insurrectionists attacked our Capitol and attempted to overthrow our democracy, here’s a reminder of what he was doing:
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220611-2-t1&refcode2=1039.357359.atdacr&t=1&akid=1039%2E357359%2Eatdacr)
[**Please make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us defeat Ted Budd and stop him from trying to overthrow future elections in the Senate.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220611-2-t1&refcode2=1039.357359.atdacr&t=2&akid=1039%2E357359%2Eatdacr)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220611-2-t1&refcode2=1039.357359.atdacr&t=3&akid=1039%2E357359%2Eatdacr)**
When Ted Budd was asked about what happened on January 6, he said the insurrectionists were “patriots” and said that what happened “was nothing.”
What happened on January 6 was far from “nothing.” What we’re seeing and hearing from the January 6th Committee makes that very clear.
But Ted Budd has described the work of the bipartisan committee as getting in the way of “freedom-loving Americans.”
His comments are frankly disqualifying for someone who wants to lead and represent us in the United States Senate.
We cannot afford another far-right, anti-democratic senator who will undermine our Constitution for the sake of power. So we need to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us win North Carolina and defend our democracy?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-june22.-3KU-G&refcode=em220611-2-t1&refcode2=1039.357359.atdacr&t=4&akid=1039%2E357359%2Eatdacr)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, this is important: **Herschel Walker (R) is now officially the GOP nominee for Senate here in Georgia, meaning he and I will be facing off this November.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, keeping this seat and the Senate blue will come down to your grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you split $20 or more right now between my campaign and John Fetterman’s so we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-2?refcode=em20220611-6176&refcode2=6176_434096_L5HY_r&akid=6176%2E434096%2EL5HY_r)**
Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator on the ballot – in the race that experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say could decide Senate control.
That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. Even before the primary, they had already poured nearly $15 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat – **and now, recent polls show me 1 point down.**
With the general election officially here, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win race. **That’s why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight tonight, but right now, we’re dangerously short.**
So please, Derek, I’m counting on you: [**_Will you split an urgent donation of $20 or more now so we can defeat Herschel Walker, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-2?refcode=em20220611-6176&refcode2=6176_434096_L5HY_r&akid=6176%2E434096%2EL5HY_r)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220611-2?refcode=em20220611-6176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6176_434096_L5HY_r&akid=6176%2E434096%2EL5HY_r)**
Thank you for stepping up when it matters most, Derek. I truly appreciate it.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220611-6176-footer&t=1&refcode2=6176_434096_L5HY_r&akid=6176%2E434096%2EL5HY_r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: *This* is a greater threat than China or Russia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, The multinational corporations buying up entire neighborhoods pose a greater threat to Americans' security and safety than China or Russia. Likewise for the pharmaceutical companies that have manufactured the opioid crisis ravaging our country — they are merchants of death. Consider this: annual drug overdose deaths in the US exceed 100,000. Almost 1 million Americans have died of a drug overdose in the past 20 years. Over a six-year period, one county in my district received 37,838,060 pain pills — 76.6 pills per person per year. [**It’s time to stop warmongering and to start paying attention to our problems at home. name: Wes Moore
subject: Leadership, integrity, and fundamental decency
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46414792/350152830/1627778034?refcode=fl_em_na_20220611baker_wm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTkzMmNkNi1kNGU5LWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9s24asAQEKE0BrB8jbj7C7jVaQQunSLMOVZ9iBFRdg=)
---
Team, This race has always been about Maryland — about how we move this great state forward with humility and respect for each other. It’s never been about any one candidate — it’s been about you. Yesterday, one of my fellow Democratic candidates, former Prince George’s County Executive Rushern Baker, suspended his campaign for governor. I want to commend Mr. Baker on the leadership, integrity, and fundamental decency he has exhibited throughout not only this campaign, but for his entire career in public service. I am deeply proud to call him a friend. He spoke to the issues Maryland families are facing – from the economic and moral consequences of crime in Baltimore to transportation, housing, healthcare, and more. He spoke with love and care for our communities. The manner in which he ran his campaign is a reflection of his own character. We saw it in how he restored honor and economic prosperity to Prince George’s County as county executive. We saw it in how he clearly leads with love as a public servant, a husband, and a father. And it is why I am certain his voice will continue to push the public debate forward. Mr. Baker, thank you for the lasting impact you have made in the lives of Maryland families. Elevate, Wes
---
| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---

| | Peter, The FBI just showed up. You read that right. _**The FBI sent people to my home to arrest me.**_ This is face of tyranny and government overreach. Anyone who has followed our campaign knows I am prepared to give my life fighting against this exact oppression. But let me back up. My name is Ryan Kelley. You've probably never heard of me, or at least hadn't heard of me before today when my name and picture was splashed across every news outlet in the country. Thats ok. body:
| | |
---
Friend, The border invasion’s impact to Arizona farmers and ranchers is not often covered by the news media. Our families experience illegals in our yards, border patrol patrol chases, massive fire damage to our ranches, trash on our land, damage to water lines, human remains on our property, loss of cattle and a steep financial impact to our businesses.
---
[**Sign here to put AZ farmers and ranchers #1 >>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8785bbcd37974f59a46d4d54e68e47e9&_e=cMqfSBf_7T4eYX6bmNTG6OglZVlVl1nEB42G41WdAYGt13p7_T-ORqnx2NYDZnSIVLz74AGjYiebb9A7ulWAuaYqAzxrhXl-cximAelG4GX_HK_MUrAznqM2i-BJtWzJEBuovAmVQEyhdb3yHRjZaYgcNC5dgkAQIw5bZokUkTzzRE6UEjhjFOZfCr13e2T28v-C_T15R20a4ESQVXnflIMj7ZNnoVcxNzsP40z5_frHdCL1an1IgqIQZE_KPbXdUxYIb3xik5aXF5gF2EZnzT7NuJ1P7qXeas2emr2GUTYihSN0b-NVEe-eCrIrXbcS61vVQpGEWqtcKMFWkHYzdqWz08cq-PvLsVc_unhD6FUY8-VPY40xKC1LgxKw5waI1ma7fwYO1yYVOfyE0KzZFrMrQ8onUxnzFzLiCdaDkAGK2fr-AfnlOffDf9OuPg0PK_q-rwj0-En6PP5uemA3oBJWBOusmL3Ag-kd4GSSeQg%3D)
---
Arizona farmers and ranchers have been terrorized by illegal border crossings: **the drugs, crime, and traffickers coming from south of our border have made our lives much harder** –and nobody has done anything to alleviate our situation. Just last week, my family woke up to illegal migrants on our property as my daughter left early in the morning. **This isn’t just a talking point for me – it’s real life for us.** I truly have skin in the game, and as your next Attorney General I will defend our ranchers and farmers from this invasion. [Video from that morning](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8785bbcd37974f59a46d4d54e68e47e9&_e=cMqfSBf_7T4eYX6bmNTG6Cs1plnPh68dXdNUo36yxM7I3jqdW0BQnyhOdLDX2bnKpWTc4fvW_2bmu4L53DLS-mIpiCFcPMRuqRX8Ad0-EQq3ddj6Gc_00jdxBXhmk40Aqsa2nFYjdFh9dovEy7oR8aZQ_g6ryfsyFFBAML9X5eCCQNLaOtyiAdjk152aeYnUWDBi2iIz6VlxbmWOU_9_K-hrjdtsCxJ4onexWk3w5aeGVueEYh1DvC999fUeTsgzKuAyM5yGdDFsXUqOc4JzBQ%3D%3D) I’m tired of living my day-to-day life under the fear that our farm will be the next target of these invaders–and I know that hundreds of farmers and ranchers across our state feel the same way. That is why I have the full endorsement of most southern Arizona ranchers. Friend, [**will you add your name to STAND UP for our farmers and ranchers?**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8785bbcd37974f59a46d4d54e68e47e9&_e=cMqfSBf_7T4eYX6bmNTG6OglZVlVl1nEB42G41WdAYGt13p7_T-ORqnx2NYDZnSIVLz74AGjYiebb9A7ulWAuaYqAzxrhXl-cximAelG4GX_HK_MUrAznqM2i-BJtWzJEBuovAmVQEyhdb3yHRjZaYgcNC5dgkAQIw5bZokUkTzzRE6UEjhjFOZfCr13e2T28v-C_T15R20a4ESQVXnflIMj7ZNnoVcxNzsP40z5_frHdCL1an1IgqIQZE_KPbXdUxYIb3xik5aXF5gF2EZnzTOm0dcC34D4yKdqnz_zsN_RbnAbtFQd7XTrymfWYiY29SMP4MAYXkXP8astn0ZaGpmPseS3IrL2a9jkAMJ3_JEWiv7YXd42OWwDXY_vevjJccfVmy6RBWwpXvJSJTAqLKAa5WBk6fSi7yhE_EyNFzwEfATvjqS2U7QI_NWhRSK294nNuYq9JjlbksiMcS8c6B2C6WBDwprlx7KmwWvNOoM%3D) As Attorney General, I will use the full force of the law to prosecute cartels and human traffickers as well as those who enable them. I’ll label them terrorists, impound their vehicles, and defend the governor’s ability as commander-in-chief to repel this invasion. **I’ll take every legal action to ensure our border is safe and secure.** It’s time to put ranchers, farmers, and our agricultural community FIRST! If you agree, then join me today: **[https://secure.winred.com/shedd-for-attorney-general/](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8785bbcd37974f59a46d4d54e68e47e9&_e=cMqfSBf_7T4eYX6bmNTG6OglZVlVl1nEB42G41WdAYGt13p7_T-ORqnx2NYDZnSIVLz74AGjYiebb9A7ulWAuaYqAzxrhXl-cximAelG4GX_HK_MUrAznqM2i-BJtWzJEBuovAmVQEyhdb3yHRjZaYgcNC5dgkAQIw5bZokUkTzzRE6UEjhjFOZfCr13e2T28v-C_T15R20a4ESQVXnflIMj7ZNnoVcxNzsP40z5_frHdCL1an1IgqIQZE_KPbXdUxYIb3xik5aXF5gF2EZnzZ02MlJTC_8Ytb0MZdWTAMEBcQx8KgHh7Im0wMYX4oSGBsOZI6NSN19OWDbDGyT7dlkn5UrW2b2xyvq5Gcdaqo_hLg_7QGK9SQ6bJPLi0FFEWbyy6wT3NZc0X54CAUtykd0h_QCmGRlpqT8MrHnjlOe03uM7BG5SyOdPf21IFx4zpg94QyNdVjeBLS5PG1X4MLnSWSB8YUCSAw5Gm_Xfg0I%3D)**[](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=8785bbcd37974f59a46d4d54e68e47e9&_e=cMqfSBf_7T4eYX6bmNTG6OglZVlVl1nEB42G41WdAYGt13p7_T-ORqnx2NYDZnSIVLz74AGjYiebb9A7ulWAuaYqAzxrhXl-cximAelG4GX_HK_MUrAznqM2i-BJtWzJEBuovAmVQEyhdb3yHRjZaYgcNC5dgkAQIw5bZokUkTzzRE6UEjhjFOZfCr13e2T28v-C_T15R20a4ESQVXnflIMj7ZNnoVcxNzsP40z5_frHdCL1an1IgqIQZE_KPbXdUxYIb3xik5aXF5gF2EZnzZSA0aHRlbJB8LvFzrb1wAtNZeXZ7yeAfevobcpVH6io9l-IiMwoW2kfUMznRwo6fG_vGBeqIOkRW43sCpKY49gnNGsaKNH9qYNtZJhejcyaKGYDPnUx2TT_Do48RkYl80cQSaDSpYHVL0gKWvdZjBac_Yikwdzs8oh_hfGDOdmcPLD_yljDJj87gGBaLy2JiB7m31AluJwP9G-jcWd2OMM%3D) Sincerely, Tiffany
